en.tldr: Studies covariance steering for discrete-time Markov jump linear systems with multiplicative noise, proposes a lifted-state formulation and SDP relaxation, and handles chance constraints.
en.motivation: Existing covariance steering methods do not account for multiplicative noise and Markov jumps, while real systems (e.g., finance) require handling both uncertainties.
en.method: Decomposes control law into mode-dependent linear feedback, feedforward, and independent random components; unifies mean and covariance via lifted-state formulation; converts to SDP.
en.result: Lossless SDP relaxation for unconstrained case; tractable convex surrogates for chance constraints with iterative reference update to reduce conservatism. Financial experiments validate.
en.help_to_user: Provides a covariance steering framework for systems with multiplicative noise and jumps, applicable to financial risk control.

idea_spark.idea: Combine iterative reference update with reinforcement learning for online control policy adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: Iterative scheme may increase computational load; convex surrogates may remain conservative under extreme constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Risk measures like VaR in finance can inspire more refined chance constraint modeling.

papers.title: Convergent Evolution: How Different Language Models Learn Similar Number Representations
papers.summary: Language models trained on natural text learn to represent numbers using periodic features with dominant periods at $T=2, 5, 10$. In this paper, we identify a two-tiered hierarchy of these features: while Transformers, Linear RNNs, LSTMs, and classical word embeddings trained in different ways all learn features that have period-$T$ spikes in the Fourier domain, only some learn geometrically separable features that can be used to linearly classify a number mod-$T$. To explain this incongruity, we prove that Fourier domain sparsity is necessary but not sufficient for mod-$T$ geometric separability. Empirically, we investigate when model training yields geometrically separable features, finding that the data, architecture, optimizer, and tokenizer all play key roles. In particular, we identify two different routes through which models can acquire geometrically separable features: they can learn them from complementary co-occurrence signals in general language data, including text-number co-occurrence and cross-number interaction, or from multi-token (but not single-token) addition problems. Overall, our results highlight the phenomenon of convergent evolution in feature learning: A diverse range of models learn similar features from different training signals.

ai.tldr: 不同语言模型在数字表示上表现出趋同进化，学习到相似的周期特征，但只有部分模型能实现模T几何可分性。
ai.motivation: 探究不同架构和训练方式的语言模型如何学习数字表示，并解释为何某些模型能实现模T几何可分而其他不能。
ai.method: 通过傅里叶分析识别周期特征，理论证明傅里叶域稀疏性是模T几何可分的必要条件而非充分条件，并通过实验分析数据、架构、优化器和分词器的影响。
ai.result: 发现多种模型都学习到周期为2、5、10的特征，但只有部分模型能线性分类模T；识别出两种获取几何可分特征的路径：从语言数据中的互补共现信号或从多token加法问题中学习。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解语言模型数字表示的内在机制，以及不同训练信号如何导致相似特征。

idea_spark.idea: 利用互补共现信号设计更高效的预训练任务，促进模型学习可解释的几何可分特征。

en.tldr: Different language models exhibit convergent evolution in number representations, learning similar periodic features, but only some achieve mod-T geometric separability.
en.motivation: To investigate how language models with different architectures and training methods learn number representations, and to explain why some models achieve mod-T geometric separability while others do not.
en.method: Identify periodic features via Fourier analysis, prove theoretically that Fourier domain sparsity is necessary but not sufficient for mod-T geometric separability, and empirically analyze the roles of data, architecture, optimizer, and tokenizer.
en.result: Multiple models learn periodic features with periods 2, 5, 10, but only some can linearly classify mod-T; two routes to geometric separability are identified: from complementary co-occurrence signals in language data or from multi-token addition problems.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the internal mechanisms of number representations in language models and how different training signals lead to similar features.

idea_spark.idea: Design more efficient pretraining tasks leveraging complementary co-occurrence signals to promote learning of interpretable geometrically separable features.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on specific co-occurrence signals may reduce model generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by biological convergent evolution, exploring common patterns in feature learning across diverse model architectures.

papers.title: Widely degenerate anisotropic diffusion: local boundedness and semicontinuity
papers.summary: We investigate the regularity of local weak solutions to evolution equations of the form \[ \partial_{t}u\,=\,\sum_{i=1}^{n}\,\partial_{x_{i}}\left[a_{i}(x,t)\,(\vert\partial_{x_{i}}u\vert-δ_{i})_{+}^{p_{i}-1}\,\frac{\partial_{x_{i}}u}{\vert\partial_{x_{i}}u\vert}\right]\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\mathrm{in}\,\,\,Ω_{T}\,=\,Ω\times(0,T)\,, \] where $Ω$ is a bounded domain in $\mathbb{R}^{n}$ with $n\geq2$, the coefficients $a_{i}$ are measurable and bounded, $p_{i}>1$ and $δ_{i}\geq0$ are fixed parameters. Under suitable assumptions on the exponents $p_{i}$, we first show that the local boundedness of weak solutions follows from their membership in an appropriate non-homogeneous parabolic De Giorgi class. We then establish the existence of semicontinuous representatives for local weak sub(super)-solutions. Our analysis extends analogous results available for less degenerate operators and generalizes the local boundedness results obtained in [7] to fully anisotropic, widely degenerate parabolic PDEs with non-smooth coefficients depending additionally on the space-time variables $(x,t)$, whose growth is governed by a family of exponents $p_{i}$ rather than by a single exponent.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类高度退化的各向异性扩散方程局部弱解的正则性，证明了局部有界性和半连续性。
ai.motivation: 现有结果仅处理退化程度较轻的算子，本文将其推广到完全各向异性、高度退化的抛物型偏微分方程，且系数非光滑并依赖于时空变量。
ai.method: 通过将弱解纳入非齐次抛物型De Giorgi类，利用该类性质证明局部有界性；再建立局部弱子（超）解的半连续代表元存在性。
ai.result: 在适当的指数条件下，弱解具有局部有界性，且存在半连续代表元。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理高度退化各向异性扩散问题的正则性分析提供了理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将非齐次De Giorgi类与非线性半群理论结合，研究解的唯一性。
idea_spark.risk: 高度退化可能导致解不唯一或正则性不足，需谨慎验证条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从各向异性退化扩散的物理背景（如多孔介质流动）中寻找实际应用场景。

en.tldr: We study the regularity of local weak solutions to widely degenerate anisotropic diffusion equations, proving local boundedness and semicontinuity.
en.motivation: Previous results cover less degenerate operators; we extend to fully anisotropic, widely degenerate parabolic PDEs with non-smooth coefficients depending on space-time variables.
en.method: We show that local boundedness follows from membership in a non-homogeneous parabolic De Giorgi class, then establish existence of semicontinuous representatives for local weak sub(super)-solutions.
en.result: Under suitable assumptions on exponents, weak solutions are locally bounded and admit semicontinuous representatives.

papers.title: On integrable by Euler planar differential systems
papers.summary: The subject of our discussion is the theory of differential equations as set out in two classical Euler's textbooks "Institutiones Calculi Differentialis" and "Institutiones Calculi Integralis".

papers.title: Stochastic Barrier Certificates in the Presence of Dynamic Obstacles
papers.summary: Safety of stochastic dynamic systems in environments with dynamic obstacles is studied in this paper through the lens of stochastic barrier functions. We introduce both time-invariant and time-varying barrier certificates for discrete-time, continuous-space systems subject to uncertainty, which provide certified lower bounds on the probability of remaining within a safe set over a finite horizon. These certificates explicitly account for time-varying unsafe regions induced by obstacle dynamics. By leveraging Bellman's optimality perspective, the time-varying formulation directly captures temporal structure and yields less conservative bounds than state-of-the-art approaches. By restricting certificates to polynomial functions, we show that time-varying barrier synthesis can be formulated as a convex sum-of-squares program, enabling tractable optimization. Empirical evaluations on nonlinear systems with dynamic obstacles show that time-varying certificates consistently achieve tight guarantees, demonstrating improved accuracy and scalability over state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 本文针对存在动态障碍物的随机动态系统，提出时不变和时变屏障证书，利用贝尔曼最优性降低保守性，并通过多项式平方和规划实现高效求解。
ai.motivation: 现有安全屏障方法未充分考虑障碍物动态导致的时变不安全区域，且保守性较高。
ai.method: 引入时变屏障证书，基于贝尔曼最优性捕捉时间结构，并将证书综合转化为凸平方和规划。
ai.result: 时变证书在非线性系统上获得更紧的保证，精度和可扩展性优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户为随机系统在动态障碍环境中提供概率安全保证，并指导证书的优化求解。

idea_spark.idea: 将障碍物运动模型嵌入屏障证书的时变约束，结合贝尔曼方程降低保守性。
idea_spark.risk: 多项式假设可能限制复杂非线性系统的适用性，且平方和规划求解规模随维度增长。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用最优控制视角重新设计安全证书，启发其他时变安全约束的凸化方法。

en.tldr: This paper proposes time-invariant and time-varying barrier certificates for stochastic systems with dynamic obstacles, leveraging Bellman optimality to reduce conservatism and using sum-of-squares programming for tractable synthesis.
en.motivation: Existing safety barrier methods do not explicitly account for time-varying unsafe regions induced by obstacle dynamics and suffer from high conservatism.
en.method: Introduces time-varying barrier certificates that capture temporal structure via Bellman optimality, and formulates certificate synthesis as a convex sum-of-squares program.
en.result: Time-varying certificates achieve tighter guarantees on nonlinear systems, with improved accuracy and scalability over state-of-the-art methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users provide probabilistic safety guarantees for stochastic systems in environments with dynamic obstacles and guides certificate optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Embed obstacle motion models into time-varying constraints of barrier certificates and reduce conservatism via Bellman's equation.
idea_spark.risk: Polynomial assumptions may limit applicability to complex nonlinear systems, and sum-of-squares programming scales poorly with dimension.
idea_spark.inspiration: Redesigning safety certificates from an optimal control perspective inspires convexification of other time-varying safety constraints.

papers.title: Counterexamples to the Lorentzian Calderón problem
papers.summary: We show that two non-isometric, smooth, globally hyperbolic Lorentzian metrics can have the same hyperbolic Dirichlet-to-Neumann map on an infinite cylinder with timelike boundary.

en.tldr: We show that two non-isometric, smooth, globally hyperbolic Lorentzian metrics can have the same hyperbolic Dirichlet-to-Neumann map on an infinite cylinder with timelike boundary.

papers.title: Likelihood-based inference for birth-death processes with composite birth mechanisms
papers.summary: We develop a likelihood-based inference for finite-state birth-death processes with composite birth rates, in which multiple distinct mechanisms contribute additively to the total birth intensity. Our main motivating example is an SIS epidemic model with pairwise and higher-order transmission. The process is observed through a single aggregate trajectory, and in the main setting of interest, birth events are unmarked. This creates a deconvolution problem in event space: the state is one-dimensional, but the mechanism underlying each birth is latent.   We formulate the inference under a Doob $h$-transformed $Q$-process, which is time-homogeneous and ergodic and which provides a time-homogeneous asymptotic surrogate for the law of the original process conditioned on long survival. We derive the corresponding conditional likelihood and study both the conditional maximum likelihood estimator and a quasi-maximum likelihood estimator which is based on a simplified working score.   Under the Doob-transform law, we prove consistency and asymptotic normality for both estimators, with asymptotic covariance determined by the inverse Fisher and inverse Godambe information matrices, respectively. We also showcase a practical one-dimensional test for the presence of a specific higher-order birth mechanism.

ai.tldr: 针对具有复合出生率的有限状态出生-死亡过程，开发了基于似然的推断方法，并应用于SIS流行病模型。
ai.motivation: 在SIS流行病模型中，出生事件由多种机制（如成对传播和高阶传播）共同贡献，但观测数据仅包含聚合轨迹，无法区分事件来源，形成解卷积问题。
ai.method: 利用Doob h-变换构造时间齐次且遍历的Q-过程作为渐近替代，推导条件似然，并研究条件最大似然估计和基于简化工作得分的拟最大似然估计。
ai.result: 证明了两种估计量在Doob变换律下的一致性和渐近正态性，渐近协方差分别由逆Fisher和逆Godambe信息矩阵决定，并给出了检验高阶出生机制存在性的实用一维检验。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理具有不可观测事件类型的聚合出生-死亡过程提供了严格的统计推断框架，尤其适用于流行病传播建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将Doob h-变换与拟似然结合，在事件类型缺失时仍能有效估计各机制贡献，并设计简单检验识别特定机制的存在。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于过程长期存活的假设，对于短时间或易灭绝过程可能不适用；拟似然估计的效率可能低于完全似然。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用遍历性替代过程简化似然计算，并通过信息矩阵区分估计量的精度，为复杂隐变量模型提供了可操作的推断思路。

en.tldr: Develops likelihood-based inference for finite-state birth-death processes with composite birth rates, applied to SIS epidemic models.
en.motivation: In SIS epidemic models, birth events arise from multiple mechanisms (e.g., pairwise and higher-order transmission), but only aggregate trajectories are observed, creating a deconvolution problem in event space.
en.method: Uses a Doob h-transformed Q-process as a time-homogeneous, ergodic surrogate, derives conditional likelihood, and studies conditional MLE and quasi-MLE based on a simplified working score.
en.result: Proves consistency and asymptotic normality for both estimators under the Doob-transform law, with asymptotic covariances given by inverse Fisher and inverse Godambe information matrices, and provides a one-dimensional test for higher-order birth mechanisms.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous statistical inference framework for aggregated birth-death processes with unmarked events, particularly useful in epidemic modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Combines Doob h-transform with quasi-likelihood to estimate contributions of each mechanism when event types are missing, and designs a simple test to detect specific mechanisms.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the assumption of long survival; may not apply to short-lived or extinction-prone processes; quasi-MLE may be less efficient than full likelihood.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverages an ergodic surrogate process to simplify likelihood computation and uses information matrices to distinguish estimator precision, offering a practical inference strategy for complex latent variable models.

papers.title: F\textsuperscript{2}LP-AP: Fast \& Flexible Label Propagation with Adaptive Propagation Kernel
papers.summary: Semi-supervised node classification is a foundational task in graph machine learning, yet state-of-the-art Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are hindered by significant computational overhead and reliance on strong homophily assumptions. Traditional GNNs require expensive iterative training and multi-layer message passing, while existing training-free methods, such as Label Propagation, lack adaptability to heterophilo\-us graph structures. This paper presents \textbf{F$^2$LP-AP} (Fast and Flexible Label Propagation with Adaptive Propagation Kernel), a training-free, computationally efficient framework that adapts to local graph topology. Our method constructs robust class prototypes via the geometric median and dynamically adjusts propagation parameters based on the Local Clustering Coefficient (LCC), enabling effective modeling of both homophilous and heterophilous graphs without gradient-based training. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmark datasets demonstrate that \textbf{F$^2$LP-AP} achieves competitive or superior accuracy compared to trained GNNs, while significantly outperforming existing baselines in computational efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、计算高效的标签传播框架F²LP-AP，通过几何中位数构建类原型并基于局部聚类系数自适应调整传播参数，在多种图上取得与训练GNN相当或更优的精度。
ai.motivation: 现有GNN计算开销大且依赖强同质性假设，而传统标签传播方法无法适应异质图结构。
ai.method: 利用几何中位数构建鲁棒类原型，根据局部聚类系数动态调整传播参数，实现无需梯度训练的自适应传播。
ai.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到或超过训练GNN的精度，计算效率显著优于现有基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种快速、灵活且无需训练的图节点分类方案，适合资源受限或需要快速部署的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部聚类系数作为传播参数的自适应依据，可能启发更多基于局部拓扑的图学习策略。
idea_spark.risk: 在极端异质或噪声较大的图上，几何中位数和LCC的鲁棒性可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 无需训练的方法在效率上的优势，可激励探索更多轻量级图学习范式。

en.tldr: Proposes F²LP-AP, a training-free and computationally efficient label propagation framework that constructs robust class prototypes via geometric median and adapts propagation parameters based on local clustering coefficient, achieving competitive accuracy with trained GNNs on diverse graphs.
en.motivation: Existing GNNs suffer from high computational cost and strong homophily assumptions, while traditional label propagation lacks adaptability to heterophilous graphs.
en.method: Constructs robust class prototypes using geometric median and dynamically adjusts propagation parameters based on local clustering coefficient, enabling adaptive propagation without gradient-based training.
en.result: Achieves competitive or superior accuracy compared to trained GNNs on multiple benchmark datasets, with significantly higher computational efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a fast, flexible, and training-free solution for graph node classification, suitable for resource-constrained or rapid deployment scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Using local clustering coefficient to adapt propagation parameters may inspire more local-topology-aware graph learning strategies.
idea_spark.risk: On extremely heterophilous or noisy graphs, the robustness of geometric median and LCC may degrade.
idea_spark.inspiration: The efficiency advantage of training-free methods can encourage exploration of more lightweight graph learning paradigms.

papers.title: Periodic homogenization of convolution type operators with irregular Lévy type tails
papers.summary: We establish the homogenization results for a class of nonlocal operators of convolution type with integrable jumping kernel $p$ multiplied by rapidly oscillating periodic or locally periodic coefficients. The associated measure $p(z)dz$ is assumed to belong to the domain of attraction of a symmetric $α$-stable law. We also assume that $p$ satisfies a pointwise Lévy type lower bound and an averaged annular upper bound for points bounded away from the origin, and that the local $L^1$ oscillation of $p$ decays faster at infinity than its local $L^1$-norm. Under these assumptions, we prove the resolvent convergence of the nonlocal operators and explicitly determine the corresponding homogenized nonlocal operator, which is shown to be comparable to the fractional Laplacian. The proof relies on compactness arguments and a refined analysis based on the annular integral upper bound and an $\varepsilon$-cube decomposition.

ai.tldr: 建立了卷积型非局部算子在具有不规则Lévy型尾部的跳跃核下的周期均匀化结果，证明了预解收敛并确定了均匀化算子与分数阶拉普拉斯算子相当。
ai.motivation: 研究具有快速振荡周期系数的非局部算子的均匀化行为，特别是跳跃核属于对称α-稳定吸引域的情形。
ai.method: 利用紧性论证、环形积分上界和ε-立方分解技术，结合点态Lévy型下界和平均环形上界假设。
ai.result: 证明了非局部算子的预解收敛，显式给出了均匀化算子，并证明其与分数阶拉普拉斯算子相当。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解具有不规则尾部行为的非局部扩散过程的宏观行为提供了数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将ε-立方分解与环形积分上界结合，处理跳跃核在无穷远处的振荡衰减。
idea_spark.risk: 假设条件较强（如点态下界），可能限制在更一般跳跃核上的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典周期均匀化理论出发，利用非局部算子的尺度特性设计分解策略。

zh.tldr: 建立了卷积型非局部算子在具有不规则Lévy型尾部的跳跃核下的周期均匀化结果，证明了预解收敛并确定了均匀化算子与分数阶拉普拉斯算子相当。
zh.motivation: 研究具有快速振荡周期系数的非局部算子的均匀化行为，特别是跳跃核属于对称α-稳定吸引域的情形。

zh.help_to_user: 为理解具有不规则尾部行为的非局部扩散过程的宏观行为提供了数学框架。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典周期均匀化理论出发，利用非局部算子的尺度特性设计分解策略。

en.tldr: Established periodic homogenization for convolution-type nonlocal operators with irregular Lévy tails, proving resolvent convergence and showing the homogenized operator is comparable to the fractional Laplacian.
en.motivation: To study homogenization of nonlocal operators with rapidly oscillating periodic coefficients, where the jump kernel belongs to the domain of attraction of a symmetric α-stable law.
en.method: Compactness arguments, refined annular integral upper bound, and ε-cube decomposition, combined with pointwise Lévy-type lower bound and averaged annular upper bound.
en.result: Proved resolvent convergence of the nonlocal operators, explicitly determined the homogenized operator, and showed it is comparable to the fractional Laplacian.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical framework for understanding macroscopic behavior of nonlocal diffusion processes with irregular tails.

idea_spark.idea: Combine ε-cube decomposition with annular integral upper bound to handle oscillatory decay of the jump kernel at infinity.
idea_spark.risk: Strong assumptions (e.g., pointwise lower bound) may limit applicability to more general jump kernels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from classical periodic homogenization theory, leveraging scaling properties of nonlocal operators to design decomposition strategies.

papers.title: Learning to count small and clustered objects with application to bacterial colonies
papers.summary: Automated bacterial colony counting from images is an important technique to obtain data required for the development of vaccines and antibiotics. However, bacterial colonies present unique machine vision challenges that affect counting, including (1) small physical size, (2) object clustering, (3) high data annotation cost, and (4) limited cross-species generalisation. While FamNet is an established object counting technique effective for clustered objects and costly data annotation, its effectiveness for small colony sizes and cross-species generalisation remains unknown. To address the first three challenges, we propose ACFamNet, an extension of FamNet that handles small and clustered objects using a novel region of interest pooling with alignment and optimised feature engineering. To address all four challenges above, we introduce ACFamNet Pro, which augments ACFamNet with multi-head attention and residual connections, enabling dynamic weighting of objects and improved gradient flow. Experiments show that ACFamNet Pro achieves a mean normalised absolute error (MNAE) of 9.64% under 5-fold cross-validation, outperforming ACFamNet and FamNet by 2.23% and 12.71%, respectively.

ai.tldr: 提出ACFamNet Pro模型，通过改进特征工程和注意力机制，有效解决了细菌菌落图像中小目标、聚类、标注成本高和跨物种泛化问题。
ai.motivation: 细菌菌落计数对疫苗和抗生素研发至关重要，但现有方法难以处理小尺寸、聚类、高标注成本和跨物种泛化四大挑战。
ai.method: 在FamNet基础上，ACFamNet引入对齐的感兴趣区域池化和优化特征工程处理小目标和聚类；ACFamNet Pro进一步增加多头注意力和残差连接，实现动态加权和梯度改善。
ai.result: ACFamNet Pro在5折交叉验证下平均归一化绝对误差（MNAE）为9.64%，比ACFamNet和FamNet分别降低2.23%和12.71%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种自动化、高精度的细菌菌落计数方法，可减少人工标注成本并提升跨物种泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将多头注意力机制与残差连接结合，用于动态加权小目标和改善梯度流，可推广至其他密集目标检测场景。
idea_spark.risk: 注意力机制可能增加计算复杂度，且对极端小目标或严重遮挡场景的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受FamNet启发，通过改进特征提取和注意力机制解决小目标聚类问题，提示在类似任务中可尝试类似架构增强。

en.tldr: Proposes ACFamNet Pro, which improves feature engineering and attention mechanisms to effectively address small object size, clustering, high annotation cost, and cross-species generalization in bacterial colony counting.
en.motivation: Bacterial colony counting is crucial for vaccine and antibiotic development, but existing methods struggle with small size, clustering, high annotation cost, and cross-species generalization.
en.method: Building on FamNet, ACFamNet introduces aligned ROI pooling and optimized feature engineering for small and clustered objects; ACFamNet Pro further adds multi-head attention and residual connections for dynamic weighting and improved gradient flow.
en.result: ACFamNet Pro achieves a mean normalized absolute error (MNAE) of 9.64% under 5-fold cross-validation, outperforming ACFamNet and FamNet by 2.23% and 12.71%, respectively.
en.help_to_user: Provides an automated, high-accuracy method for bacterial colony counting, reducing manual annotation cost and improving cross-species generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Combining multi-head attention with residual connections for dynamic weighting of small objects and improved gradient flow can be generalized to other dense object detection scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Attention mechanisms may increase computational complexity, and robustness to extremely small objects or severe occlusion needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by FamNet, improving feature extraction and attention mechanisms to address small and clustered objects suggests similar architectural enhancements for analogous tasks.

keywords_raw: region of interest pooling with alignment

papers.title: New inequalities for eigenvalues of the Dirichlet Laplacian on the hyperbolic space
papers.summary: In this paper, motivated by study on universal inequalities for eigenvalues of the Dirichlet Laplacian, we prove some new inequalities for eigenvalues of the Dirichlet Laplacian on the hyperbolic space. In particular, we verify Cheng's conjecture (Adv. Lect. Math. 37, 2017) up to loss of $ε$ for two special kinds of bounded domains in the hyperbolic space.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了双曲空间上Dirichlet拉普拉斯算子特征值的新不等式，并验证了Cheng猜想在两类特殊有界域上的ε损失版本。
ai.motivation: 受Dirichlet拉普拉斯算子特征值通用不等式研究的启发，旨在建立双曲空间上的新不等式并验证Cheng猜想。
ai.method: 利用双曲空间的几何性质和分析技巧，推导特征值的不等式关系。
ai.result: 得到了双曲空间上Dirichlet拉普拉斯算子特征值的新不等式，并验证了Cheng猜想在两类特殊有界域上的ε损失版本。
ai.help_to_user: 为双曲空间上的谱分析提供新的不等式工具，有助于理解特征值的几何约束。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Cheng猜想的验证扩展到更一般的双曲有界域，或研究其他曲率空间上的类似不等式。
idea_spark.risk: ε损失可能无法完全消除，或推广到一般域时遇到几何复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合双曲空间的对称性和曲率性质，可能发现更紧的特征值界。

zh.tldr: 本文证明了双曲空间上Dirichlet拉普拉斯算子特征值的新不等式，并验证了Cheng猜想在两类特殊有界域上的ε损失版本。
zh.motivation: 受Dirichlet拉普拉斯算子特征值通用不等式研究的启发，旨在建立双曲空间上的新不等式并验证Cheng猜想。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合双曲空间的对称性和曲率性质，可能发现更紧的特征值界。

en.tldr: This paper proves new inequalities for eigenvalues of the Dirichlet Laplacian on the hyperbolic space and verifies Cheng's conjecture up to loss of ε for two special kinds of bounded domains.
en.motivation: Motivated by universal inequalities for eigenvalues of the Dirichlet Laplacian, the aim is to establish new inequalities on the hyperbolic space and verify Cheng's conjecture.
en.method: Using geometric properties and analytical techniques of the hyperbolic space to derive eigenvalue inequalities.
en.result: New eigenvalue inequalities for the Dirichlet Laplacian on the hyperbolic space are obtained, and Cheng's conjecture is verified up to loss of ε for two special bounded domains.
en.help_to_user: Provides new inequality tools for spectral analysis on hyperbolic spaces, aiding understanding of geometric constraints on eigenvalues.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to extend the verification of Cheng's conjecture to more general hyperbolic bounded domains, or study similar inequalities on spaces of other curvatures.
idea_spark.risk: The ε loss may not be fully removable, or generalization to general domains may encounter geometric complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining symmetry and curvature properties of hyperbolic space may lead to tighter eigenvalue bounds.

papers.title: Blow-up phenomena for the constant Q/R-curvature equation
papers.summary: Let $n\ge 25$ be an integer. In this paper, we construct a smooth metric $g_{0}$ on $\mathbb{S}^n$ with the property that the set of metrics in the conformal class of $g_{0}$ having positive scalar curvature and positive constant quotient $Q/R$ is non-compact. Equivalently, we construct families of solutions exhibiting blow-up behavior   for the following equation \begin{align*}   P _{g_{0}}u- \frac{ (n+2 )(n-4 )}{4} u^{ \frac{2}{n-4}} L_{g_{0}}u^{ \frac{n-2}{n-4}} =0, \quad u>0\quad\text{on} \ \mathbb{S}^{n}, \end{align*}  where $P _{g_{0}}$ is the Paneitz operator and $ L_{g_{0}}=-Δ_{g_{0}} +\frac{n-2}{4(n-1 )}R_{g_{0}} $ is the conformal Laplacian of $ g_{0}$.

ai.tldr: 本文构造了球面上一个光滑度量，使得其共形类中具有正数量曲率和正常数Q/R比值的度量集合非紧，等价于构造了相应方程的解族并展示爆破行为。
ai.motivation: 研究高维球面上共形度量中Q/R曲率比值为常数时的紧性问题，揭示非紧现象的存在。
ai.method: 通过构造特定的光滑度量g0，并分析Paneitz算子和共形拉普拉斯算子相关的非线性方程，证明解族存在爆破。
ai.result: 对于n≥25，存在光滑度量使得正数量曲率且Q/R为正常数的共形度量集合非紧。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维共形几何中曲率方程解的非紧性与爆破机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用度量构造与非线性分析结合，证明共形类中度量集合的非紧性。
idea_spark.risk: 构造依赖于维度n≥25，低维情况可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Q/R曲率比值的常数条件与Paneitz算子的性质结合，可能启发新的几何不等式或紧性定理。

en.tldr: This paper constructs a smooth metric on the sphere such that the set of conformal metrics with positive scalar curvature and constant positive Q/R ratio is non-compact, equivalently constructing families of solutions exhibiting blow-up behavior for the associated equation.
en.motivation: To investigate the compactness issue for metrics with constant Q/R curvature ratio in the conformal class on high-dimensional spheres, revealing the existence of non-compactness.
en.method: By constructing a specific smooth metric g0 and analyzing the nonlinear equation involving the Paneitz operator and the conformal Laplacian, we prove that solution families blow up.
en.result: For n≥25, there exists a smooth metric such that the set of conformal metrics with positive scalar curvature and constant positive Q/R ratio is non-compact.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the non-compactness and blow-up mechanisms of solutions to curvature equations in high-dimensional conformal geometry.

idea_spark.idea: Combine metric construction with nonlinear analysis to prove non-compactness of the set of metrics in a conformal class.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies on dimension n≥25 and may fail in lower dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of constant Q/R ratio condition with properties of the Paneitz operator may inspire new geometric inequalities or compactness theorems.

papers.title: The Tentacles Landscape
papers.summary: Zhang and Strogatz [Phys. Rev. Lett. 127, 194101 (2021)] used high-dimensional simulations to argue that basins of attraction in the Kuramoto ring are octopus-like: their volume scales as $e^{-kq^2}$ in the winding number $q$, nearly all of it concentrated in filamentary tentacles rather than near the attractor. They conjecture this geometry to be common in high dimensions but note that high-dimensional simulations are unreliable. We prove every feature of the octopus picture rigorously for identical oscillators on a ring coupled by any smooth odd function strictly increasing on $(-π,π)$.

ai.tldr: 本文严格证明了Kuramoto环中吸引盆的章鱼状几何结构，即吸引盆体积随缠绕数指数衰减，且几乎全部集中在细长触须中。
ai.motivation: Zhang和Strogatz通过高维模拟推测吸引盆具有章鱼状结构，但高维模拟不可靠，需要严格证明。
ai.method: 对由任意光滑奇函数耦合的相同振子环进行严格数学分析，证明吸引盆体积随缠绕数平方指数衰减。
ai.result: 严格证明了吸引盆的章鱼状几何：体积按e^{-kq^2}缩放，几乎全部集中在触须中，而非吸引子附近。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维动力系统中吸引盆的几何结构，为非线性动力学和耦合振子网络提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他高维动力系统（如神经网络、生态网络）中吸引盆的类似几何结构。
idea_spark.risk: 严格证明可能依赖于特定耦合函数和对称性，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 高维模拟的不可靠性促使我们寻求严格数学证明，启发在复杂系统中结合模拟与理论分析。

en.tldr: This paper rigorously proves the octopus-like geometry of basins of attraction in the Kuramoto ring, where the basin volume decays exponentially with the winding number squared and is concentrated in thin tentacles.
en.motivation: Zhang and Strogatz conjectured the octopus-like structure based on high-dimensional simulations, but such simulations are unreliable, necessitating a rigorous proof.
en.method: A rigorous mathematical analysis is performed for a ring of identical oscillators coupled by any smooth odd function, proving the exponential decay of basin volume with winding number squared.
en.result: The octopus-like geometry is rigorously established: basin volume scales as e^{-kq^2}, with nearly all volume in tentacles far from the attractor.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for understanding basin geometry in high-dimensional dynamical systems, relevant to nonlinear dynamics and coupled oscillator networks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore similar basin geometry in other high-dimensional systems such as neural networks or ecological networks.
idea_spark.risk: The rigorous proof may rely on specific coupling functions and symmetries, limiting generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The unreliability of high-dimensional simulations motivates combining simulation with rigorous theory, inspiring hybrid approaches in complex systems.

papers.title: Homogeneous $\mathbb Z/2$-Harmonic Forms and Spinors on $\mathbb{R}^4$ from Regular 4-Polytopes
papers.summary: We describe novel local singularity models for $\mathbb Z/2$ harmonic 1-forms, self-dual 2-forms and spinors in dimension 4. These models are homogeneous versions on $\mathbb{R}^4$ whose singular sets are cones on the 1-skeletal of certain regular 4-dimensional polytopes.

ai.tldr: 本文描述了四维空间中Z/2调和1-形式、自对偶2-形式和旋量场的新的局部奇异性模型，这些模型是R^4上的齐次版本，其奇异集是某些正则四维多面体的一维骨架的锥。
ai.motivation: 探索四维空间中Z/2调和形式与旋量场的奇异性结构，特别是与正则多面体几何相关的齐次模型。
ai.method: 构造R^4上的齐次Z/2调和形式、自对偶2-形式和旋量场，其奇异集为四维正则多面体的一维骨架的锥。
ai.result: 得到了新的局部奇异性模型，将几何拓扑与多面体理论联系起来。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解四维空间中调和形式与旋量场的奇异性分类，以及正则多面体在几何分析中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用正则多面体的对称性构造具有特定奇异集的调和形式，可能用于研究四维流形的拓扑不变量。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能仅适用于特殊对称性，推广到一般流形时需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将多面体几何与微分形式奇异性结合，启发新的拓扑分析方法。

en.tldr: This paper describes new local singularity models for Z/2 harmonic 1-forms, self-dual 2-forms, and spinors in dimension 4. These are homogeneous versions on R^4 whose singular sets are cones on the 1-skeleton of certain regular 4-dimensional polytopes.
en.motivation: To explore singularity structures of Z/2 harmonic forms and spinors in 4 dimensions, particularly homogeneous models linked to regular polytope geometry.
en.method: Construct homogeneous Z/2 harmonic 1-forms, self-dual 2-forms, and spinors on R^4 with singular sets being cones on the 1-skeleton of regular 4-polytopes.
en.result: New local singularity models are obtained, connecting geometric topology with polytope theory.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the classification of singularities for harmonic forms and spinors in 4D, and the use of regular polytopes in geometric analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Use symmetries of regular polytopes to construct harmonic forms with prescribed singular sets, potentially for studying topological invariants of 4-manifolds.
idea_spark.risk: The models may rely on special symmetries; generalization to arbitrary manifolds requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining polytope geometry with differential form singularities inspires new topological analysis methods.

papers.title: Persistence and local extinction for superprocesses in random environments
papers.summary: We consider a super-Brownian motion $\{X_t, t\geq 0\}$ in a random environment described by a centered Gaussian field $\{W(t,x),t\geq 0, x\in\mathbb{R}^d\}$ whose correlation function is given by $\mathcal{C} (x,y)(t \wedge s)$. The process takes values in $\mathcal{M}(\mathbb{R}^d)$, the space of Radon measures on $\mathbb{R}^d$. It can be characterized through a conditional Laplace transform by a parabolic stochastic partial differential equation driven by $W(t, x)$. Suppose that $\mathcal{C} (x, y)\leq g(x-y)$ for some bounded positive function $g$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$ and the initial distribution of process $X$ is the Lebesgue measure $m$ on $\mathbb{R}^d$. We prove that for dimension $d\geq 3$, whenever $$   \sup_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d} \int_{\mathbb{R}^d} |x-y|^{2-d} g(y)dy< \frac{8 (d-2) π^{d/2}}{d 2^d Γ\left(d/2-1\right)}, $$ the distribution of $X_t$ converges weakly as $t \to \infty$ to a non-trivial invariant probability distribution $π^m$ on $\mathcal{M}(\mathbb{R}^d)$ with mean measure $m$. This result in particular gives an affirmative answer to Conjecture 1.4 of Mytnik and Xiong (Electron. J. Probab. 12: 1349-1378 (2007)). We further show that given $ Θ\in C^β(\mathbb{R}^d)$ $(β>1)$, when $\mathcal{C}(x,y)= a Θ(x-y)$ with $a$ being large enough, the superprocess $X$ suffers local extinction.

ai.tldr: 研究了随机环境中超布朗运动的持久性与局部灭绝性，给出了非平凡不变分布存在的充分条件，并证明了当噪声足够强时会发生局部灭绝。
ai.motivation: 验证Mytnik和Xiong提出的关于随机环境中超过程不变分布的猜想。
ai.method: 通过条件Laplace变换将过程与抛物型随机偏微分方程关联，利用核函数估计和测度收敛理论。
ai.result: 在d≥3且噪声相关函数满足一定积分条件时，过程分布弱收敛到非平凡不变分布；当噪声强度足够大时，过程发生局部灭绝。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机环境对超过程长期行为的影响，特别是持久性与灭绝的临界条件。

idea_spark.idea: 利用核函数积分条件刻画不变分布的存在性，可能适用于其他带噪声的偏微分方程系统。
idea_spark.risk: 条件中的积分上界可能难以在具体模型中验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 噪声强度与空间维度的相互作用是决定系统行为的关键，可启发类似问题的研究。

en.tldr: We study persistence and local extinction for super-Brownian motion in a random environment, establishing conditions for existence of a non-trivial invariant distribution and proving local extinction under strong noise.
en.motivation: To confirm Conjecture 1.4 of Mytnik and Xiong regarding invariant distributions for superprocesses in random environments.
en.method: The process is characterized via a conditional Laplace transform linked to a parabolic stochastic PDE; analysis uses kernel estimates and measure convergence.
en.result: For d≥3 and under an integral condition on the correlation function, the distribution converges weakly to a non-trivial invariant measure; when the noise is sufficiently strong, local extinction occurs.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into how random environments affect long-term behavior of superprocesses, especially persistence versus extinction.

idea_spark.idea: The integral condition on the kernel may serve as a general criterion for existence of invariant measures in stochastic PDEs.
idea_spark.risk: The explicit bound in the condition may be hard to verify in concrete models.
idea_spark.inspiration: The interplay between noise intensity and spatial dimension is crucial for determining system behavior, inspiring similar studies.

papers.title: Classification of solutions to a weighted singular fractional problem in the half space
papers.summary: We focus on the classification of positive solutions to $(-Δ)^s u=\frac{x_n^α}{u^γ}$ in the half space with $γ>0$, subject to the Dirichlet condition. We show that when $-2s<α<(γ-1)s$, all positive solutions exhibit one-dimensional symmetry and are monotone increasing in $x_n$. Moreover, we provide a complete classification of all such one-dimensional solutions via their ``asymptotic $s$-order slope". When $α$ lies outside this range, we demonstrate the nonexistence of global positive solutions.

ai.tldr: 研究半空间中加权奇异分数阶问题正解的分类，给出解的一维对称性和单调性条件，并完全分类所有一维解。
ai.motivation: 理解加权奇异分数阶方程在半空间中的正解结构，填补参数范围对解存在性和对称性的影响。
ai.method: 利用分数阶拉普拉斯算子的性质和能量方法，分析参数α与γ的关系，推导解的对称性和单调性，并通过渐近s阶斜率完成分类。
ai.result: 当-2s<α<(γ-1)s时，所有正解具有一维对称性且关于x_n单调递增；当α超出此范围时，不存在全局正解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供分数阶方程解的分类方法，可用于相关偏微分方程或数学物理问题的研究。

idea_spark.idea: 探索不同边界条件或更高维空间中的类似分类结果。
idea_spark.risk: 参数范围严格，推广时可能遇到技术困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值模拟验证理论分类的完备性。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值模拟验证理论分类的完备性。

en.tldr: Classification of positive solutions to a weighted singular fractional problem in the half space, showing one-dimensional symmetry and monotonicity under certain parameter ranges, and complete classification via asymptotic s-order slope.
en.motivation: To understand the structure of positive solutions for weighted singular fractional equations in the half space, filling the gap of parameter influence on existence and symmetry.
en.method: Using properties of fractional Laplacian and energy methods, analyzing the relationship between parameters α and γ, deriving symmetry and monotonicity, and classifying via asymptotic s-order slope.
en.result: When -2s<α<(γ-1)s, all positive solutions are one-dimensional symmetric and monotone increasing in x_n; when α is outside this range, no global positive solution exists.
en.help_to_user: Provides a classification method for solutions of fractional equations, useful for research in related PDEs or mathematical physics.

idea_spark.idea: Explore similar classification results under different boundary conditions or higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Parameter ranges are strict; generalization may encounter technical difficulties.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine numerical simulations to verify the completeness of theoretical classification.

papers.title: Infinite time blow-up and slow decay for the six dimensional energy-critical heat equation with self-similarly decaying initial data
papers.summary: We consider the six dimensional energy-critical semilinear heat equation with self-similarly decaying initial data. Our main result shows the existence of sign-changing solutions that exhibit infinite-time blow-up and nonnegative solutions that decay strictly more slowly than the self-similar rate. Moreover, the blow-up and decay rates are not uniquely determined by the decay rate of the initial data, but exhibit a certain flexibility depending on the construction. The proof is based on gluing suitably rescaled bubbles to forward self-similar solutions.

ai.tldr: 研究六维能量临界热方程，发现自相似衰减初值可导致无限时间爆破或慢于自相似速率的衰减，且速率不唯一。
ai.motivation: 探索高维能量临界热方程解的长时间行为，特别是自相似衰减初值下解的爆破与衰减可能性。
ai.method: 通过将适当重缩放的泡与向前自相似解粘合来构造解。
ai.result: 存在变号解无限时间爆破，非负解衰减慢于自相似速率，且速率具有灵活性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维非线性热方程解的长时间动力学，特别是爆破与衰减的非唯一性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用自相似解作为基础，通过局部调整构造具有不同长时间行为的解。
idea_spark.risk: 构造依赖于特定维度和临界性，推广到其他情形可能需额外条件。

zh.motivation: 探索高维能量临界热方程解的长时间行为，特别是自相似衰减初值下解的爆破与衰减可能性。
zh.method: 通过将适当重缩放的泡与向前自相似解粘合来构造解。
zh.result: 存在变号解无限时间爆破，非负解衰减慢于自相似速率，且速率具有灵活性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维非线性热方程解的长时间动力学，特别是爆破与衰减的非唯一性。

en.tldr: For the six-dimensional energy-critical heat equation, self-similarly decaying initial data can lead to infinite-time blow-up or decay slower than the self-similar rate, with rates not uniquely determined.
en.motivation: To explore the long-time behavior of solutions to high-dimensional energy-critical heat equations, especially under self-similarly decaying initial data.
en.method: Construction by gluing suitably rescaled bubbles to forward self-similar solutions.
en.result: Existence of sign-changing solutions blowing up in infinite time and nonnegative solutions decaying slower than the self-similar rate, with flexibility in the rates.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the long-time dynamics of solutions to high-dimensional nonlinear heat equations, particularly the non-uniqueness of blow-up and decay rates.

idea_spark.idea: Use self-similar solutions as a base and locally adjust to construct solutions with different long-time behaviors.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies on specific dimension and criticality; generalization may require additional conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The flexibility in blow-up and decay rates suggests a rich solution space, potentially useful for designing methods to control solution behavior.

papers.title: Comparison principles and long time behavior for a diffusive Energy Balance Model with vertical resolution
papers.summary: We study a two-layer one-dimensional energy balance model, which allows for vertical energy exchanges between a surface layer and the atmosphere, as well as meridional energy transport across latitudes via a diffusion law. The evolution equations of the surface temperature and the atmospheric temperature are coupled by exchange of infrared radiation as well as other non-radiative energy exchanges. The energy enters the system as solar radiation, which is partially absorbed and partially reflected by the two layers. The system is then composed of two degenerate parabolic equations coupled by nonlinear terms, the growth of these terms being crucial for the choice of the functional setting.   An essential parameter is the absorptivity of the atmosphere, denoted $\varepsilon _a$, whose value depends critically on greenhouse gases. We prove that blow up in finite time occurs if $\varepsilon _a >2$, while global existence of solutions and the existence of a global attractor hold when $\varepsilon _a \in (0,2)$.   Proofs are based on comparison principles that derive from the cooperative structure of the problem, and that provide invariant rectangles for smooth initial conditions, and on regularity properties.

ai.tldr: 研究了一个具有垂直分辨率的扩散能量平衡模型，分析了大气吸收率对解长期行为的影响。
ai.motivation: 理解温室气体吸收率如何影响气候系统的稳定性和长期演化。
ai.method: 利用比较原理和合作系统结构，证明解的存在性、爆破和全局吸引子。
ai.result: 当吸收率大于2时解在有限时间爆破，小于2时全局存在且存在全局吸引子。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了气候模型中关键参数临界值的数学证明，有助于评估温室效应阈值。

idea_spark.idea: 将吸收率临界值2与实际温室气体浓度关联，建立数学预警指标。

en.tldr: A diffusive two-layer energy balance model is studied, focusing on how atmospheric absorptivity affects long-time behavior. Finite-time blow-up occurs when absorptivity >2, while global existence and attractor hold for absorptivity in (0,2).
en.motivation: To understand the impact of greenhouse gas absorptivity on climate system stability and long-term evolution.
en.method: Comparison principles and cooperative structure are used to prove existence, blow-up, and existence of a global attractor.
en.result: Blow-up in finite time for absorptivity >2; global existence and global attractor for absorptivity in (0,2).
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical thresholds for a key climate parameter, aiding in greenhouse effect assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Link the critical absorptivity value 2 to actual greenhouse gas concentrations to create a mathematical early-warning indicator.
idea_spark.risk: The two-layer simplification may miss vertical structure details; real climate is more complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using cooperative structure to construct invariant rectangles offers a general analysis framework for nonlinear coupled PDEs.

papers.title: The Mihail-Vazirani conjecture and strong edge-expansion in random $0/1$ polytopes
papers.summary: We study the edge-expansion of the graph of a random $0/1$ polytope $P^d_p$, defined as the convex hull of a random subset of the points in $\{0,1\}^d$ where every point is retained independently and with probability $p$. This problem was introduced more than twenty years ago in a work of Gillmann and Kaibel, and has been extensively studied ever since.   We prove that, for every fixed $\varepsilon>0$ and every $p\in(0,1-\varepsilon]$, with high probability the graph of $P^d_p$ has edge-expansion $Θ(d)$. This improves the previously best known bound due to Ferber, Krivelevich, Sales and Samotij, and verifies, in a strong form, the celebrated Mihail-Vazirani conjecture for random $0/1$ polytopes. Although the expansion factor $Θ(d)$ is typically best possible for $p\ge 1/2+\varepsilon$, we also show that the behaviour changes drastically at $p=1/2$. Namely, for every fixed $\varepsilon>0$ and every integer $k\ge 2$, if $p\le 1/2-\varepsilon$, then with high probability the graph of $P^d_p$ has edge-expansion $Ω(d^k)$. Thus, random $0/1$ polytopes exhibit an interesting phase transition at $p=1/2$.

ai.tldr: 证明了随机0/1多面体图的边扩张在p≤1/2时呈Θ(d)或更大，验证了Mihail-Vazirani猜想。
ai.motivation: 研究随机0/1多面体图的边扩张性质，验证Mihail-Vazirani猜想。
ai.method: 利用概率方法和组合分析，对随机保留的{0,1}^d子集的凸包图进行边扩张下界估计。
ai.result: 对于固定ε>0和p∈(0,1-ε]，高概率下边扩张为Θ(d)；当p≤1/2-ε时，边扩张为Ω(d^k)。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了随机多面体图扩张的精确界，有助于理解高维凸包的结构性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用p=1/2处的相变，设计基于边扩张的随机算法或网络可靠性分析。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于特定随机模型，实际应用时需验证条件是否满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 随机多面体图的扩张性质可能启发新型图嵌入或采样策略。

en.tldr: Proves that edge-expansion of random 0/1 polytope graphs is Θ(d) for p≤1/2, verifying the Mihail-Vazirani conjecture in a strong form.
en.motivation: To study edge-expansion of random 0/1 polytope graphs and verify the Mihail-Vazirani conjecture.
en.method: Uses probabilistic methods and combinatorial analysis to bound edge-expansion of convex hulls of random subsets of {0,1}^d.
en.result: For fixed ε>0 and p∈(0,1-ε], with high probability edge-expansion is Θ(d); for p≤1/2-ε, it is Ω(d^k).
en.help_to_user: Provides sharp bounds on edge-expansion of random polytopes, aiding understanding of high-dimensional convex hull structure.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the phase transition at p=1/2 to design random algorithms or network reliability analyses based on edge-expansion.
idea_spark.risk: Results depend on specific random model; practical applications must verify conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Expansion properties of random polytope graphs may inspire novel graph embedding or sampling strategies.

papers.title: Read--Shockley formula for a general Bravais lattice in two dimensions
papers.summary: In this note we consider a two-dimensional semi-discrete dislocation energy and propose a simple and physically motivated construction for the grain boundary between two crystal grains with a small orientation difference. In the case of a general Bravais lattice, the energy of this construction matches the logarithmic scaling predicted by Read and Shockley.

ai.tldr: 本文针对二维半离散位错能量，提出了一种简单且物理动机明确的晶界构造方法，适用于一般布拉维晶格，并验证了其能量与Read-Shockley对数标度一致。
ai.motivation: 为一般二维布拉维晶格中具有小取向差的晶界提供一种物理上合理的能量构造，并验证其与经典Read-Shockley公式的对数标度匹配。
ai.method: 基于半离散位错能量模型，针对小取向差晶界设计了一种构造方案，并分析了其能量标度行为。
ai.result: 该构造的能量在一般布拉维晶格下实现了Read-Shockley预测的对数标度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解二维晶界能量的标度行为，为位错和晶界理论提供一般性构造工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用半离散模型简化晶界能量计算，避免全离散的复杂性。
idea_spark.risk: 构造的物理合理性可能依赖于小取向差假设，大角度晶界适用性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典Read-Shockley公式出发，通过半离散化实现一般晶格的理论扩展。

en.tldr: This note proposes a simple and physically motivated construction for grain boundaries with small misorientation in a general two-dimensional Bravais lattice, showing that its energy matches the logarithmic scaling predicted by Read and Shockley.
en.motivation: To provide a physically sound energy construction for grain boundaries with small orientation differences in general 2D Bravais lattices, consistent with the classical Read-Shockley formula.
en.method: A construction based on a semi-discrete dislocation energy model is designed for small-angle grain boundaries, and its energy scaling is analyzed.
en.result: The construction achieves the logarithmic scaling predicted by Read and Shockley for general Bravais lattices.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the scaling behavior of grain boundary energies in 2D and provides a general construction tool for dislocation and grain boundary theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use a semi-discrete model to simplify grain boundary energy calculations, avoiding full discreteness.
idea_spark.risk: The physical plausibility may rely on the small misorientation assumption; applicability to large-angle boundaries needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extend the classical Read-Shockley formula to general lattices via semi-discretization.

papers.title: Bounding Transient Instability in Sensor Data Injected Nonlinear Stochastic Flight Dynamics
papers.summary: Transient instability in nonlinear stochastic dynamical systems is a fundamental limitation in safety-critical aerospace applications, particularly during powered descent and landing where failure is driven by finite-time excursions rather than asymptotic divergence. Classical notions of mean-square or asymptotic stability are therefore insufficient for certification and design. This paper develops a logarithmic-norm-based framework for finite-time transient stability analysis of nonlinear Ito stochastic differential equations. The approach extends matrix measures to nonlinear mappings in a Lipschitz sense, enabling efficient characterization of instantaneous perturbation growth without local linearization. Using Ito calculus, bounds on the mean and variance of transient growth are derived, providing conditions for non-positive finite-time mean growth and probabilistic bounds on instability events. The analysis highlights a key distinction between mean and sample-path behavior, showing that stability in expectation does not guarantee pathwise finite-time safety, and that almost-sure transient stability cannot generally be ensured under stochastic diffusion. The framework is extended to data-constrained stochastic dynamics in navigation and estimation, revealing a trade-off between estimation consistency and transient robustness due to continuous data injection. Demonstrations with flight-like lunar lander telemetry show that similar mean trajectories can exhibit significantly different transient stability behaviour, and that mission failure correlates with accumulation of transient instability over short critical intervals. These results motivate probabilistic finite-time stability metrics for safety-critical autonomous systems.

ai.tldr: 提出基于对数范数的框架，分析非线性随机微分方程的有限时间瞬态稳定性，并揭示数据注入对瞬态鲁棒性的影响。
ai.motivation: 经典均方或渐近稳定性不足以评估安全关键航空航天系统中由有限时间偏离导致的故障。
ai.method: 将矩阵测度扩展到Lipschitz意义下的非线性映射，结合伊藤微积分推导瞬态增长的均值和方差界限。
ai.result: 均值稳定不能保证路径安全；数据注入在估计一致性与瞬态鲁棒性之间存在权衡；月面着陆器遥测显示相似均值轨迹的瞬态稳定性差异显著。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机动力学中瞬态不稳定的机理，并为安全关键系统设计提供概率有限时间稳定性指标。

idea_spark.idea: 将瞬态稳定性指标嵌入在线控制或故障检测算法，实时评估任务风险。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖Lipschitz常数，高维或强非线性系统可能难以精确估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴矩阵测度在确定性系统中的应用，将其随机化并用于有限时间分析。

en.tldr: Proposes a logarithmic-norm-based framework for finite-time transient stability analysis of nonlinear stochastic differential equations, revealing the impact of data injection on transient robustness.
en.motivation: Classical mean-square or asymptotic stability is insufficient for safety-critical aerospace applications where failure is driven by finite-time excursions.
en.method: Extends matrix measures to nonlinear mappings in a Lipschitz sense, using Ito calculus to derive bounds on mean and variance of transient growth.
en.result: Stability in expectation does not guarantee pathwise safety; data injection introduces a trade-off between estimation consistency and transient robustness; lunar lander telemetry shows significant differences in transient stability despite similar mean trajectories.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand mechanisms of transient instability in stochastic dynamics and motivates probabilistic finite-time stability metrics for safety-critical system design.

idea_spark.idea: Embed transient stability metrics into online control or fault detection algorithms to assess mission risk in real time.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on Lipschitz constants, which may be difficult to estimate accurately in high-dimensional or strongly nonlinear systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from matrix measures used in deterministic systems, randomizing them for finite-time analysis.

papers.title: Self-Aware Vector Embeddings for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Neuroscience-Inspired Framework for Temporal, Confidence-Weighted, and Relational Knowledge
papers.summary: Modern retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems treat vector embeddings as static, context-free artifacts: an embedding has no notion of when it was created, how trustworthy its source is, or which other embeddings depend on it. This flattening of knowledge has a measurable cost: recent work on VersionRAG reports that conventional RAG achieves only 58% accuracy on versioned technical queries, because retrieval returns semantically similar but temporally invalid content. We propose SmartVector, a framework that augments dense embeddings with three explicit properties -- temporal awareness, confidence decay, and relational awareness -- and a five-stage lifecycle modeled on hippocampal-neocortical memory consolidation. A retrieval pipeline replaces pure cosine similarity with a four-signal score that mixes semantic relevance, temporal validity, live confidence, and graph-relational importance. A background consolidation agent detects contradictions, builds dependency edges, and propagates updates along those edges as graph-neural-network-style messages. Confidence is governed by a closed-form function combining an Ebbinghaus-style exponential decay, user-feedback reconsolidation, and logarithmic access reinforcement. We formalize the model, relate it to temporal knowledge graph embedding, agentic memory architectures, and uncertainty-aware RAG, and present a reference implementation. On a reproducible synthetic versioned-policy benchmark of 258 vectors and 138 queries, SmartVector roughly doubles top-1 accuracy over plain cosine RAG (62.0% vs. 31.0% on a held-out split), drops stale-answer rate from 35.0% to 13.3%, cuts Expected Calibration Error by nearly 2x (0.244 vs. 0.470), reduces re-embedding cost per single-word edit by 77%, and is robust across contradiction-injection rates from 0% to 75%.

ai.tldr: 提出SmartVector框架，为向量嵌入增加时间感知、置信度衰减和关系感知三种显式属性，并模拟海马-新皮质的记忆巩固过程，显著提升检索增强生成在版本化查询上的准确性和鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有RAG系统将向量嵌入视为静态、无上下文的表示，缺乏时间、置信度和依赖关系信息，导致在版本化技术查询中准确率仅58%，且易返回过时或矛盾内容。
ai.method: 设计五阶段生命周期（编码、检索、整合、巩固、查询），检索时结合语义相关性、时间有效性、实时置信度和图关系重要性四信号评分；背景巩固代理检测矛盾、构建依赖边并传播更新；置信度由Ebbinghaus指数衰减、用户反馈再巩固和对数访问强化组成的闭式函数控制。
ai.result: 在合成版本化策略基准上，SmartVector将top-1准确率从31.0%提升至62.0%，过时回答率从35.0%降至13.3%，期望校准误差从0.470降至0.244，单词编辑重嵌入成本降低77%，且对矛盾注入率0%-75%鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户构建更智能的RAG系统，使其能感知知识的时间有效性、来源可信度和依赖关系，从而在动态知识场景中提供更准确、一致的回答。

idea_spark.idea: 将类似的生命周期和四信号评分应用于多模态RAG，例如结合图像的时间戳和来源可信度，或用于科学文献的版本追踪。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖合成基准验证，真实场景中知识版本变化更复杂，置信度函数参数需针对不同领域调优；图关系维护可能带来额外计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从神经科学记忆巩固机制获得灵感，将海马-新皮质的双系统记忆模型映射到RAG的短期和长期知识管理，启发更多生物启发式AI架构。

zh.tldr: 提出SmartVector框架，为向量嵌入增加时间感知、置信度衰减和关系感知三种显式属性，并模拟海马-新皮质的记忆巩固过程，显著提升检索增强生成在版本化查询上的准确性和鲁棒性。
zh.motivation: 现有RAG系统将向量嵌入视为静态、无上下文的表示，缺乏时间、置信度和依赖关系信息，导致在版本化技术查询中准确率仅58%，且易返回过时或矛盾内容。
zh.method: 设计五阶段生命周期（编码、检索、整合、巩固、查询），检索时结合语义相关性、时间有效性、实时置信度和图关系重要性四信号评分；背景巩固代理检测矛盾、构建依赖边并传播更新；置信度由Ebbinghaus指数衰减、用户反馈再巩固和对数访问强化组成的闭式函数控制。
zh.result: 在合成版本化策略基准上，SmartVector将top-1准确率从31.0%提升至62.0%，过时回答率从35.0%降至13.3%，期望校准误差从0.470降至0.244，单词编辑重嵌入成本降低77%，且对矛盾注入率0%-75%鲁棒。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户构建更智能的RAG系统，使其能感知知识的时间有效性、来源可信度和依赖关系，从而在动态知识场景中提供更准确、一致的回答。

idea_spark.idea: 将类似的生命周期和四信号评分应用于多模态RAG，例如结合图像的时间戳和来源可信度，或用于科学文献的版本追踪。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖合成基准验证，真实场景中知识版本变化更复杂，置信度函数参数需针对不同领域调优；图关系维护可能带来额外计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从神经科学记忆巩固机制获得灵感，将海马-新皮质的双系统记忆模型映射到RAG的短期和长期知识管理，启发更多生物启发式AI架构。

en.tldr: Proposes SmartVector, a framework that augments dense embeddings with temporal awareness, confidence decay, and relational awareness, mimicking hippocampal-neocortical memory consolidation, significantly improving retrieval-augmented generation accuracy and robustness on versioned queries.
en.motivation: Existing RAG systems treat vector embeddings as static, context-free artifacts, lacking temporal, confidence, and dependency information, leading to only 58% accuracy on versioned technical queries and frequent retrieval of outdated or contradictory content.
en.method: Designs a five-stage lifecycle (encode, retrieve, integrate, consolidate, query); retrieval uses a four-signal score mixing semantic relevance, temporal validity, live confidence, and graph-relational importance; a background consolidation agent detects contradictions, builds dependency edges, and propagates updates; confidence is governed by a closed-form function combining Ebbinghaus exponential decay, user-feedback reconsolidation, and logarithmic access reinforcement.
en.result: On a synthetic versioned-policy benchmark, SmartVector roughly doubles top-1 accuracy from 31.0% to 62.0%, reduces stale-answer rate from 35.0% to 13.3%, cuts Expected Calibration Error from 0.470 to 0.244, reduces re-embedding cost per single-word edit by 77%, and is robust across contradiction-injection rates from 0% to 75%.
en.help_to_user: Helps users build smarter RAG systems that are aware of knowledge temporality, source trustworthiness, and dependencies, thus providing more accurate and consistent answers in dynamic knowledge scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Apply a similar lifecycle and four-signal scoring to multimodal RAG, e.g., incorporating image timestamps and source credibility, or for version tracking in scientific literature.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on synthetic benchmark validation; real-world knowledge version changes are more complex, confidence function parameters need domain-specific tuning; graph relation maintenance may incur additional computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by neuroscience memory consolidation mechanisms, mapping the hippocampal-neocortical dual-system memory model to short-term and long-term knowledge management in RAG, inspiring more bio-inspired AI architectures.

papers.title: Text-to-Distribution Prediction with Quantile Tokens and Neighbor Context
papers.summary: Many applications of LLM-based text regression require predicting a full conditional distribution rather than a single point value. We study distributional regression under empirical-quantile supervision, where each input is paired with multiple observed quantile outcomes, and the target distribution is represented by a dense grid of quantiles. We address two key limitations of current approaches: the lack of local grounding for distribution estimates, and the reliance on shared representations that create an indirect bottleneck between inputs and quantile outputs. In this paper, we introduce Quantile Token Regression, which, to our knowledge, is the first work to insert dedicated quantile tokens into the input sequence, enabling direct input-output pathways for each quantile through self-attention. We further augment these quantile tokens with retrieval, incorporating semantically similar neighbor instances and their empirical distributions to ground predictions with local evidence from similar instances. We also provide the first theoretical analysis of loss functions for quantile regression, clarifying which distributional objectives each optimizes. Experiments on the Inside Airbnb and StackSample benchmark datasets with LLMs ranging from 1.7B to 14B parameters show that quantile tokens with neighbors consistently outperform baselines (~4 points lower MAPE and 2x narrower prediction intervals), with especially large gains on smaller and more challenging datasets where quantile tokens produce substantially sharper and more accurate distributions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于分位数令牌和邻居上下文的文本到分布预测方法，在LLM回归任务中生成完整条件分布。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM文本回归方法只能预测单点值，且缺乏局部证据支撑，共享表示造成输入与分位数输出间的间接瓶颈。
ai.method: 在输入序列中插入专用分位数令牌，通过自注意力建立直接输入-输出路径；并检索语义相似的邻居实例及其经验分布来增强预测。
ai.result: 在Inside Airbnb和StackSample数据集上，1.7B至14B参数的LLM实验显示，该方法MAPE降低约4点，预测区间宽度减半，分布更尖锐准确。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从文本输入预测完整概率分布，适用于不确定性量化、风险分析等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将分位数令牌与检索增强结合，使模型能直接利用相似实例的分布信息，避免间接瓶颈。
idea_spark.risk: 检索依赖外部数据库质量，且分位数令牌数量增加可能带来计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受分位数回归和检索增强生成（RAG）启发，将离散分位数点作为可学习令牌融入自注意力机制。

zh.result: 在Inside Airbnb和StackSample数据集上，1.7B至14B参数的LLM实验显示，该方法MAPE降低约4点，预测区间宽度减半，分布更尖锐准确。

en.tldr: Proposes a text-to-distribution prediction method using quantile tokens and neighbor context to generate full conditional distributions in LLM regression tasks.
en.motivation: Existing LLM text regression methods only predict point values, lack local evidence, and suffer from an indirect bottleneck between inputs and quantile outputs due to shared representations.
en.method: Inserts dedicated quantile tokens into the input sequence for direct input-output pathways via self-attention, and retrieves semantically similar neighbor instances with their empirical distributions to ground predictions.
en.result: On Inside Airbnb and StackSample datasets with LLMs from 1.7B to 14B parameters, the method reduces MAPE by ~4 points, halves prediction interval width, and yields sharper, more accurate distributions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users predict full probability distributions from text inputs, useful for uncertainty quantification and risk analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combines quantile tokens with retrieval augmentation to directly leverage distribution information from similar instances, avoiding indirect bottlenecks.
idea_spark.risk: Retrieval depends on external database quality, and increasing the number of quantile tokens may incur computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by quantile regression and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), embedding discrete quantile points as learnable tokens into self-attention.

papers.title: The Ising Model on a Two-Community Stochastic Block Model
papers.summary: We study the Ising model on a two-community stochastic block model, where $n$ spins are split into two equal groups with inter-community interaction parameter $α_n\in[0,1]$. We provide a complete characterization of the phase diagram and show that, almost surely with respect to the graph realization, the model undergoes a uniqueness/non-uniqueness phase transition of the Gibbs measure. In particular, in the supercritical regime, the law of the magnetization vector of the two communities converges to a mixture of Dirac measures that, depending on whether $α_n\gg 1/n$ or $α_n\lesssim 1/n$, is supported on two or four points, with possibly different weights. In the uniqueness region, we further analyze the fluctuations of the magnetization vector: in the subcritical regime, we prove a quenched central limit theorem under the classical $\sqrt{n}$ scaling, while at criticality we establish non-Gaussian fluctuations on the smaller scale $n^{1/4}$.

ai.tldr: 研究了两社区随机块模型上的伊辛模型，给出了相图的完整刻画，并证明了吉布斯测度的唯一性/非唯一性相变。
ai.motivation: 理解随机图结构对伊辛模型相变行为的影响，特别是社区结构如何改变磁化向量的分布。
ai.method: 利用随机块模型的图实现几乎必然性质，分析磁化向量的极限分布，并在不同参数区域建立中心极限定理和非高斯涨落。
ai.result: 在超临界区域，磁化向量收敛到两个或四个狄拉克测度的混合；在次临界区域，有淬火中心极限定理；在临界点，涨落尺度为n^{1/4}且非高斯。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究社区结构对统计物理模型的影响提供了严格的数学框架，可用于网络数据分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用随机块模型的多尺度结构，设计更高效的社区检测算法。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于对称社区假设，实际网络可能不对称。
idea_spark.inspiration: 临界涨落的非高斯性可能为区分社区结构提供新的统计检验方法。

zh.tldr: 研究了两社区随机块模型上的伊辛模型，给出了相图的完整刻画，并证明了吉布斯测度的唯一性/非唯一性相变。
zh.motivation: 理解随机图结构对伊辛模型相变行为的影响，特别是社区结构如何改变磁化向量的分布。

zh.help_to_user: 为研究社区结构对统计物理模型的影响提供了严格的数学框架，可用于网络数据分析。

idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于对称社区假设，实际网络可能不对称。
idea_spark.inspiration: 临界涨落的非高斯性可能为区分社区结构提供新的统计检验方法。

en.tldr: We study the Ising model on a two-community stochastic block model, providing a complete phase diagram and proving uniqueness/non-uniqueness transition of the Gibbs measure.
en.motivation: To understand how random graph structure, especially community structure, affects the phase transition behavior of the Ising model and the distribution of the magnetization vector.
en.method: Using almost sure properties with respect to graph realization, we analyze the limiting distribution of the magnetization vector and establish central limit theorems and non-Gaussian fluctuations in different regimes.
en.result: In the supercritical regime, the magnetization vector converges to a mixture of two or four Dirac measures; in the subcritical regime, a quenched central limit theorem holds; at criticality, fluctuations are on the scale n^{1/4} and non-Gaussian.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for studying the impact of community structure on statistical physics models, applicable to network data analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the multi-scale structure of stochastic block models to design more efficient community detection algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on symmetric community assumption; real networks may be asymmetric.
idea_spark.inspiration: Non-Gaussian critical fluctuations may offer new statistical tests for distinguishing community structures.

papers.title: Generalised Langevin Dynamics: Significance and Limitations of the Projection Operator Formalism
papers.summary: We discuss some mathematical aspects of the Mori-Zwanzig projection operator formalism. The core of the Mori-Zwanzig formalism is the generalised Langevin equation, which is typically derived from the Dyson-Duhamel identity. We derive the projection operator formalism for Mori's projection by means of semigroup theory, and we illustrate where rigorous methods fail for the case of Zwanzig's projection. For bounded perturbations of the time-evolution operator (e.g. for Mori's projection), the Dyson-Duhamel identity coincides with the variation of constants formula. For unbounded perturbations (e.g. for Zwanzigs's projection), the Dyson-Duhamel identity should be considered an equation for the orthogonal dynamics, for which the existence of unique solutions has yet to be established. Then we recall that all properties of Mori's generalised Langevin equation follow directly from the well-posedness of Volterra equations, irrespective of the projection operator formalism. Further, we discuss the use of Mori's generalised Langevin equation as a coarse-grained model. Finally, we illustrate that the memory term is a coupling term that is not necessarily related to memory. To this end, we introduce projections onto subspaces of 'fast' and 'slow' variables that are associated with the spectral decomposition of skew-adjoint operators. For these projections, the memory term vanishes.

ai.tldr: 本文从数学角度讨论了Mori-Zwanzig投影算子形式体系，指出广义Langevin方程的核心是Volterra方程的可解性，并揭示了记忆项本质上是耦合项而非真正的记忆效应。
ai.motivation: 澄清投影算子形式体系的数学基础，特别是Mori投影与Zwanzig投影在严格性上的差异。
ai.method: 利用半群理论推导Mori投影形式，分析Dyson-Duhamel恒等式在有界/无界扰动下的适用性，并引入谱分解构造快慢变量子空间。
ai.result: Mori广义Langevin方程的所有性质可直接从Volterra方程的适定性得出；对于无界扰动，正交动力学的唯一解存在性尚未建立；记忆项可因投影选择而消失。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解投影算子形式体系的数学限制，避免在粗粒化建模中误将记忆项解释为物理记忆。

idea_spark.idea: 利用谱分解构造无记忆投影，设计更高效的粗粒化模拟方案。
idea_spark.risk: 无界扰动下正交动力学的解存在性未证明，可能限制某些系统的应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 记忆项的可消除性启发我们重新审视粗粒化模型中“记忆”的物理含义。

zh.tldr: 本文从数学角度讨论了Mori-Zwanzig投影算子形式体系，指出广义Langevin方程的核心是Volterra方程的可解性，并揭示了记忆项本质上是耦合项而非真正的记忆效应。
zh.motivation: 澄清投影算子形式体系的数学基础，特别是Mori投影与Zwanzig投影在严格性上的差异。
zh.method: 利用半群理论推导Mori投影形式，分析Dyson-Duhamel恒等式在有界/无界扰动下的适用性，并引入谱分解构造快慢变量子空间。
zh.result: Mori广义Langevin方程的所有性质可直接从Volterra方程的适定性得出；对于无界扰动，正交动力学的唯一解存在性尚未建立；记忆项可因投影选择而消失。

idea_spark.idea: 利用谱分解构造无记忆投影，设计更高效的粗粒化模拟方案。
idea_spark.risk: 无界扰动下正交动力学的解存在性未证明，可能限制某些系统的应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 记忆项的可消除性启发我们重新审视粗粒化模型中“记忆”的物理含义。

en.tldr: This paper discusses mathematical aspects of the Mori-Zwanzig projection operator formalism, showing that the generalized Langevin equation's properties follow from Volterra equation well-posedness, and that the memory term is a coupling term not necessarily related to memory.
en.motivation: To clarify the mathematical foundations of the projection operator formalism, especially the differences in rigor between Mori's and Zwanzig's projections.
en.method: Derive Mori's projection using semigroup theory, analyze the Dyson-Duhamel identity for bounded/unbounded perturbations, and construct fast-slow variable subspaces via spectral decomposition.
en.result: All properties of Mori's GLE follow from Volterra equation well-posedness; for unbounded perturbations, existence of unique solutions for orthogonal dynamics remains unproven; the memory term can vanish for suitable projections.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the mathematical limitations of the projection operator formalism, avoiding misinterpretation of the memory term as physical memory in coarse-grained models.

idea_spark.idea: Design memory-free projections using spectral decomposition to create more efficient coarse-grained simulation schemes.
idea_spark.risk: Unproven existence of solutions for orthogonal dynamics under unbounded perturbations may limit applicability to certain systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: The eliminability of the memory term inspires a rethinking of the physical meaning of 'memory' in coarse-grained models.

papers.title: Improved Chase-Pyndiah Decoding for Product Codes with Scaled Messages
papers.summary: We propose an enhanced Chase-Pyndiah decoder that scales extrinsic messages based on decoder confidence of the component decoder, achieving a 0.1 dB gain over the original with negligible complexity increase.

ai.tldr: 提出一种改进的Chase-Pyndiah译码器，通过基于分量译码器置信度缩放外部消息，在几乎不增加复杂度的情况下获得0.1 dB的增益。
ai.motivation: 原始Chase-Pyndiah译码器在乘积码译码中性能有限，需要在不显著增加复杂度的情况下提升译码增益。
ai.method: 在迭代译码过程中，根据分量译码器的置信度动态缩放外部消息，从而更有效地利用软信息。
ai.result: 与原始译码器相比，新方法实现了0.1 dB的增益，且复杂度增加可忽略。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过简单的消息缩放改进乘积码的迭代译码性能。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将置信度缩放与神经网络结合，实现自适应消息缩放。
idea_spark.risk: 缩放因子设计不当可能导致译码性能下降或收敛问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从软信息可靠性加权角度出发，启发更通用的迭代译码优化策略。

zh.motivation: 原始Chase-Pyndiah译码器在乘积码译码中性能有限，需要在不显著增加复杂度的情况下提升译码增益。

zh.result: 与原始译码器相比，新方法实现了0.1 dB的增益，且复杂度增加可忽略。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过简单的消息缩放改进乘积码的迭代译码性能。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将置信度缩放与神经网络结合，实现自适应消息缩放。
idea_spark.risk: 缩放因子设计不当可能导致译码性能下降或收敛问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从软信息可靠性加权角度出发，启发更通用的迭代译码优化策略。

en.tldr: We propose an enhanced Chase-Pyndiah decoder that scales extrinsic messages based on decoder confidence, achieving a 0.1 dB gain over the original with negligible complexity increase.
en.motivation: The original Chase-Pyndiah decoder has limited performance for product codes, and we aim to improve decoding gain without significant complexity overhead.
en.method: During iterative decoding, extrinsic messages are scaled dynamically according to the confidence of the component decoder, better utilizing soft information.
en.result: The proposed method yields a 0.1 dB gain over the original decoder with negligible complexity increase.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how simple message scaling can improve iterative decoding performance for product codes.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining confidence scaling with neural networks for adaptive message scaling.
idea_spark.risk: Improper scaling factor design may degrade decoding performance or cause convergence issues.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by weighting soft information reliability, leading to more general optimization strategies for iterative decoding.

papers.title: Stochastic Extinction with Relaxed Boundedness Conditions
papers.summary: We study stochastic extinction for a class of Markov processes motivated by models in ecology and epidemiology. Extinction is often characterized by a boundedness condition and a condition on boundary Lyapunov exponents (invasion rates). While the latter is typically sharp, the former is often restrictive and can be improved. Building on the ideas initiated in \cite{benaim2018stochastic}, we develop a streamlined approach that relaxes this boundedness condition and yields concise and accessible criteria for extinction.   In particular, we establish extinction criteria in two settings: with and without a linearly bounded quadratic variation condition. In the first case, our result is comparable to, and slightly improves upon, the main results in \cite{foldes2024stochastic}. In the second case, where the quadratic variation is not linearly bounded, we obtain new extinction results that fall outside the scope of existing frameworks.   Several examples are provided to illustrate the applicability of our results and to highlight situations where previous conditions are not practically verifiable.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类马尔可夫过程的随机灭绝，放宽了有界性条件，得到了更简洁的灭绝判据。
ai.motivation: 生态学和流行病学模型中的灭绝问题通常需要较强的有界性条件，限制了应用。
ai.method: 基于Benaim等人的思想，通过放松有界性条件，结合二次变差条件，建立新的灭绝判据。
ai.result: 在二次变差线性有界和无界两种情形下，分别得到改进或全新的灭绝结果。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了更易验证的随机灭绝条件，有助于生态和流行病模型的稳定性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用二次变差条件替代传统有界性假设，简化灭绝判据。
idea_spark.risk: 新条件可能在某些边界情况下失效，需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生态学实际模型出发，改进数学工具的适用性。

en.tldr: Studies stochastic extinction for Markov processes with relaxed boundedness conditions, yielding concise extinction criteria.
en.motivation: Extinction in ecology/epidemiology models often requires strong boundedness conditions, limiting applicability.
en.method: Builds on Benaim et al., relaxing boundedness and using quadratic variation conditions to derive new criteria.
en.result: Obtains improved or novel extinction results for both linearly bounded and unbounded quadratic variation cases.
en.help_to_user: Provides more verifiable extinction conditions, aiding stability analysis in ecological and epidemiological models.

idea_spark.idea: Use quadratic variation conditions to replace traditional boundedness assumptions, simplifying extinction criteria.
idea_spark.risk: New conditions may fail in certain boundary scenarios, requiring further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Improve mathematical tools based on practical ecological models.

papers.title: A discrete-time overdetermined problem for the heat equation
papers.summary: In this paper, we consider a parabolic counterpart of Serrin's overdetermined problem, in which the overdetermined condition (constant flux condition) is imposed only on a discrete infinite set of time values. We show that, under suitable regularity assumptions on the domain, such a discrete-time overdetermined problem admits a solution if and only if the domain is a ball. Remarkably, depending on the temporal scale, the same overdetermined condition captures either geometric or spectral information, yet both mechanisms lead to the same rigidity conclusion. We study both the case in which the constant flux condition is imposed on the boundary and the case in which the constant flux condition is imposed on an interior surface. We remark that the methods employed in our analysis do not depend on the location of the overdetermined surface but only on whether the sequence of time instants accumulates away from zero. Finally, we will show how this problem generalizes to complete Riemannian manifolds.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了热方程的一个离散时间超定问题，证明了在适当正则性假设下，该问题有解当且仅当区域是球体。
ai.motivation: 将Serrin超定问题推广到抛物型方程，并考虑仅在离散时间点上施加常通量条件的情形。
ai.method: 通过分析离散时间序列的累积性质，结合几何与谱信息，证明区域的刚性结论。
ai.result: 离散时间超定问题有解当且仅当区域为球体；该方法不依赖于超定表面的位置，仅依赖于时间序列是否远离零点累积。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解离散时间超定问题与经典Serrin问题的联系，以及几何与谱信息在刚性结论中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将离散时间超定条件应用于非线性抛物方程，如p-Laplace热方程。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性情形下，离散时间序列的累积性质可能不再保证刚性结论。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从时间离散化角度重新审视经典超定问题，可能发现新的几何或谱约束。
