en.tldr: This paper studies a discrete-time overdetermined problem for the heat equation, proving that under suitable regularity assumptions, the problem admits a solution if and only if the domain is a ball.
en.motivation: To extend Serrin's overdetermined problem to the parabolic setting with constant flux condition imposed only at discrete time instants.
en.method: By analyzing the accumulation properties of the discrete time sequence and combining geometric and spectral information, the rigidity of the domain is established.
en.result: The discrete-time overdetermined problem has a solution if and only if the domain is a ball; the method does not depend on the location of the overdetermined surface but only on whether the time sequence accumulates away from zero.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the connection between discrete-time overdetermined problems and the classical Serrin problem, and the role of geometric and spectral information in rigidity conclusions.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying the discrete-time overdetermined condition to nonlinear parabolic equations, such as the p-Laplace heat equation.
idea_spark.risk: In the nonlinear case, the accumulation property of the discrete time sequence may no longer guarantee rigidity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting classical overdetermined problems from a time-discretization perspective may reveal new geometric or spectral constraints.

papers.title: Uniqueness and Mixing in the Low-Temperature Random-Cluster Model on Trees and Random Graphs
papers.summary: We study the random-cluster model on trees and treelike graphs at low temperatures. This is a model of dependent percolation parametrized by an edge probability $p\in (0,1)$ and a clustering weight $q\in [1,\infty)$, generalizing independent Bernoulli percolation ($q=1$) and closely related to the classical ferromagnetic Ising and Potts spin systems at integer $q$. For $q>2$, approximately sampling from this model on graphs of degree at most $Δ$ is computationally hard. At parameter $p$ below the tree uniqueness threshold $p_{\mathsf{u}}(q,Δ)$, it is expected that sampling is easy and local Markov chains mix rapidly on all bounded degree graphs. On typical graphs (e.g., random regular graphs), the same is predicted at $p > p_{\mathsf{s}}(q,Δ)$, where $p_{\mathsf{s}}(q,Δ)$ is a second uniqueness transition point on the $Δ$-regular wired tree.   Our first result establishes this non-uniqueness/uniqueness phase transition at $p_{\mathsf{s}}(q,Δ)$ for all $q$ on the infinite $Δ$-regular wired tree, resolving a conjecture of H{ä}ggstr{ö}m (1996). For this, we establish weak spatial mixing at $p>p_{\mathsf{s}}(q,Δ)$ under sufficiently wired boundary conditions. We use this understanding of decay of correlations to show that on the wired tree on $n$ vertices, whenever $q>1$ and $p>p_{\mathsf{s}}(q,Δ)$, the mixing time of random-cluster Glauber dynamics is a near-optimal $n^{1+o(1)}$. We then extend these results on spatial and temporal mixing from the tree to treelike geometries with mostly wired boundaries and use them to show that the random-cluster Glauber dynamics mix rapidly on the random $Δ$-regular graph for all $p>p_{\mathsf{s}}(q,Δ)$ as long as $q \ge C \log Δ$, providing an efficient sampling algorithm for both the random-cluster and Potts models in this context.

ai.tldr: 研究了低温下树和类树图上随机簇模型的唯一性与混合性，证明了在Δ正则树上存在非唯一性/唯一性相变，并给出了快速混合的采样算法。
ai.motivation: 理解随机簇模型在低温下的计算复杂性，特别是当q>2时近似采样困难，而低于树唯一性阈值时预期容易采样。
ai.method: 通过建立弱空间混合性质，分析有线边界条件下相关性的衰减，并利用树结构扩展到随机正则图。
ai.result: 在Δ正则有线树上，当p>p_s(q,Δ)时，Glauber动力学的混合时间接近最优n^{1+o(1)}；在随机Δ正则图上，当q≥C log Δ时，对所有p>p_s(q,Δ)混合快速。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了随机簇模型和Potts模型在特定参数下的高效采样算法，有助于统计物理和计算机科学中的相关模拟。

idea_spark.idea: 利用有线边界条件证明弱空间混合，进而推导混合时间上界，可能适用于其他具有相变行为的图模型。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖于树结构，推广到一般图时可能需要额外假设，如边界条件控制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将树上的相变分析与随机图上的混合时间结合，启发研究复杂网络上的采样算法设计。

en.tldr: Studies uniqueness and mixing of the random-cluster model on trees and treelike graphs at low temperatures, proving a non-uniqueness/uniqueness phase transition on the Δ-regular wired tree and providing fast mixing sampling algorithms.
en.motivation: To understand the computational complexity of sampling from the random-cluster model at low temperatures, where approximate sampling is hard for q>2 but expected to be easy below the tree uniqueness threshold.
en.method: Establishes weak spatial mixing under sufficiently wired boundary conditions, analyzes decay of correlations, and extends results from trees to random regular graphs.
en.result: On the Δ-regular wired tree, for p>p_s(q,Δ), the mixing time of Glauber dynamics is near-optimal n^{1+o(1)}; on random Δ-regular graphs, for q≥C log Δ, rapid mixing holds for all p>p_s(q,Δ).
en.help_to_user: Provides efficient sampling algorithms for the random-cluster and Potts models in certain parameter regimes, aiding simulations in statistical physics and computer science.

idea_spark.idea: Using wired boundary conditions to prove weak spatial mixing and then derive mixing time bounds may apply to other graph models with phase transitions.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on tree structure; generalization to arbitrary graphs may require additional assumptions such as boundary condition control.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining phase transition analysis on trees with mixing time on random graphs inspires the design of sampling algorithms on complex networks.

papers.title: A critical note on back-and-forth Data Assimilation Nudging Algorithm
papers.summary: This work investigates the effectiveness of the Back-and-Forth Nudging (BFN) data assimilation algorithm, specifically its performance when employing the Azouani-Olson-Titi (AOT) continuous data assimilation downscaling nudging algorithm, for recovering initial conditions of dissipative dynamical systems. Contrary to previous reports in the literature, we show that, for several systems of interest, one can construct initial conditions that BFN cannot reliably recover.   Our key finding is the construction of infinitely many distinct solutions for certain dissipative systems that share identical spatially sparse observational data. Since these observations are indistinguishable, no data assimilation method relying only on them can differentiate between these solutions or recover the correct initial condition. We illustrate these pathological initial conditions for the Lorenz 1963 model and several 1D partial differential equations: the heat equation, viscous linear transport, and viscous and inviscid Burgers equations. Our analytical results are supported by numerical simulations.   To address the numerical ill-posedness of backward-in-time iterations, an essential step of BFN for dissipative models, we introduce a regularized backward step, the Voigt-regularized BFN (VBFN). We investigate its performance for the 2D Navier-Stokes equations and the viscous 1D KdV equation, comparing it with standard BFN and Diffusive BFN (dBFN). While VBFN improves numerical stability and reduces model bias relative to dBFN, it still cannot reconstruct the unobserved fine spatial scales of the reference solution. This reinforces our main conclusion: even with regularization, BFN-type algorithms are limited in recovering the full state, and in particular the initial data, from sparse spatial observations.

ai.tldr: 本文指出，对于耗散动力系统，使用Azouani-Olson-Titi连续数据同化降尺度 nudging 算法的回馈 nudging (BFN) 方法在恢复初始条件时存在根本性局限：存在无穷多解共享相同的稀疏空间观测数据，导致任何仅依赖这些观测的方法都无法区分它们。
ai.motivation: 验证BFN数据同化算法在恢复耗散系统初始条件时的有效性，并揭示其潜在缺陷。
ai.method: 构造反例，证明存在无穷多解与相同稀疏观测数据一致；引入Voigt正则化BFN (VBFN) 改善数值稳定性，并通过数值实验比较标准BFN、扩散BFN和VBFN在2D Navier-Stokes和粘性1D KdV方程上的表现。
ai.result: BFN无法可靠恢复某些初始条件；VBFN虽提升稳定性并降低模型偏差，但仍无法重建未观测的精细空间尺度。
ai.help_to_user: 提醒用户在使用BFN类算法处理稀疏观测数据时，需警惕初始条件不可恢复的风险，并了解正则化方法的局限性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多源观测（如时间序列或不同物理量）或引入先验信息（如物理约束）来打破解的唯一性困境。
idea_spark.risk: 增加观测或先验可能引入额外误差或计算负担，且未必能完全消除不可区分性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发设计混合数据同化策略，融合稀疏空间观测与时间演化信息，或利用机器学习从历史数据中学习解的结构先验。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多源观测（如时间序列或不同物理量）或引入先验信息（如物理约束）来打破解的唯一性困境。

en.tldr: This work shows that the Back-and-Forth Nudging (BFN) data assimilation algorithm, using the Azouani-Olson-Titi continuous downscaling nudging, fails to recover initial conditions for certain dissipative systems because infinitely many distinct solutions share the same sparse spatial observations.
en.motivation: To critically assess the effectiveness of BFN in recovering initial conditions of dissipative dynamical systems and reveal its fundamental limitations.
en.method: Construct counterexamples with infinitely many solutions indistinguishable by sparse observations; introduce Voigt-regularized BFN (VBFN) to improve numerical stability, and compare performance on 2D Navier-Stokes and viscous 1D KdV equations via numerical simulations.
en.result: BFN cannot reliably recover certain initial conditions; VBFN improves stability and reduces model bias but still fails to reconstruct unobserved fine spatial scales.
en.help_to_user: Warns users about the risk of non-uniqueness when using BFN-type algorithms with sparse observations, and clarifies the limitations of regularization approaches.

idea_spark.idea: Combine multiple observation types (e.g., time series or different physical quantities) or incorporate prior information (e.g., physical constraints) to break solution non-uniqueness.
idea_spark.risk: Adding observations or priors may introduce extra errors or computational cost, and may not fully eliminate indistinguishability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires hybrid data assimilation strategies that fuse sparse spatial observations with temporal evolution information, or use machine learning to learn structural priors from historical data.

papers.title: A unified framework for inexact adaptive stepsizes in the gradient methods, the conjugate gradient methods and the quasi-Newton methods for strictly convex quadratic optimization
papers.summary: The inexact adaptive stepsizes for the conjugate gradient method and the quasi-Newton method are very rare. The exact stepsizes in the gradient method, the conjugate gradient method and the quasi-Newton method for strictly convex quadratic optimization have a unified framework, while the unified framework for inexact adaptive stepsizes in the gradient method, the conjugate gradient method and the quasi-Newton method for strictly convex quadratic optimization still remains unknown. Based on the above observations, we propose a unified framework for inexact adaptive stepsizes in the gradient method, the conjugate gradient method and the quasi-Newton method for strictly convex quadratic optimization, which is called approximately optimal stepsize. The global convergence and the convergence rate of the gradient method with the approximately optimal stepsize are established by exploring the relation between the approximately optimal stepsize and the famous Barzilai-Borwein (BB) stepsizes. Some numerical results are presented, which confirm the remarkable numerical advantage of the gradient method, the conjugate gradient method and the quasi-Newton method with the unified framework for inexact adaptive stepsizes. Some open problems about the gradient method, the conjugate gradient method and the quasi-Newton method with approximately optimal stepsize are raised.

ai.tldr: 针对严格凸二次优化，提出了梯度法、共轭梯度法和拟牛顿法中非精确自适应步长的统一框架，称为近似最优步长。
ai.motivation: 现有方法中精确步长已有统一框架，但非精确自适应步长的统一框架尚属空白。
ai.method: 通过建立近似最优步长与Barzilai-Borwein步长的关系，统一了三种方法的非精确自适应步长。
ai.result: 证明了梯度法使用近似最优步长的全局收敛性和收敛速率，数值实验显示显著优势。
ai.help_to_user: 为优化算法中步长选择提供了一种通用且高效的非精确自适应方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将近似最优步长思想应用于随机优化或非凸问题。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸问题中收敛性分析可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用已知步长关系（如BB步长）设计自适应策略。

en.tldr: A unified framework for inexact adaptive stepsizes in gradient, conjugate gradient, and quasi-Newton methods for strictly convex quadratic optimization, called approximately optimal stepsize.
en.motivation: Exact stepsizes have a unified framework, but a unified framework for inexact adaptive stepsizes was missing.
en.method: The approximately optimal stepsize is linked to Barzilai-Borwein stepsizes to unify the three methods.
en.result: Global convergence and convergence rate are established for the gradient method; numerical results show significant advantages.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general and efficient inexact adaptive stepsize scheme for optimization algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Apply approximately optimal stepsize to stochastic optimization or nonconvex problems.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence analysis may be more challenging for nonconvex problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage known stepsize relationships (e.g., BB stepsizes) to design adaptive strategies.

papers.title: Evaluation of Various Objective Functions for Optimal Reactive Power Flow Including Transformer Tap Changer Optimisation
papers.summary: Modern distribution grids with high penetration of renewable generation provide substantial flexibility through distributed reactive power sources and transformer tap changers. This high degree of freedom can be exploited for optimisation. However, choosing an objective function for optimisation is not trivial, e.~g. minimising grid losses may lead to overvoltages and minimising voltage deviations may lead to higher reactive power flows to neighbouring system operators. Thus, this paper deals with the design of an objective function for the centralised optimisation of distributed reactive power sources and transformer tap changers. Different objectives for characteristic network quantities are investigated for the optimisation and optimised in a combined manner and separately. The consequences of optimising conflicting target values are then analysed. For the optimisation, various grid usage cases of a 110 kV benchmark power grid from SimBench are examined. The investigated power grid is characterised by a high proportion of renewable energy plants. The optimisation is carried out in a data-driven, object-oriented manner using the interior point method with open source software. At the end of the paper, a meaningful optimisation function with combined weighted objectives is derived and the results are analysed.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了含高比例可再生能源的配电网中，如何设计目标函数以同时优化分布式无功源和变压器抽头，并分析了不同目标组合的权衡。
ai.motivation: 现代配电网中可再生能源渗透率高，分布式无功源和变压器抽头提供了大量可调自由度，但选择合适的目标函数（如最小化网损或电压偏差）并不简单，可能引发过电压或增加无功交换。
ai.method: 采用内点法，基于SimBench 110 kV基准电网，对多种网络特征量目标（单独及组合加权）进行数据驱动、面向对象的优化，并分析冲突目标的影响。
ai.result: 推导出一个有意义的组合加权优化函数，并分析了不同目标优化后的电网运行结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在多目标无功优化中如何权衡网损、电压偏差等指标，并提供了可参考的目标函数设计思路。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将动态权重或自适应权重引入目标函数，以适应不同运行场景下的优先级变化。
idea_spark.risk: 加权系数的选取可能依赖经验或试错，缺乏理论最优性保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可借鉴多目标进化算法或帕累托前沿分析，自动识别不同目标间的折中关系。

en.tldr: This paper investigates how to design an objective function for centralized optimization of distributed reactive power sources and transformer tap changers in distribution grids with high renewable penetration, analyzing trade-offs among different objectives.
en.motivation: Modern distribution grids with high renewable generation offer substantial flexibility via distributed reactive sources and tap changers, but choosing an objective function (e.g., minimizing losses vs. voltage deviations) is nontrivial and may cause overvoltages or increased reactive power exchange.
en.method: Using interior point method on a SimBench 110 kV benchmark grid, various characteristic network quantities are optimized both separately and in a combined weighted manner, with analysis of conflicting objectives.
en.result: A meaningful combined weighted objective function is derived, and the consequences of optimizing conflicting targets are analyzed.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand trade-offs in multi-objective reactive power optimization and provides a reference for designing objective functions.

idea_spark.idea: Consider dynamic or adaptive weights in the objective function to adjust priorities under different operating scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Weight selection may rely on heuristics or trial-and-error, lacking theoretical optimality guarantees.
idea_spark.inspiration: Multi-objective evolutionary algorithms or Pareto front analysis could automatically identify trade-offs among conflicting objectives.

papers.title: Edge Universality for Inhomogeneous Random Matrices II: Markov Chain Comparison and Critical Statistics
papers.summary: The first paper in this series introduced a \emph{short-to-long mixing} condition that captures mean-field GOE/GUE edge universality in the supercritical sparsity regime, for symmetric/Hermitian random matrices with independent entries and a Markov variance profile. This condition reduces the universality problem to the mixing properties of the underlying Markov chains.   In this paper, we develop new \emph{short-to-long comparison} conditions that extend the analysis to the subcritical and critical sparsity regimes. Specifically, we prove that two inhomogeneous random matrices exhibit the same universal edge statistics whenever their variance-profile Markov chains are comparable, regardless of the fine details of the matrix entries. To illustrate the power of our Markov chain comparison theorem, we derive the spectral edge statistics for several prototypical models: random band matrices, the Wegner orbital model, and Hankel-profile random matrices. These comparisons uncover a rich landscape of both universal and non-universal phenomena -- shaped by geometric structure, spike patterns, and domains of stable attraction -- features that lie fundamentally beyond the reach of classical random matrix theory.

ai.tldr: 本文通过马尔可夫链比较方法，将非齐次随机矩阵的边沿普适性从超临界扩展到亚临界和临界稀疏区域，并揭示了多种模型中的普适与非普适现象。
ai.motivation: 经典随机矩阵理论无法处理由几何结构、尖峰模式和稳定吸引域等引起的非普适现象，需要更通用的方法。
ai.method: 发展“短到长比较”条件，证明若方差轮廓的马尔可夫链可比，则矩阵具有相同的边沿统计量。
ai.result: 成功推导了随机带矩阵、Wegner轨道模型和Hankel轮廓矩阵的谱边统计，展示了丰富的普适与非普适行为。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非齐次随机矩阵在稀疏性变化时的边沿行为，以及马尔可夫链比较在其中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 将方差轮廓的马尔可夫链性质与谱边统计直接关联，避免对矩阵元素细节的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 比较条件可能对某些特殊结构（如长程相关）不适用，需要进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受马尔可夫链混合理论启发，将随机矩阵的普适性问题转化为链的比较问题。

en.tldr: This paper extends edge universality for inhomogeneous random matrices to subcritical and critical sparsity regimes via Markov chain comparison, revealing universal and non-universal phenomena across several models.
en.motivation: Classical random matrix theory cannot capture non-universal phenomena arising from geometric structure, spike patterns, and stable attraction domains.
en.method: Develops short-to-long comparison conditions, proving that two matrices share the same edge statistics if their variance-profile Markov chains are comparable.
en.result: Derives spectral edge statistics for random band matrices, Wegner orbital model, and Hankel-profile matrices, uncovering a rich landscape of universal and non-universal behavior.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand edge behavior of inhomogeneous random matrices under varying sparsity and the role of Markov chain comparison.

idea_spark.idea: Directly link Markov chain properties of variance profiles to spectral edge statistics, bypassing detailed matrix entries.
idea_spark.risk: The comparison conditions may fail for certain special structures (e.g., long-range correlations) and require further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Markov chain mixing theory, reformulating random matrix universality as a chain comparison problem.

papers.title: Failure of ambient closed-set large-deviation upper bounds in entropic optimal transport
papers.summary: Large-deviation upper bounds on compact sets do not, in general, extend to arbitrary closed sets without additional tightness. We show that this obstruction already occurs in static entropic optimal transport. More precisely, we construct a fixed-cost model with continuous cost and nonatomic marginals for which the entropic minimisers converge in total variation to an optimal plan with noncompact support, the known compact-set upper bound remains valid, but the corresponding closed-set upper bound fails on a specific closed subset of the ambient space. For a fixed closed set, we identify the exact tail criterion for passing from compact to closed sets. We show that there does not exist a full large-deviation principle (LDP) on the ambient space at speed $1/\varepsilon$ with an arbitrary lower semicontinuous rate function.

ai.tldr: 在静态熵最优输运中，已知的紧集大偏差上界无法推广到任意闭集，并构造了反例。
ai.motivation: 研究大偏差上界从紧集到闭集的推广条件，揭示熵最优输运中的紧性缺失问题。
ai.method: 构造固定成本模型，其中熵最小化子在总变差意义下收敛到非紧支撑的最优计划，并分析闭集上界失效的尾准则。
ai.result: 证明了在速度1/ε下，不存在以任意下半连续率函数为特征的完整大偏差原理。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解大偏差理论在熵最优输运中的局限性，以及紧性条件的重要性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用非紧支撑的最优计划构造反例，可能启发对一般输运问题中紧性缺失的研究。
idea_spark.risk: 反例依赖于特定成本模型，推广到一般情形需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑在更广泛的输运框架中，探索大偏差原理成立的充分必要条件。

en.tldr: In static entropic optimal transport, known large-deviation upper bounds on compact sets do not extend to arbitrary closed sets, and a counterexample is constructed.
en.motivation: To investigate the conditions for extending large-deviation upper bounds from compact to closed sets, revealing the lack of tightness in entropic optimal transport.
en.method: Construct a fixed-cost model where entropic minimizers converge in total variation to an optimal plan with noncompact support, and analyze the tail criterion for closed-set bound failure.
en.result: Prove that there is no full large-deviation principle at speed 1/ε with an arbitrary lower semicontinuous rate function.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the limitations of large-deviation theory in entropic optimal transport and the importance of tightness conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Using optimal plans with noncompact support to construct counterexamples may inspire research on tightness in general transport problems.
idea_spark.risk: The counterexample relies on a specific cost model; generalization to other settings requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider exploring necessary and sufficient conditions for a large-deviation principle in broader transport frameworks.

papers.title: Atypical Decay Rates for Atypical Heights in Random Recursive Trees
papers.summary: We establish the large deviation probabilities for the height of random recursive trees, revealing polynomial upper-tail decay and stretched-exponential lower-tail decay. Remarkably, the lower tail features an atypical prefactor that grows to infinity more slowly than any $n$-fold iterated logarithm.

ai.tldr: 建立了随机递归树高度的大偏差概率，揭示了上尾多项式衰减和下尾拉伸指数衰减，其中下尾包含一个增长慢于任意n重迭代对数的异常前因子。
ai.motivation: 理解随机递归树高度极端事件的概率行为。
ai.method: 大偏差理论分析。
ai.result: 上尾多项式衰减，下尾拉伸指数衰减且前因子异常缓慢增长。
ai.help_to_user: 提供随机树高度极端事件的精确概率刻画。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他随机结构中类似异常前因子的出现条件。
idea_spark.risk: 分析复杂度高，可能依赖特定树模型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 异常前因子可能源于树结构的递归自相似性。

en.tldr: Established large deviation probabilities for the height of random recursive trees, revealing polynomial upper-tail decay and stretched-exponential lower-tail decay with an atypical prefactor growing slower than any n-fold iterated logarithm.
en.motivation: To understand the probability behavior of extreme height events in random recursive trees.
en.method: Large deviation theory analysis.
en.result: Polynomial upper-tail decay, stretched-exponential lower-tail decay with an anomalously slow-growing prefactor.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise probabilistic characterization of extreme height events in random trees.

idea_spark.idea: Explore conditions for similar anomalous prefactors in other random structures.
idea_spark.risk: Analysis complexity may be high and model-dependent.
idea_spark.inspiration: The anomalous prefactor may arise from the recursive self-similarity of tree structure.

papers.title: A semiclassical approach to spectral estimates for random Landau Schrodinger operators
papers.summary: We prove spectral properties for random Landau Schrödinger operators on $L^2(\mathbb{R}^2)$ with bounded, random potentials supported in a square $Λ_L \subset \mathbb{R}^2$ of side length $L>0$, using semiclassical pseudodifferential calculus. The semiclassical parameter $h$ is the inverse of the magnetic field strength $B > 0$. By means of the Grushin method, we are led to the analysis of an effective Hamiltonian on $L^2 (\mathbb{R})$, the principal term of which is a sum of certain compact, self-adjoint pseudodifferential operators. By analyzing these operators, we prove semiclassical Wegner and Minami estimates for the random Landau Schrodinger operator in energy intervals in the spectral bands around each Landau level.

ai.tldr: 利用半经典伪微分算子和Grushin方法，证明了随机Landau Schrödinger算子在Landau能级附近谱带内的Wegner和Minami估计。
ai.motivation: 研究随机Landau Schrödinger算子的谱性质，特别是磁场强度大时Landau能级附近的谱局部化。
ai.method: 采用半经典伪微分演算和Grushin方法，将问题约化为有效哈密顿量，并分析紧自伴伪微分算子。
ai.result: 在Landau能级附近的谱带内，证明了半经典的Wegner和Minami估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了随机磁场中量子系统谱局部化的严格数学分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将有效哈密顿量的主项分解为紧自伴伪微分算子之和，从而获得谱估计。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于磁场强度大（半经典参数小），弱磁场情形可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合随机谱理论与半经典分析，为无序系统谱性质提供新视角。

en.tldr: Using semiclassical pseudodifferential calculus and the Grushin method, we prove Wegner and Minami estimates for random Landau Schrödinger operators in spectral bands around Landau levels.
en.motivation: To study spectral properties of random Landau Schrödinger operators, especially spectral localization near Landau levels under strong magnetic fields.
en.method: We employ semiclassical pseudodifferential calculus and the Grushin method to reduce the problem to an effective Hamiltonian, analyzing compact self-adjoint pseudodifferential operators.
en.result: Semiclassical Wegner and Minami estimates are proved in spectral bands around each Landau level.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical tools for spectral localization in quantum systems with random magnetic fields.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the principal term of the effective Hamiltonian into a sum of compact self-adjoint pseudodifferential operators to obtain spectral estimates.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on strong magnetic fields (small semiclassical parameter); weak field cases may not be covered.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining random spectral theory with semiclassical analysis offers a new perspective on spectral properties of disordered systems.

papers.title: On the Sadowsky functional for anisotropic ribbons
papers.summary: The equilibrium shape of a thin, elastic, inextensible ribbon minimizes its bending energy. It has been shown that, as the width of the ribbon tends to zero, the bending energy Gamma-converges to the so called Sadowsky functional. In this paper we consider geometrically frustrated anisotropic ribbons with a possibly curved reference configuration. We prove that the Gamma-convergence remains valid under prescribed affine boundary conditions, including, in particular, those satisfied by a Möbius strip.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了在仿射边界条件下，各向异性细带的弯曲能量Gamma-收敛到Sadowsky泛函，包括Möbius带情形。
ai.motivation: 研究几何受挫各向异性细带的平衡形状，并推广Sadowsky泛函的Gamma-收敛结果。
ai.method: 通过Gamma-收敛分析，考虑可能弯曲的参考构型和仿射边界条件。
ai.result: 证明了在宽度趋于零时，弯曲能量Gamma-收敛到Sadowsky泛函，且适用于Möbius带等情形。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了各向异性细带能量极小化的严格数学框架，可用于细带结构力学分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何受挫引入细带模型，可能产生新的自组装或形变模式。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于仿射边界条件，实际边界可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: Möbius带等拓扑结构可能启发新型柔性电子或超材料设计。

en.tldr: This paper proves that the bending energy of anisotropic ribbons Gamma-converges to the Sadowsky functional under affine boundary conditions, including the Möbius strip case.
en.motivation: To study the equilibrium shapes of geometrically frustrated anisotropic ribbons and extend the Gamma-convergence result for the Sadowsky functional.
en.method: Gamma-convergence analysis with possibly curved reference configurations and prescribed affine boundary conditions.
en.result: The bending energy Gamma-converges to the Sadowsky functional as the ribbon width tends to zero, applicable to Möbius strips and other cases.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for energy minimization of anisotropic ribbons, useful for mechanics of slender structures.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating geometric frustration may lead to novel self-assembly or deformation patterns in ribbons.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical result relies on affine boundary conditions, which may not hold in practical scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Topological structures like Möbius strips could inspire new designs for flexible electronics or metamaterials.

papers.title: Magnetic uncertainty in variable geometry
papers.summary: In this paper, we study Hardy-type uncertainty principles and unique continuation properties for linear covariant Schrodinger equations with variable coefficients in the presence of bounded electric and magnetic potentials. Under suitable smallness assumptions on the leading coefficients, we prove that any solution exhibiting super-quadratic exponential decay at two distinct times must vanish identically. Under an additional structural assumption on the coefficient matrix $G$, we further establish a Hardy-type result at the quadratic exponential scale. We also obtain an analogous uniqueness result for the heat equation with variable-coefficient magnetic perturbations.   Our results unify and extend previous works in two directions: they recover the constant-coefficient covariant case treated by Barcelo-Fanelli-Gutierrez-Ruiz-Vilela when $G=I$, and the variable-coefficient non-magnetic case considered by Federico-Li-Yu when $A=0$. The proofs combine logarithmic convexity arguments with Carleman estimates adapted to variable-coefficient covariant Schrödinger and parabolic flows. Although our approach follows the general strategy introduced by Escauriaza-Kenig-Ponce-Vega, substantial new difficulties arise from the interaction between the variable metric and the magnetic structure, which requires new weight functions and refined commutator estimates.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了变系数线性协变薛定谔方程在磁场存在下的Hardy型不确定性原理和唯一延拓性质，证明了在适当小性假设下，若解在两个不同时刻具有超二次指数衰减则必为零，并推广了常系数和非磁情形。
ai.motivation: 统一并推广已有结果，处理变系数与磁场耦合带来的新困难。
ai.method: 结合对数凸性论证和适应变系数协变流的Carleman估计，引入新权函数并改进交换子估计。
ai.result: 得到超二次指数衰减下的唯一性定理，以及在附加结构假设下的二次指数尺度Hardy型结果，并推广到热方程。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究变系数磁场中薛定谔方程的解的衰减与唯一性提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用新权函数处理变度量与磁场相互作用，可能启发更一般的唯一延拓问题。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定小性假设，对强磁场或大变形情形可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将常系数结果推广到变系数时，需重新设计权函数和交换子估计，这为类似推广提供了范例。

en.tldr: This paper studies Hardy-type uncertainty principles and unique continuation for linear covariant Schrödinger equations with variable coefficients and bounded magnetic potentials, proving that super-quadratic exponential decay at two times forces the solution to vanish, and extends to the heat equation.
en.motivation: Unify and extend previous works to variable-coefficient magnetic settings.
en.method: Logarithmic convexity arguments combined with Carleman estimates adapted to variable-coefficient covariant flows, using new weight functions and refined commutator estimates.
en.result: Unique continuation under super-quadratic decay, Hardy-type result at quadratic exponential scale under additional structural assumption, and analogous result for the heat equation.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for studying decay and uniqueness of solutions to Schrödinger equations with variable coefficients and magnetic fields.

idea_spark.idea: New weight functions designed to handle variable metric-magnetic interaction may inspire more general unique continuation problems.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on smallness assumptions that may fail for strong magnetic fields or large deformations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending constant-coefficient results to variable coefficients requires redesigning weights and commutator estimates, providing a template for similar generalizations.

papers.title: Compressible Navier-Stokes-Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert system: derivations and well-posedness
papers.summary: In this paper, we first derive the compressible Navier-Stokes/Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert (NS-LLG) model for magnetoelastic materials via the energetic variational approach (EnVarA). It is important to emphasize that the manner in which the evolution of magnetoelastic materials is influenced by the fluid motion--specifically through the deformation gradient--determines the kinematics of the magnetization and consequently leads to distinct governing equations. Subsequently, we establish the local-in-time existence of solutions to the compressible NS-LLG system under finite initial energy. Finally, near the constant equilibrium for magnetoelasticity in the absence of an external magnetic field, we reformulate the evolutionary model, which allows an additional dissipative term to be identified from the elastic stress. Based on this reformulation, we justify the global well-posedness of the evolutionary magnetoelasticity system with zero external magnetic field, provided the initial data are sufficiently small. In particular, when the magnetic field $M$ vanishes, this model reduces to the viscoelastic model. Our results significantly relax the previous initial data requirements, only assume the most basic structural condition $ρ_{0} \operatorname{det} F_{0} = 1$.

ai.tldr: 本文通过能量变分方法推导了可压缩磁弹性材料的NS-LLG模型，并证明了在有限初始能量下解的局部存在性；在无外磁场且初始数据足够小时，建立了全局适定性。
ai.motivation: 磁弹性材料中流体运动对磁化演化的影响机制尚不清晰，且现有适定性结果对初始数据要求较强。
ai.method: 采用能量变分方法（EnVarA）推导模型，利用变形梯度描述磁化运动学；通过能量估计和线性化技术证明局部和全局适定性。
ai.result: 获得了可压缩NS-LLG系统的局部存在性；在无外磁场且初始数据充分小时，证明了全局适定性，且条件仅需ρ₀ det F₀=1。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解磁弹性耦合系统的数学建模与适定性分析，为数值模拟和物理应用提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用变形梯度作为桥梁，将流体运动与磁化演化耦合，可启发设计新型磁控软材料。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设无外磁场，实际应用中磁场可能不可忽略；全局适定性对初始数据的小性要求可能限制适用场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从弹性应力中识别额外耗散项的思路，可用于改进其他耦合系统的稳定性分析。

en.tldr: This paper derives the compressible NS-LLG model for magnetoelastic materials via the energetic variational approach, proves local-in-time existence under finite initial energy, and establishes global well-posedness for small initial data in the absence of an external magnetic field.
en.motivation: The influence of fluid motion on magnetization evolution in magnetoelastic materials is unclear, and existing well-posedness results require strong initial data conditions.
en.method: The energetic variational approach (EnVarA) is used to derive the model, with the deformation gradient governing magnetization kinematics; local and global well-posedness are proved via energy estimates and linearization.
en.result: Local existence for the compressible NS-LLG system is obtained; global well-posedness is established for small initial data with zero external magnetic field, requiring only ρ₀ det F₀=1.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for magnetoelastic coupling, aiding numerical simulations and physical applications.

idea_spark.idea: Using the deformation gradient as a bridge to couple fluid motion and magnetization could inspire design of novel magnetically controlled soft materials.
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes no external magnetic field, which may be unrealistic in applications; the smallness condition on initial data may limit applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Identifying an additional dissipative term from elastic stress may improve stability analysis for other coupled systems.

papers.title: An analytic formula for surface currents generating prescribed plasma equilibrium fields
papers.summary: Given a plasma domain $P\subset\mathbb{R}^3$, a plasma equilibrium field $B$ on $P$ and a coil winding surface $Σ$ surrounding $P$, we provide an analytic formula whose output is a surface current distribution $j$ on $Σ$ such that $\operatorname{BS}(j)+\operatorname{BS}(\operatorname{curl}(B))=B$ in $P$, i.e. the combination of the plasma current magnetic field and the surface current magnetic field exactly produce the full plasma equilibrium field. Further, our formula allows to adjust the toroidal complexity of the current without changing the magnetic field. Some discussions regarding aspects of numerical approximations are also included.

ai.tldr: 提出一个解析公式，在给定等离子体区域和线圈绕制面的情况下，计算表面电流分布，使得该电流与等离子体电流的磁场共同精确产生等离子体平衡场。
ai.motivation: 在托卡马克或仿星器等磁约束聚变装置中，需要设计外部线圈来产生并维持等离子体的平衡磁场。现有方法多依赖数值优化，缺乏解析解，本工作旨在提供一种精确的解析构造方法。
ai.method: 基于等离子体区域内的平衡场和包围它的线圈曲面，推导出表面电流分布的解析表达式，并允许在不改变磁场的前提下调整电流的环向复杂度。
ai.result: 该公式能够精确再现等离子体平衡场，且通过调节环向复杂度可以控制线圈的几何复杂性，为线圈设计提供了理论依据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何从给定的平衡磁场解析地反演出所需的表面电流，为磁约束聚变装置中的线圈设计提供数学工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用解析公式直接构造表面电流，避免数值优化中的局部极小和收敛问题，同时通过复杂度参数控制工程可行性。
idea_spark.risk: 解析公式依赖于理想化的几何和物理假设（如完美导体、无误差），实际应用中需考虑离散化误差和制造公差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将磁场逆问题转化为解析可解的形式，启发其他物理场（如静电场、声场）中类似逆源问题的解析解法。

en.tldr: An analytic formula is provided to compute a surface current distribution on a coil winding surface that, together with the plasma current, exactly reproduces a prescribed plasma equilibrium magnetic field.
en.motivation: In magnetic confinement fusion devices like tokamaks and stellarators, external coils must be designed to generate and sustain the plasma equilibrium field. Existing methods rely heavily on numerical optimization; this work aims to provide an exact analytic construction.
en.method: Given the equilibrium field inside the plasma domain and a surrounding coil surface, an analytic expression for the surface current is derived, allowing adjustment of toroidal complexity without altering the magnetic field.
en.result: The formula exactly reproduces the plasma equilibrium field, and the toroidal complexity parameter enables control over coil geometry complexity, providing a theoretical basis for coil design.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to analytically invert a given equilibrium magnetic field to obtain the required surface current, offering a mathematical tool for coil design in magnetic confinement fusion.

idea_spark.idea: Use an analytic formula to directly construct surface currents, avoiding local minima and convergence issues in numerical optimization, while controlling engineering feasibility via a complexity parameter.
idea_spark.risk: The analytic formula relies on idealized geometric and physical assumptions (e.g., perfect conductors, no errors); practical applications must account for discretization errors and manufacturing tolerances.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transforming a magnetic field inverse problem into an analytically solvable form inspires similar analytic solutions for inverse source problems in other physical fields (e.g., electrostatics, acoustics).

papers.title: Nonlocal Characterizations of Stochastic Completeness on Complete Riemannian Manifolds
papers.summary: In this paper, we first prove that the following generalized conservation principle holds on complete Riemannian manifolds: for every \(0<s<1\) and \(t>0\), \[ T_t^{(s)}\mathbf 1+\int_0^t T_τ^{(s)}\mathcal R_s\,dτ=1 \qquad\text{on }M, \] where \(\mathcal R_s\) is the intrinsic killing term measuring the loss of mass of the subordinate semigroup, and the condition \(\mathcal R_s\equiv0\) is equivalent to the stochastic completeness of \(M\).   We then provide several new nonlocal characterizations of stochastic completeness. In particular, we show that stochastic completeness is equivalent to genuinely nonlocal conditions, including the zero-mean identity \[ \int_M (-Δ)^s\varphi\,dV_g=0 \qquad\forall\,\varphi\in C_c^\infty(M), \] as well as the uniqueness of bounded distributional solutions to the associated fractional elliptic and parabolic equations. We also revisit the equivalent \(L^1\)-core characterization for the generator of the heat semigroup, which plays an important role in our approach.   In addition, we prove \(L^p\)-contractivity and smoothing properties of the subordinate semigroup, establish both short-time and long-time asymptotic results for the fractional heat kernel, derive the short-time asymptotics of jump probabilities for the associated Markov process, and study the variational characterization and minimality properties of the fractional resolvent. Together, these results provide a unified analytic and probabilistic framework for the fractional Laplacian on complete Riemannian manifolds.

ai.tldr: 本文在完备黎曼流形上证明了广义守恒原理，并给出了随机完备性的若干非局部刻画。
ai.motivation: 建立分数阶拉普拉斯算子在完备黎曼流形上的统一分析概率框架，并刻画随机完备性。
ai.method: 利用次生半群的内在杀死项、分数阶椭圆与抛物方程的有界分布解唯一性、L^p 压缩性及热核渐近分析。
ai.result: 随机完备性等价于分数阶拉普拉斯算子的零均值恒等式、有界分布解唯一性等非局部条件，并得到分数阶热核的短时与长时渐近。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机完备性的非局部特征，以及分数阶拉普拉斯算子在流形上的分析性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用次生半群的守恒性定义随机完备性，并建立其与分数阶拉普拉斯算子零均值恒等式的等价关系。
idea_spark.risk: 非局部条件在非紧流形上的验证可能依赖额外的几何假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将概率中的守恒原理与几何分析中的非局部算子结合，为随机完备性提供新视角。

en.tldr: This paper proves a generalized conservation principle on complete Riemannian manifolds and provides several nonlocal characterizations of stochastic completeness.
en.motivation: To establish a unified analytic and probabilistic framework for the fractional Laplacian on complete Riemannian manifolds and characterize stochastic completeness.
en.method: Using the intrinsic killing term of the subordinate semigroup, uniqueness of bounded distributional solutions to fractional elliptic/parabolic equations, L^p contractivity, and heat kernel asymptotics.
en.result: Stochastic completeness is equivalent to nonlocal conditions such as the zero-mean identity for the fractional Laplacian and uniqueness of bounded distributional solutions; short-time and long-time asymptotics of the fractional heat kernel are derived.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand nonlocal characterizations of stochastic completeness and analytic properties of the fractional Laplacian on manifolds.

idea_spark.idea: Define stochastic completeness via conservation of the subordinate semigroup and link it to the zero-mean identity of the fractional Laplacian.
idea_spark.risk: Verification of nonlocal conditions on non-compact manifolds may require additional geometric assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining probabilistic conservation principles with geometric analysis of nonlocal operators offers a new perspective on stochastic completeness.

papers.title: A Loewner-Nirenberg phenomena for Ricci flow on compact manifolds with boundary.II
papers.summary: This is a continuation of the research in [16]. Let $(\overline{M},g_{-1})$ be a closed geodesic $r_0$-ball in the hyperbolic space $(\mathbb{H}^n,g_{-1})$. Let $m\neq1$ be a positive constant. In this paper, we show that for $n\geq3$, starting from the metric $m g_{-1}$ on $\overline{M}$, with certain prescribed non-decreasing rotationally symmetric mean curvature and the fixed conformal class $[g_{\mathbb{S}^{n-1}}]$ on the boundary $\partial M$, the solution $g(t)$ to the normalized Ricci flow $(1.2)$ which is continuous up to the boundary, exists for all $t>0$, and converges locally uniformly in the interior $M$ of $\overline{M}$ to a complete hyperbolic metric as $t\to\infty$(see Theorem 1.1 for details). Under some additional conditions, we show the same conclusion holds for $n=2$.

ai.tldr: 本文是[16]的延续，证明了在紧致带边流形上，从双曲空间中的测地球出发，在特定边界条件下，归一化Ricci流解全局存在且内部收敛到完备双曲度量。
ai.motivation: 研究带边流形上Ricci流的Loewner-Nirenberg现象，即内部收敛到完备双曲度量的长期行为。
ai.method: 利用归一化Ricci流方程，结合边界上非递减旋转对称平均曲率和固定共形类的条件，分析解的全局存在性和内部收敛性。
ai.result: 对于n≥3，解全局存在且内部一致收敛到完备双曲度量；在额外条件下n=2也成立。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了带边流形上Ricci流长期行为的严格分析框架，有助于理解几何流与双曲度量的关系。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将边界平均曲率条件替换为更一般的曲率约束，探索不同几何流下的类似现象。
idea_spark.risk: 边界条件的微小变化可能导致收敛性失效或解爆破，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从双曲空间测地球出发的构造启发我们研究其他对称空间中的类似现象。

zh.result: 对于n≥3，解全局存在且内部一致收敛到完备双曲度量；在额外条件下n=2也成立。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了带边流形上Ricci流长期行为的严格分析框架，有助于理解几何流与双曲度量的关系。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将边界平均曲率条件替换为更一般的曲率约束，探索不同几何流下的类似现象。
idea_spark.risk: 边界条件的微小变化可能导致收敛性失效或解爆破，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从双曲空间测地球出发的构造启发我们研究其他对称空间中的类似现象。

en.tldr: This paper continues [16], proving that on compact manifolds with boundary, starting from a geodesic ball in hyperbolic space, under specific boundary conditions, the normalized Ricci flow solution exists globally and converges locally uniformly in the interior to a complete hyperbolic metric.
en.motivation: To study the Loewner-Nirenberg phenomenon for Ricci flow on manifolds with boundary, i.e., the long-time behavior converging to a complete hyperbolic metric in the interior.
en.method: Using the normalized Ricci flow equation, combined with prescribed non-decreasing rotationally symmetric mean curvature and fixed conformal class on the boundary, to analyze global existence and interior convergence.
en.result: For n≥3, the solution exists globally and converges locally uniformly in the interior to a complete hyperbolic metric; under additional conditions, the same holds for n=2.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous analytic framework for the long-time behavior of Ricci flow on manifolds with boundary, aiding understanding of the relationship between geometric flows and hyperbolic metrics.

idea_spark.idea: Consider replacing the mean curvature condition with more general curvature constraints to explore analogous phenomena under different geometric flows.
idea_spark.risk: Small changes in boundary conditions may cause failure of convergence or blow-up, requiring careful verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The construction starting from geodesic balls in hyperbolic space inspires the study of similar phenomena in other symmetric spaces.

papers.title: Direct construction of scalar quantum fields by L{é}vy fields -- nontrivial exact Wightman fields in a wider field with a relaxed Gårding-Wightman Axioms-
papers.summary: This paper introduces partial results, in the current situation, of ongoing considerations corresponding to the above title. A construction on exact relativistic quantum field model with the space time dimension $d \in {\mathbb N}$, including the case where $d \geq 4$, is going to be discussed. Firstly, Hermitian scalar quantum fields $<{\cal H}, U, ψ, D>$, within a relaxed framework of the Gårding-Wightman Axioms, is constructed by making use of the stochastic calculus arguments with respect to the {\it{stationary additive random fields }} on ${\mathbb R}^d$, i.e., the {\it{L{é}vy random fields}} on ${\mathbb R}^d$. The first constructed $<{\cal H}, U, ψ, D>$, here, satisfy all the requirements of the the Gårding-Wightman Axioms, except that the field operators $ψ(f)$ with $f \in {\cal S}({\mathbb R}^d \to {\mathbb R})$ are symmetric operators on the physical Hilbert space ${\cal H}$, which situation is denoted here as {\it{a relaxed framework}} of the Gårding-Wightman Axioms. Secondly, by taking the adequate subspaces of ${\cal H}$, non trivial exact Wightman quantum fields, which satisfy all the requirements of the Gårding-Wightman Axioms, are constructed actually.   keywords: Axiomatic quantum field theory, Gårding-Wightman axioms, Bochner-Minlos theorem, L{é}vy fields on ${\mathbb R}^d$.

ai.tldr: 本文在放宽的Gårding-Wightman公理框架下，利用Lévy随机场构造了精确的标量量子场，并进一步通过取子空间得到了满足所有公理的非平凡Wightman场。
ai.motivation: 在d≥4的高维时空中构造精确的量子场模型，并探索放宽公理框架下的场论可能性。
ai.method: 使用平稳可加随机场（Lévy场）的随机微积分论证，构造Hermite标量量子场，再通过取适当子空间得到严格Wightman场。
ai.result: 得到了满足放宽公理要求的对称算子场，以及满足全部Gårding-Wightman公理的非平凡精确Wightman场。
ai.help_to_user: 为高维时空中的量子场构造提供了新的数学工具和放宽公理的思路。

idea_spark.idea: 利用随机场构造量子场，可能为处理非微扰效应或高维问题提供新途径。
idea_spark.risk: 放宽公理可能导致物理诠释困难，需验证场算子的自伴性等关键性质。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将随机过程与公理化场论结合，启发其他领域如随机量子力学或随机几何的研究。

zh.motivation: 在d≥4的高维时空中构造精确的量子场模型，并探索放宽公理框架下的场论可能性。
zh.method: 使用平稳可加随机场（Lévy场）的随机微积分论证，构造Hermite标量量子场，再通过取适当子空间得到严格Wightman场。
zh.result: 得到了满足放宽公理要求的对称算子场，以及满足全部Gårding-Wightman公理的非平凡精确Wightman场。

en.tldr: This paper constructs exact scalar quantum fields using Lévy random fields within a relaxed Gårding-Wightman framework, and then obtains nontrivial exact Wightman fields satisfying all axioms by taking appropriate subspaces.
en.motivation: To construct exact quantum field models in high spacetime dimensions (d≥4) and explore field theory under relaxed axioms.
en.method: Using stochastic calculus of stationary additive random fields (Lévy fields) to construct Hermitian scalar quantum fields, then taking suitable subspaces to obtain strict Wightman fields.
en.result: Symmetric operator fields satisfying the relaxed axioms, and nontrivial exact Wightman fields satisfying all Gårding-Wightman axioms.
en.help_to_user: Provides new mathematical tools and a relaxed axiom approach for constructing quantum fields in high dimensions.

idea_spark.idea: Using random fields to construct quantum fields may offer new ways to handle non-perturbative effects or high-dimensional problems.
idea_spark.risk: Relaxing axioms may lead to difficulties in physical interpretation; key properties like self-adjointness need verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining stochastic processes with axiomatic field theory inspires research in stochastic quantum mechanics or stochastic geometry.

papers.title: Mixing times of Langevin dynamics for spiked matrix models
papers.summary: We investigate the Langevin dynamics for Wigner matrices with a spherical spike, in the regime where the signal-to-noise ratio $θ$ is large, but order one. For large, order-$1$, signal-to-noise, the (worst-case) mixing time undergoes a sharp transition around the critical inverse temperature $β_c(θ) = \frac{1}θ$. Namely, if $β= α/θ$, and $α<1$ then at large $θ$ the mixing time is $O(\log N)$, and if $α>1$ it is exponential in $N$. We show that initialized from the uniform-at-random spherical prior, however, the mixing time in the low-temperature $α>1$ regime circumvents the exponential bottleneck and the mixing time is $O(\log N)$. In fact, this fast mixing holds for any initialization that is symmetric with respect to the top eigenvector of the spiked matrix. Using this, we are able to show a low-temperature metastability picture, pinning down the exact exponential rate of the (worst-case initialization) mixing time for low temperatures, showing it is given by the difference of the free energies of the spiked and null models.

ai.tldr: 研究了球面尖峰Wigner矩阵的Langevin动力学混合时间，发现当信噪比大且阶数为1时，混合时间在临界逆温度附近发生尖锐转变。
ai.motivation: 理解高维统计推断中Langevin动力学的收敛行为，特别是尖峰矩阵模型在有限信噪比下的混合时间。
ai.method: 理论分析，利用对称初始化（相对于尖峰矩阵的最大特征向量）来规避指数瓶颈，并计算自由能差。
ai.result: 当初始化均匀随机球面先验时，低温区混合时间为O(log N)，而非指数时间；确定了最坏情况初始化下低温混合时间的精确指数速率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解Langevin动力学在尖峰矩阵模型中的混合时间行为，以及初始化对收敛速度的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模型对称性（如相对于特征向量的对称性）设计初始化，可能显著改善MCMC算法的收敛性。
idea_spark.risk: 对称性假设可能过于严格，实际应用中难以保证初始化满足该条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计物理中的自由能差和相变角度分析混合时间，启发将类似方法用于其他随机矩阵或神经网络模型。

en.tldr: Investigates the mixing time of Langevin dynamics for Wigner matrices with a spherical spike, revealing a sharp transition around the critical inverse temperature and showing that symmetric initialization can avoid exponential bottlenecks.
en.motivation: To understand the convergence behavior of Langevin dynamics in high-dimensional statistical inference, specifically for spiked matrix models at finite signal-to-noise ratios.
en.method: Theoretical analysis, leveraging symmetric initialization (with respect to the top eigenvector of the spiked matrix) to bypass exponential bottlenecks, and computing free energy differences.
en.result: With uniform spherical prior initialization, the mixing time in the low-temperature regime is O(log N) instead of exponential; the exact exponential rate for worst-case initialization is determined by the free energy difference between spiked and null models.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the mixing time behavior of Langevin dynamics in spiked matrix models and the impact of initialization on convergence speed.

idea_spark.idea: Exploiting model symmetries (e.g., symmetry with respect to eigenvectors) in initialization may significantly improve the convergence of MCMC algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The symmetry assumption may be too restrictive, making it difficult to guarantee such initialization in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analyzing mixing times via free energy differences and phase transitions from statistical physics inspires similar approaches for other random matrix or neural network models.

papers.title: Superintegrable 2D systems in magnetic fields with a parabolic type integral
papers.summary: We consider the problem on the existence of two dimensional superintegrable systems in the presence of a magnetic field in the two dimensional Euclidean space. We assume the existence of two integrals of motion, besides the Hamiltonian, that are quadratic polynomials in the momenta. This problem was already studied in the cases where one integral is of Cartesian or polar type [J. Bérubé, and P. Winternitz, J. Math. Phys., 45(5): 1959-1973, 2004]. We continue the investigation by assuming that one of the integrals is of parabolic type and the second integral is of elliptic or (''non-standard'') parabolic type, confirming so far that, on the Euclidean plane, the only two dimensional superintegrable system with quadratic integrals is the one with constant magnetic field and constant electrostatic potential.

ai.tldr: 研究了二维欧几里得空间中存在磁场时超可积系统的存在性，假设存在两个二次动量多项式积分，其中一个为抛物型，另一个为椭圆型或非标准抛物型，最终确认只有常磁场和常静电势的系统是超可积的。
ai.motivation: 扩展先前关于笛卡尔型和极型积分的研究，探索抛物型积分在磁场中超可积系统的可能性。
ai.method: 假设哈密顿量之外存在两个二次动量多项式积分，其中一个为抛物型，另一个为椭圆型或非标准抛物型，通过分析积分条件推导系统形式。
ai.result: 在欧几里得平面上，唯一具有二次积分的二维超可积系统是常磁场和常静电势系统。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解磁场中二维超可积系统的分类，特别是抛物型积分的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将抛物型积分与更一般的势函数结合，探索非均匀磁场下的超可积性。
idea_spark.risk: 可能面临积分条件过于严格，导致只有平凡解的风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受先前笛卡尔型和极型积分研究的启发，继续系统分类工作。

en.tldr: We study the existence of two-dimensional superintegrable systems in a magnetic field on the Euclidean plane, assuming two quadratic polynomial integrals of motion, one of parabolic type and the other of elliptic or non-standard parabolic type, confirming that the only such system is the one with constant magnetic field and constant electrostatic potential.
en.motivation: To extend previous work on Cartesian and polar type integrals to parabolic type integrals in magnetic fields.
en.method: Assume two quadratic momentum integrals besides the Hamiltonian, one parabolic and the other elliptic or non-standard parabolic, and derive constraints on the system.
en.result: On the Euclidean plane, the only two-dimensional superintegrable system with quadratic integrals is the constant magnetic field and constant electrostatic potential system.
en.help_to_user: Provides classification of superintegrable systems in magnetic fields with parabolic integrals.

idea_spark.idea: Explore non-uniform magnetic fields combined with more general potentials while retaining parabolic integrals.
idea_spark.risk: The integral conditions may be too restrictive, yielding only trivial solutions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the systematic classification of integrals in Cartesian and polar coordinates.

papers.title: Importance Sampling in Expensive Finite-Sum Optimization via Contextual Bandit Methods
papers.summary: In computational science workflows, it is often the case that 1) objective functions for optimization involve multiple simulation outputs, and 2) those simulations can be performed (at least partially) in parallel. In this work, we reexamine past work on a class of randomized algorithms, stochastic average model (SAM) methods. SAM methods are conceptually similar to stochastic average gradient methods, and effectively require that only randomized subsets of simulation outputs be locally modeled in each iteration of a model-based optimization method. This work focuses on the question of how best to perform this randomization of subset selection, especially in settings where there exists useful side information such as alternative lower-fidelity simulations, pre-trained emulators or domain expertise from humans or AI models. In particular, we consider the problem of generating sampling distributions for SAM methods as a contextual bandit problem and we apply the Exponential weights algorithm for Exploration and Exploitation with Experts (Exp4). We provide some preliminary numerical results on synthetic problems.

ai.tldr: 提出将昂贵有限和优化中的子集选择随机化视为上下文赌博机问题，并应用Exp4算法生成采样分布。
ai.motivation: 在计算科学工作流中，目标函数常涉及多个模拟输出，且模拟可部分并行。现有随机平均模型方法需随机选择子集，但如何利用侧信息（如低保真模拟、预训练模拟器或领域知识）优化选择尚未充分研究。
ai.method: 将子集选择的采样分布生成建模为上下文赌博机问题，采用Exp4算法（带专家建议的探索与利用指数加权算法）进行在线学习。
ai.result: 在合成问题上提供了初步数值结果，表明该方法能有效利用侧信息改进采样。
ai.help_to_user: 若您处理昂贵有限和优化问题且拥有侧信息，可参考本方法设计自适应采样策略，减少计算开销。

idea_spark.idea: 将Exp4算法与多保真度建模结合，利用低保真模拟作为专家建议，在每次迭代中自适应调整采样分布。
idea_spark.risk: 合成问题结果可能无法直接推广至真实复杂工作流；Exp4算法的性能高度依赖专家建议的质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机平均梯度方法启发，将子集选择视为在线学习问题，利用赌博机算法实现探索与利用的平衡。

en.tldr: Proposes to treat subset selection randomization in expensive finite-sum optimization as a contextual bandit problem and applies the Exp4 algorithm to generate sampling distributions.
en.motivation: In computational science workflows, objective functions often involve multiple simulation outputs that can be partially parallelized. Existing stochastic average model methods require random subset selection, but how to leverage side information (e.g., lower-fidelity simulations, pre-trained emulators, or domain expertise) for better selection remains underexplored.
en.method: Formulates the generation of sampling distributions for subset selection as a contextual bandit problem and applies the Exp4 algorithm (Exponential weights for Exploration and Exploitation with Experts) for online learning.
en.result: Provides preliminary numerical results on synthetic problems, demonstrating the effectiveness of leveraging side information to improve sampling.
en.help_to_user: If you are dealing with expensive finite-sum optimization and have access to side information, this method can help design adaptive sampling strategies to reduce computational cost.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the Exp4 algorithm with multi-fidelity modeling, using lower-fidelity simulations as expert advice to adaptively adjust sampling distributions each iteration.
idea_spark.risk: Results on synthetic problems may not generalize to real complex workflows; Exp4 performance heavily depends on the quality of expert advice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by stochastic average gradient methods, the work reframes subset selection as an online learning problem, leveraging bandit algorithms to balance exploration and exploitation.

papers.title: The Legendre structure of the TAP complexity for the Ising spin glass
papers.summary: We study the complexity of the Thouless-Anderson-Palmer (TAP) free energy for Ising spin glasses with a general mixed p-spin covariance, working with the generalized TAP functional of Chen, Panchenko, and Subag. We formulate three conjectures about the complexity (i.e. number of critical points). First, the annealed complexity is given by the Legendre transform of a variational functional constructed from the Parisi formula subject to a constraint on the overlap mass at zero, thereby establishing a precise link between the enumeration of TAP states and the large-deviation rate function of the partition function. Second, the quenched complexity is governed by the Legendre transform of a closely related functional in which the mass up to -- but not including -- the supremum of the support is constrained. Third, TAP states at any non-equilibrium free-energy level are organized into an ultrametric hierarchy, with ancestor states at other levels appearing only in subexponential number. Using a Kac-Rice computation combined with a supersymmetric ansatz, we establish a lower bound on the annealed complexity that matches the prediction of the first conjecture. We further extend the analysis to a conditional setting in which a hierarchical "skeleton" of ancestors is prescribed, providing additional evidence in support of the second and third conjectures.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了伊辛自旋玻璃中TAP自由能的复杂度，提出了三个关于临界点数量的猜想，并通过Kac-Rice计算和超对称假设建立了退火复杂度的下界。
ai.motivation: 理解TAP自由能临界点的计数与Parisi公式及大偏差率函数之间的精确联系。
ai.method: 利用Kac-Rice公式结合超对称假设进行退火复杂度下界推导，并扩展到条件层次骨架分析。
ai.result: 退火复杂度由带零重叠质量约束的Parisi泛函的Legendre变换给出；淬火复杂度由支撑上确界处质量约束的类似泛函的Legendre变换控制；TAP态形成超度量层次结构。
ai.help_to_user: 为自旋玻璃中TAP态的枚举和层次结构提供了严格的理论框架和计算工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将TAP复杂度与Parisi公式的约束变分问题联系起来，可能启发新的数值算法来高效计算临界点数目。
idea_spark.risk: 超对称假设和Kac-Rice计算的严格性在一般混合p-自旋模型中仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 超度量层次结构在非平衡自由能水平上的出现，暗示了类似结构可能存在于其他复杂能量景观中。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了伊辛自旋玻璃中TAP自由能的复杂度，提出了三个关于临界点数量的猜想，并通过Kac-Rice计算和超对称假设建立了退火复杂度的下界。
zh.motivation: 理解TAP自由能临界点的计数与Parisi公式及大偏差率函数之间的精确联系。
zh.method: 利用Kac-Rice公式结合超对称假设进行退火复杂度下界推导，并扩展到条件层次骨架分析。
zh.result: 退火复杂度由带零重叠质量约束的Parisi泛函的Legendre变换给出；淬火复杂度由支撑上确界处质量约束的类似泛函的Legendre变换控制；TAP态形成超度量层次结构。
zh.help_to_user: 为自旋玻璃中TAP态的枚举和层次结构提供了严格的理论框架和计算工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将TAP复杂度与Parisi公式的约束变分问题联系起来，可能启发新的数值算法来高效计算临界点数目。
idea_spark.risk: 超对称假设和Kac-Rice计算的严格性在一般混合p-自旋模型中仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 超度量层次结构在非平衡自由能水平上的出现，暗示了类似结构可能存在于其他复杂能量景观中。

en.tldr: This paper studies the complexity of the TAP free energy for Ising spin glasses, proposes three conjectures on the number of critical points, and establishes a lower bound on the annealed complexity via Kac-Rice computation and a supersymmetric ansatz.
en.motivation: To understand the precise link between the enumeration of TAP states and the large-deviation rate function of the partition function via the Parisi formula.
en.method: Kac-Rice formula combined with a supersymmetric ansatz to derive a lower bound on the annealed complexity, extended to a conditional hierarchical skeleton setting.
en.result: The annealed complexity is given by the Legendre transform of a constrained Parisi functional; the quenched complexity by a similar transform with mass constraint up to the supremum of the support; TAP states form an ultrametric hierarchy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous theoretical framework and computational tools for enumerating TAP states and understanding their hierarchical organization in spin glasses.

idea_spark.idea: Linking TAP complexity to the constrained variational problem of the Parisi formula may inspire new numerical algorithms for efficiently counting critical points.
idea_spark.risk: The rigor of the supersymmetric ansatz and Kac-Rice computation remains to be verified for general mixed p-spin models.
idea_spark.inspiration: The emergence of an ultrametric hierarchy at non-equilibrium free-energy levels suggests similar structures may exist in other complex energy landscapes.

papers.title: Efficient INT8 Single-Image Super-Resolution via Deployment-Aware Quantization and Teacher-Guided Training
papers.summary: Efficient single-image super-resolution (SISR) requires balancing reconstruction fidelity, model compactness, and robustness under low-bit deployment, which is especially challenging for x3 SR. We present a deployment-oriented quantized SISR framework based on an extract-refine-upsample design. The student performs most computation in the low-resolution space and uses a lightweight re-parameterizable backbone with PixelShuffle reconstruction, yielding a compact inference graph. To improve quality without significantly increasing complexity, we adopt a three-stage training pipeline: Stage 1 learns a basic reconstruction mapping with spatial supervision; Stage 2 refines fidelity using Charbonnier loss, DCT-domain supervision, and confidence-weighted output-level distillation from a Mamba-based teacher; and Stage 3 applies quantization-aware training directly on the fused deploy graph. We further use weight clipping and BatchNorm recalibration to improve quantization stability. On the MAI 2026 Quantized 4K Image Super-Resolution Challenge test set, our final AIO MAI submission achieves 29.79 dB PSNR and 0.8634 SSIM, obtaining a final score of 1.8 under the target mobile INT8 deployment setting. Ablation on Stage 3 optimization shows that teacher-guided supervision improves the dynamic INT8 TFLite reconstruction from 29.91 dB/0.853 to 30.0003 dB/0.856, while the fixed-shape deployable INT8 TFLite artifact attains 30.006 dB/0.857.

ai.tldr: 提出一种面向部署的INT8量化单图像超分辨率框架，通过三阶段训练和教师指导，在移动端实现高效高保真重建。
ai.motivation: 低比特部署下，单图像超分辨率需平衡重建质量、模型紧凑性和鲁棒性，尤其对x3 SR挑战大。
ai.method: 采用提取-细化-上采样设计，学生网络在低分辨率空间计算，使用轻量可重参数化骨干和PixelShuffle；三阶段训练：基础映射、Charbonnier损失+DCT域监督+置信加权输出级蒸馏、量化感知训练；权重裁剪和批归一化重校准提升稳定性。
ai.result: 在MAI 2026挑战测试集上PSNR 29.79 dB、SSIM 0.8634，移动INT8部署得分1.8；教师指导使动态INT8 TFLite重建从29.91 dB/0.853提升至30.0003 dB/0.856。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一套完整的低比特超分辨率部署方案，含训练和量化技巧，可直接用于移动端图像增强。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Mamba教师替换为更轻量的Transformer教师，或引入自适应比特分配。
idea_spark.risk: 教师模型复杂度高，可能增加训练成本；量化稳定性依赖超参数调优。
idea_spark.inspiration: DCT域监督和置信加权蒸馏为提升量化模型质量提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes a deployment-oriented INT8 quantized single-image super-resolution framework with three-stage training and teacher guidance, achieving efficient high-fidelity reconstruction on mobile devices.
en.motivation: Low-bit deployment of SISR requires balancing reconstruction quality, model compactness, and robustness, especially challenging for x3 SR.
en.method: Uses extract-refine-upsample design; student operates in low-resolution space with lightweight re-parameterizable backbone and PixelShuffle; three-stage training: basic mapping, Charbonnier loss + DCT supervision + confidence-weighted output distillation from Mamba teacher, quantization-aware training; weight clipping and BatchNorm recalibration for stability.
en.result: On MAI 2026 challenge test set: 29.79 dB PSNR, 0.8634 SSIM, mobile INT8 score 1.8; teacher guidance improves dynamic INT8 TFLite from 29.91 dB/0.853 to 30.0003 dB/0.856.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete low-bit super-resolution deployment pipeline with training and quantization techniques, ready for mobile image enhancement.

idea_spark.idea: Explore replacing Mamba teacher with lighter Transformer teacher or introducing adaptive bit allocation.
idea_spark.risk: Teacher model complexity may increase training cost; quantization stability depends on hyperparameter tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: DCT-domain supervision and confidence-weighted distillation offer new perspectives for improving quantized model quality.

papers.title: Rate-Cost Tradeoffs in Nonlinear Control
papers.summary: We study the rate-cost tradeoff in rate-limited control of general stochastic control systems, including nonlinear systems, over a finite horizon. At each time step, an encoder observes the state and transmits a description to a controller, which then selects the control action. For an average control-cost threshold $D$, we characterize the minimum achievable communication rate $R_n(D)$ via a nonasymptotic bound: $R_n(D)$ lies within an additive logarithmic gap of the optimal value of a directed-information minimization $F_n(D)$, namely, we show that $F_n(D) \le R_n(D) \le F_n(D)+\log \bigl(F_n(D)+3.4\bigr)+2+\frac{1}{n}$, in bits. This establishes directed information as the operationally relevant quantity governing rate-limited control, thereby broadening its utility beyond its previously established roles in causal source coding and linear quadratic Gaussian (LQG) control to general nonlinear control systems. We prove the upper bound constructively by building an encoding-and-control policy using the strong functional representation lemma at each time step. As special cases of our setting, our framework yields nonasymptotic bounds for sequential (causal) rate-distortion and LQG control.

ai.tldr: 研究了有限时域内一般随机控制系统（包括非线性系统）中通信速率与控制成本之间的权衡，并给出了最小可达通信速率的非渐近界。
ai.motivation: 现有理论主要针对线性二次高斯（LQG）系统，缺乏对非线性系统速率-成本权衡的通用刻画。
ai.method: 利用强函数表示引理在每个时间步构造编码与控制策略，并基于有向信息最小化推导出速率上下界。
ai.result: 证明了最小可达速率 $R_n(D)$ 与有向信息最小化 $F_n(D)$ 之间相差一个对数加性项，从而将有向信息确立为非线性控制中速率受限控制的操作相关量。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计非线性系统的低速率控制方案提供了理论下界和构造性方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将强函数表示引理用于实时编码，可能启发新的在线压缩算法。
idea_spark.risk: 非渐近界中的对数项在实际低速率场景下可能不可忽略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴信息论中的率失真思想解决控制问题，可进一步探索分布式控制中的信息约束。

en.tldr: We study the rate-cost tradeoff in rate-limited control of general stochastic control systems, including nonlinear systems, over a finite horizon, and characterize the minimum achievable communication rate via a nonasymptotic bound.
en.motivation: Existing theory mainly addresses linear quadratic Gaussian (LQG) systems, lacking a general characterization for nonlinear systems.
en.method: We construct an encoding-and-control policy using the strong functional representation lemma at each time step, and derive upper and lower bounds based on directed information minimization.
en.result: We show that the minimum achievable rate $R_n(D)$ lies within an additive logarithmic gap of the directed information minimization $F_n(D)$, establishing directed information as the operationally relevant quantity for rate-limited control in nonlinear systems.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical lower bounds and constructive methods for designing low-rate control schemes for nonlinear systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using the strong functional representation lemma for real-time encoding may inspire new online compression algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The logarithmic gap in the nonasymptotic bound may be non-negligible in practical low-rate regimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing rate-distortion ideas from information theory to address control problems can further explore information constraints in distributed control.

papers.title: Solving Minimax Problems with Bilinear Objectives with ADMM
papers.summary: We consider minimax (saddle-point) problems of the form max_{c \in C} min_{β\in S} g(c; β), where C and S are compact convex sets, and g is concave-convex. Applying the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) requires evaluating a proximal operator that is, in general, as hard as the original problem. We show that when the outcome function g is bilinear, i.e. g(c; β) = c^T A β, the proximal operator reduces to a generalized projection onto the confidence region S. This reduction is exact -- it involves no approximation or linearization. The resulting ADMM algorithm alternates between (i) a generalized projection onto S and (ii) a Euclidean projection onto C. We describe the derivation, state the algorithm, and discuss convergence.

ai.tldr: 本文提出使用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）求解双线性目标的最小最大问题，并证明此时近端算子可简化为广义投影。
ai.motivation: 标准ADMM求解最小最大问题时，近端算子计算与原问题同样困难，需要更高效的替代方案。
ai.method: 当目标函数为双线性形式时，将ADMM中的近端算子精确简化为对置信区域S的广义投影，算法交替进行广义投影和欧几里得投影。
ai.result: 推导了简化后的ADMM算法，讨论了收敛性，无需近似或线性化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何高效求解双线性最小最大问题，特别是利用ADMM的投影简化。

idea_spark.idea: 将ADMM应用于更一般的双线性博弈或对抗训练场景。
idea_spark.risk: 简化依赖于双线性假设，对于非线性目标可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用问题结构简化算法步骤，避免复杂子问题求解。

en.tldr: This paper proposes using ADMM to solve minimax problems with bilinear objectives, showing that the proximal operator reduces to a generalized projection.
en.motivation: Standard ADMM for minimax problems requires solving a proximal operator as hard as the original problem, motivating a more efficient approach.
en.method: When the objective is bilinear, the ADMM proximal operator is exactly reduced to a generalized projection onto the confidence region S, alternating with a Euclidean projection onto C.
en.result: The derivation and algorithm are presented, with convergence discussed, requiring no approximation or linearization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently solve bilinear minimax problems by leveraging ADMM with simplified projections.

idea_spark.idea: Apply ADMM to more general bilinear games or adversarial training scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: The simplification relies on bilinearity and may fail for nonlinear objectives.
idea_spark.inspiration: Exploit problem structure to simplify algorithm steps and avoid complex subproblem solving.

papers.title: On the regularity index of the minimum distance function in projective nested Cartesian codes
papers.summary: Let $X$ be a projective nested product of fields and let $δ_X(d)$ be the minimum distance in degree $d\geq 1$ of the projective nested Cartesian code $C_X(d)$. The regularity index ${\rm reg}(δ_X)$ of the minimum distance function $δ_X$ is the minimum integer $d_0\geq 0$ such that $δ_X(d)=1$ for $d\geq d_0$. We give a formula for ${\rm reg}(δ_X)$ by determining an indicator function of least degree for each point of $X$ and using the fact that ${\rm reg}(δ_X)$ is the ${\rm v}$-number of the vanishing ideal $I_X$ of $X$. Then we give an arithmetical criterion that characterizes when $X$ is Cayley--Bacharach.

ai.tldr: 本文给出了射影嵌套笛卡尔码的最小距离函数的正则指标公式，并刻画了Cayley-Bacharach性质。
ai.motivation: 研究射影嵌套笛卡尔码的最小距离函数的正则指标，并建立其与消失理想的v-数的联系。
ai.method: 通过确定X中每个点的最小次数指示函数，利用正则指标等于消失理想I_X的v-数这一事实，推导出公式。
ai.result: 得到了正则指标reg(δ_X)的显式公式，并给出了X为Cayley-Bacharach的算术判别准则。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解射影嵌套笛卡尔码的最小距离函数的渐近行为及其代数几何刻画。

idea_spark.idea: 利用指示函数和v-数统一处理最小距离函数的正则性，可能简化类似问题的分析。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法依赖于射影嵌套结构的特殊性，推广到一般情形可能需要额外条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数几何角度重新审视编码理论中的正则性概念，启发新的交叉研究方向。

en.tldr: This paper gives a formula for the regularity index of the minimum distance function of projective nested Cartesian codes and characterizes the Cayley-Bacharach property.
en.motivation: To study the regularity index of the minimum distance function for projective nested Cartesian codes and relate it to the v-number of the vanishing ideal.
en.method: By determining an indicator function of least degree for each point of X and using the fact that the regularity index equals the v-number of the vanishing ideal I_X.
en.result: An explicit formula for reg(δ_X) is obtained, along with an arithmetic criterion for X to be Cayley-Bacharach.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the asymptotic behavior of the minimum distance function of projective nested Cartesian codes and its algebraic-geometric characterization.

idea_spark.idea: Using indicator functions and v-numbers to unify the analysis of regularity in minimum distance may simplify similar problems.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the special structure of projective nested products; generalization may require additional conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting regularity concepts in coding theory from an algebraic geometry perspective inspires new cross-disciplinary directions.

papers.title: Beyond Hagedorn: A Harmonic Approach to $T\bar{T}$-deformation
papers.summary: We apply harmonic analysis to study the $T\bar{T}$-deformed torus partition function. We first express the CFT partition functions in terms of Maass waveforms, including the Eisenstein series and cusp forms. These basis functions turn out to deform in a very simple way under the $T\bar{T}$-deformation. The spectral decomposition provides a numerically stable and efficient method to compute the partition function at finite values of the deformation parameter $λ$, allowing us to clearly resolve the analytic structure of the partition function as a function of $λ$. The resulting deformed partition function exhibits a Hagedorn singularity. Building on harmonic analysis approach, we propose a natural analytic continuation beyond the Hagedorn singularity, which enables us to compute the full partition function for any value of $λ$.

ai.tldr: 本文利用调和分析研究T\bar{T}形变环面配分函数，提出超越Hagedorn奇点的解析延拓方法。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在有限形变参数下计算配分函数存在数值不稳定性和解析结构不清晰的问题。
ai.method: 将CFT配分函数用Maass波形（包括Eisenstein级数和尖点形式）展开，利用这些基函数在形变下的简单变换性质进行谱分解。
ai.result: 得到了数值稳定高效的配分函数计算方法，清晰揭示了Hagedorn奇点，并提出了超越该奇点的自然解析延拓。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种处理T\bar{T}形变配分函数的新工具，尤其适用于解析延拓和奇点分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Maass波形基函数简化形变下的计算，并借助谱分解实现稳定数值计算。
idea_spark.risk: 解析延拓的唯一性和物理合理性需要进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将数论中的调和分析工具引入量子场论形变研究，可能开辟新的理论路径。

zh.motivation: 现有方法在有限形变参数下计算配分函数存在数值不稳定性和解析结构不清晰的问题。
zh.method: 将CFT配分函数用Maass波形（包括Eisenstein级数和尖点形式）展开，利用这些基函数在形变下的简单变换性质进行谱分解。
zh.result: 得到了数值稳定高效的配分函数计算方法，清晰揭示了Hagedorn奇点，并提出了超越该奇点的自然解析延拓。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种处理T\bar{T}形变配分函数的新工具，尤其适用于解析延拓和奇点分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Maass波形基函数简化形变下的计算，并借助谱分解实现稳定数值计算。
idea_spark.risk: 解析延拓的唯一性和物理合理性需要进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将数论中的调和分析工具引入量子场论形变研究，可能开辟新的理论路径。

en.tldr: This paper applies harmonic analysis to study the T\bar{T}-deformed torus partition function and proposes an analytic continuation beyond the Hagedorn singularity.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from numerical instability and unclear analytic structure when computing the partition function at finite deformation parameter.
en.method: Express CFT partition functions in terms of Maass waveforms (Eisenstein series and cusp forms), which deform simply under T\bar{T}-deformation, and perform spectral decomposition.
en.result: A numerically stable and efficient method is obtained, clearly resolving the Hagedorn singularity and providing a natural analytic continuation for any deformation parameter.
en.help_to_user: Offers a new tool for computing T\bar{T}-deformed partition functions, especially useful for analytic continuation and singularity analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Use Maass waveform basis to simplify deformation calculations and achieve stable numerics via spectral decomposition.
idea_spark.risk: The uniqueness and physical validity of the analytic continuation need further verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bringing number-theoretic harmonic analysis tools into quantum field theory deformations may open new theoretical avenues.

papers.title: Centering Ecological Goals in Automated Identification of Individual Animals
papers.summary: Recognizing individual animals over time is central to many ecological and conservation questions, including estimating abundance, survival, movement, and social structure. Recent advances in automated identification from images and even acoustic data suggest that this process could be greatly accelerated, yet their promise has not translated well into ecological practice. We argue that the main barrier is not the performance of the automated methods themselves, but a mismatch between how those methods are typically developed and evaluated, and how ecological data is actually collected, processed, reviewed, and used. Future progress, therefore, will depend less on algorithmic gains alone than on recognizing that the usefulness of automated identification is grounded in ecological context: it depends on what question is being asked, what data are available, and what kinds of mistakes matter. Only by centering these questions can we move toward automated identification of individuals that is not only accurate but also ecologically useful, transparent, and trustworthy.

ai.tldr: 论文指出自动个体识别技术未能有效应用于生态实践，主要障碍不是算法性能，而是开发评估方式与生态数据实际采集、处理和使用之间的不匹配。
ai.motivation: 自动识别个体动物对生态学至关重要，但现有方法在生态实践中转化不佳，需要找出根本原因。
ai.method: 通过分析自动识别方法的开发评估流程与生态数据实际使用之间的差异，论证生态情境（问题、数据、错误容忍度）是决定实用性的关键。
ai.result: 未来进步取决于将生态目标置于中心，而非单纯算法改进，才能实现准确、生态有用、透明且可信的自动识别。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助生态学家和AI开发者理解自动识别技术落地的关键瓶颈，指导设计更符合实际需求的识别系统。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个生态情境驱动的自动识别评估框架，根据具体问题（如种群估计、个体追踪）动态调整算法选择和错误容忍度。
idea_spark.risk: 过度强调情境可能导致算法通用性下降，增加定制化成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生态学中“问题驱动”的研究范式获得启发，反思AI开发中“性能驱动”的单一评价标准。
