idea_spark.risk: 指标设计可能过度依赖特定运动类型，泛化到复杂交互场景时需调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生物力学领域引入关节力矩、能量消耗等物理量，提升评估的物理真实性。

en.tldr: Proposes HumanScore, a systematic framework to evaluate the quality of human motions in AI-generated videos.
en.motivation: Existing video generation models lack systematic evaluation of human motion quality despite producing realistic content.
en.method: Defines six interpretable metrics (kinematic plausibility, temporal stability, biomechanical consistency), uses carefully designed prompts to elicit diverse movements, and evaluates 13 state-of-the-art models.
en.result: Reveals gaps between perceptual plausibility and biomechanical fidelity, identifies recurrent failure modes such as temporal jitter, anatomically implausible poses, and motion drift.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand deficiencies in generated human motions and guides model improvement.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate physics simulators (e.g., MuJoCo) to generate reference motions for stricter biomechanical constraint validation.
idea_spark.risk: Metrics may be overly tailored to specific motion types and require adaptation for complex interaction scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introduce biomechanical quantities such as joint torque and energy expenditure to enhance physical realism of evaluation.

papers.title: Bayesian approach for uncertainty quantification of hybrid spectral unmixing in $γ$-ray spectrometry
papers.summary: Identifying and quantifying $γ$-emitting radionuclides, considering spectral deformation from $γ$-interactions in radioactive source surroundings, present a significant challenge in $γ$-ray spectrometry. In that context, a hybrid machine learning method has been previously proposed to jointly estimate the counting and spectral signatures of $γ$-emitters under conditions of spectral variability. This paper addresses the uncertainty quantification of the estimators (i.e., the counting and the variable $λ$ which characterizes the spectral signatures) obtained by this spectral unmixing algorithm. The focus is on the coverage interval, as defined by the GUM, which corresponds closely to a credible interval in the Bayesian framework. Given the inverse problem and the constraints associated with spectral deformation, two Bayesian methods - Laplace approximation and Markov Chain Monte Carlo - have been developed for uncertainty quantification to ensure robust decision-making. The Laplace approximation technique approximates the posterior distribution by a Gaussian distribution, while the Markov Chain Monte Carlo technique samples the posterior distribution. This study evaluates these two methods in terms of precision of coverage interval based on repeated Monte Carlo samples using the long-run success rate. Numerical experiments show that both methods yield similar results close to the expected success rate of 95.4$\%$ when constraints related to spectral signatures deformation and counting are inactive. However, when constraints are active or the background counting significantly dominates other radionuclides, the Laplace approximation method deviates from the expected long-run success rate due to the non-Gaussian posterior distribution. In such cases, the Markov Chain Monte Carlo method still provides robust results.

ai.tldr: 针对γ能谱混合解混算法，提出贝叶斯方法量化计数与光谱特征估计的不确定性，并比较拉普拉斯近似与马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛两种方法的覆盖区间精度。
ai.motivation: γ能谱中放射性核素的识别与定量受光谱变形影响，现有混合机器学习方法虽能联合估计计数与光谱特征，但缺乏对估计量的不确定性量化，影响决策可靠性。
ai.method: 基于贝叶斯框架，采用拉普拉斯近似（高斯近似后验）和马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（采样后验）两种方法，计算符合GUM定义的覆盖区间，并通过蒙特卡洛重复样本的长程成功率评估精度。
ai.result: 当光谱变形与计数约束不活跃时，两种方法均接近95.4%的预期成功率；约束活跃或本底计数占优时，拉普拉斯近似因后验非高斯而偏离，马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛仍稳健。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解γ能谱解混中估计量的不确定性，指导在约束条件下选择更稳健的量化方法（如MCMC）。

idea_spark.idea: 将拉普拉斯近似与MCMC结合，在约束不活跃时用快速近似，约束活跃时切换至MCMC，实现效率与鲁棒性的平衡。
idea_spark.risk: MCMC计算成本高，且后验分布高维时采样效率可能下降；拉普拉斯近似在非高斯情况下误差不可控。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴GUM覆盖区间与贝叶斯可信区间的对应关系，将计量学标准与贝叶斯方法融合，提升不确定性量化的规范性。

en.tldr: Proposes Bayesian methods (Laplace approximation and MCMC) to quantify uncertainty of counting and spectral signature estimates in hybrid spectral unmixing for γ-ray spectrometry, comparing coverage interval precision.
en.motivation: Identifying and quantifying γ-emitting radionuclides under spectral deformation is challenging; existing hybrid ML methods lack uncertainty quantification for robust decision-making.
en.method: Develops Laplace approximation (Gaussian posterior) and Markov Chain Monte Carlo (posterior sampling) for coverage intervals per GUM, evaluated via long-run success rate on repeated Monte Carlo samples.
en.result: Both methods achieve ~95.4% success rate when constraints are inactive; under active constraints or dominant background, Laplace deviates due to non-Gaussian posterior, while MCMC remains robust.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand estimation uncertainty in γ-ray spectral unmixing and guides selection of robust quantification methods (e.g., MCMC) under constraint conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Laplace approximation for speed when constraints are inactive and MCMC for robustness when active, balancing efficiency and accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: MCMC is computationally expensive and may suffer from sampling inefficiency in high-dimensional posteriors; Laplace approximation yields unreliable intervals under non-Gaussianity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage the correspondence between GUM coverage intervals and Bayesian credible intervals to integrate metrological standards with Bayesian methods for standardized uncertainty quantification.

papers.title: Persistent Homology of the Wiener Sausage II: A Central Limit Theorem for Drifted Planar Brownian Motion
papers.summary: Let $X_t = B_t + μt$, $t \geq 0$, be planar Brownian motion with nonzero drift, and let $K_t^r = \{x \in \mathbb{R}^2 : {\rm dist}(x, X[0,t]) \leq r\}$ be the radius-$r$ Wiener sausage up to time $t$. For a bounded Borel function $ψ$ supported in a compact interval $[r_0, r_1] \subset (0,\infty)$, consider the smoothed Betti-curve functional $Φ_ψ(t) := \int_{r_0}^{r_1} β_1^t(r)\,ψ(r)\,dr$, where $β_1^t(r)$ denotes the number of holes of $K_t^r$. In a previous paper, a regeneration scheme along the drift direction was used to prove a law of large numbers for $Φ_ψ(t)$. In the present paper we prove the corresponding central limit theorem. More precisely, there exist a deterministic constant $ρ_ψ$ and a variance $σ_ψ^2 \geq 0$ such that $(Φ_ψ(t) - ρ_ψt)/\sqrt{t} \xrightarrow{d}_{t \to \infty} \mathcal{N}(0, σ_ψ^2)$. We also obtain the finite-dimensional Gaussian limit for finitely many test functions. The proof preserves the regenerative structure of the law of large numbers, but requires a new $L^2$ analysis of the topological interface terms created at regeneration cuts. The key input is a finite-time polynomial moment bound for integrated hole counts of the Wiener sausage. This yields square-integrability of cycle increments, within-cycle oscillations, and the last incomplete-cycle remainder, which in turn allows one to combine a standard central limit theorem for stationary $1$-dependent sequences with a renewal time-change argument.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了带漂移平面布朗运动维纳香肠的持久同调中心极限定理。
ai.motivation: 在前期工作建立了大数定律后，需要进一步证明相应的中心极限定理，以刻画拓扑泛函的波动性。
ai.method: 利用漂移方向上的再生结构，结合L²分析拓扑界面项，并借助平稳1-相依序列的中心极限定理与更新时间变换论证。
ai.result: 得到了光滑Betti曲线泛函的中心极限定理，以及有限维高斯极限。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解随机过程拓扑特征的渐近分布提供了严格的理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将拓扑特征分解为再生块，利用平稳相依序列的中心极限定理处理。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶矩估计和界面项的控制可能依赖于具体过程，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合概率再生方法与代数拓扑，为随机拓扑数据分析开辟新路径。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合概率再生方法与代数拓扑，为随机拓扑数据分析开辟新路径。

en.tldr: This paper proves a central limit theorem for the persistent homology of the Wiener sausage generated by planar Brownian motion with nonzero drift.
en.motivation: After establishing a law of large numbers in a previous work, the corresponding central limit theorem is needed to characterize the fluctuations of topological functionals.
en.method: Leveraging the regenerative structure along the drift direction, combined with L² analysis of topological interface terms, and applying a central limit theorem for stationary 1-dependent sequences with a renewal time-change argument.
en.result: A central limit theorem for the smoothed Betti curve functional is obtained, along with a finite-dimensional Gaussian limit.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous theoretical tools for understanding the asymptotic distribution of topological features of stochastic processes.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose topological features into regenerative blocks and apply the central limit theorem for stationary 1-dependent sequences.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-moment estimates and control of interface terms may depend heavily on the specific process, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining probabilistic regeneration methods with algebraic topology opens new avenues for stochastic topological data analysis.

papers.title: ConeSep: Cone-based Robust Noise-Unlearning Compositional Network for Composed Image Retrieval
papers.summary: The Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) task provides a flexible retrieval paradigm via a reference image and modification text, but it heavily relies on expensive and error-prone triplet annotations. This paper systematically investigates the Noisy Triplet Correspondence (NTC) problem introduced by annotations. We find that NTC noise, particularly ``hard noise'' (i.e., the reference and target images are highly similar but the modification text is incorrect), poses a unique challenge to existing Noise Correspondence Learning (NCL) methods because it breaks the traditional ``small loss hypothesis''. We identify and elucidate three key, yet overlooked, challenges in the NTC task, namely (C1) Modality Suppression, (C2) Negative Anchor Deficiency, and (C3) Unlearning Backlash. To address these challenges, we propose a Cone-based robuSt noisE-unlearning comPositional network (ConeSep). Specifically, we first propose Geometric Fidelity Quantization, theoretically establishing and practically estimating a noise boundary to precisely locate noisy correspondence. Next, we introduce Negative Boundary Learning, which learns a ``diagonal negative combination'' for each query as its explicit semantic opposite-anchor in the embedding space. Finally, we design Boundary-based Targeted Unlearning, which models the noisy correction process as an optimal transport problem, elegantly avoiding Unlearning Backlash. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets (FashionIQ and CIRR) demonstrate that ConeSep significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods, which fully demonstrates the effectiveness and robustness of our method.

ai.tldr: 提出ConeSep方法，系统解决组合图像检索中噪声三元组对应问题，尤其针对“硬噪声”，通过几何保真量化、负边界学习和边界定向反学习三大模块，显著提升检索鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有组合图像检索依赖昂贵且易错的三元组标注，噪声（尤其是硬噪声）导致传统噪声对应学习方法失效，且存在模态抑制、负锚缺失和反学习反弹三大未充分研究的挑战。
ai.method: 首先提出几何保真量化，理论建立并估计噪声边界以精确定位噪声对应；然后引入负边界学习，为每个查询学习“对角负组合”作为显式语义相反锚点；最后设计边界定向反学习，将噪声纠正建模为最优传输问题，避免反学习反弹。
ai.result: 在FashionIQ和CIRR基准数据集上，ConeSep显著优于当前最先进方法，验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 若您处理含噪声标注的图像检索任务，ConeSep提供了系统的噪声处理框架，尤其适用于参考图与目标图高度相似但文本错误的情况。

idea_spark.idea: 将噪声纠正建模为最优传输问题，避免反学习反弹，这一思路可启发设计更稳定的噪声鲁棒训练策略。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖噪声边界的准确估计，若噪声分布复杂或边界模糊，可能影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“对角负组合”作为语义相反锚点的设计，可启发在对比学习中构建更有效的负样本策略。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从“对角负组合”作为语义相反锚点的设计，可启发在对比学习中构建更有效的负样本策略。

en.tldr: Proposes ConeSep to systematically address the noisy triplet correspondence problem in composed image retrieval, especially hard noise, via geometric fidelity quantization, negative boundary learning, and boundary-based targeted unlearning, achieving significant improvements.
en.motivation: Existing composed image retrieval relies on expensive and error-prone triplet annotations; noise (especially hard noise) breaks traditional noise correspondence learning methods, and three overlooked challenges (modality suppression, negative anchor deficiency, unlearning backlash) remain unsolved.
en.method: First proposes geometric fidelity quantization to theoretically establish and practically estimate a noise boundary for precise noise localization; then introduces negative boundary learning to learn a diagonal negative combination as explicit semantic opposite anchor; finally designs boundary-based targeted unlearning modeling noise correction as an optimal transport problem to avoid unlearning backlash.
en.result: On FashionIQ and CIRR benchmarks, ConeSep significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating effectiveness and robustness.
en.help_to_user: If you deal with noisy annotations in image retrieval tasks, ConeSep provides a systematic noise-handling framework, especially for cases where reference and target images are highly similar but text is incorrect.

idea_spark.idea: Modeling noise correction as an optimal transport problem to avoid unlearning backlash can inspire more stable noise-robust training strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may depend on accurate noise boundary estimation; complex noise distributions could degrade effectiveness.
idea_spark.inspiration: The design of diagonal negative combination as semantic opposite anchor can inspire more effective negative sampling strategies in contrastive learning.

papers.title: Optimizing Data Augmentation for Real-Time Small UAV Detection: A Lightweight Context-Aware Approach
papers.summary: Visual detection of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is a critical task in surveillance systems due to their small physical size and environmental challenges. Although deep learning models have achieved significant progress, deploying them on edge devices necessitates the use of lightweight models, such as YOLOv11 Nano, which possess limited learning capacity. In this research, an efficient and context-aware data augmentation pipeline, combining Mosaic strategies and HSV color-space adaptation, is proposed to enhance the performance of these models. Experimental results on four standard datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach, compared to heavy and instance-level methods like Copy-Paste, not only prevents the generation of synthetic artifacts and overfitting but also significantly improves mean Average Precision (mAP) across all scenarios. Furthermore, the evaluation of generalization capability under foggy conditions revealed that the proposed method offers the optimal balance between Precision and stability for real-time systems, whereas alternative methods, such as MixUp, are effective only in specific applications.

ai.tldr: 提出一种轻量级上下文感知的数据增强管道，结合Mosaic和HSV颜色空间自适应，提升YOLOv11 Nano在小型无人机实时检测中的性能。
ai.motivation: 边缘设备上部署的轻量模型学习能力有限，现有数据增强方法（如Copy-Paste）易产生合成伪影和过拟合。
ai.method: 设计结合Mosaic拼接策略与HSV颜色空间自适应的数据增强管道，避免实例级增强的伪影。
ai.result: 在四个标准数据集上，该方法相比Copy-Paste等方法显著提升mAP，且在雾天条件下保持精度与稳定性的最佳平衡。
ai.help_to_user: 为边缘设备上的实时无人机检测提供了一种高效、鲁棒的数据增强方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将HSV自适应与动态场景光照估计结合，实现更智能的增强参数调整。
idea_spark.risk: 在极端天气或光照变化剧烈的场景中，HSV自适应可能引入颜色失真。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从轻量模型有限容量出发，设计数据增强而非模型结构改进，启发了一种新的优化思路。

idea_spark.risk: 在极端天气或光照变化剧烈的场景中，HSV自适应可能引入颜色失真。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从轻量模型有限容量出发，设计数据增强而非模型结构改进，启发了一种新的优化思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a lightweight context-aware data augmentation pipeline combining Mosaic and HSV color-space adaptation to boost YOLOv11 Nano for real-time small UAV detection.
en.motivation: Lightweight models on edge devices have limited learning capacity, and existing augmentation methods like Copy-Paste cause synthetic artifacts and overfitting.
en.method: Designs a data augmentation pipeline with Mosaic stitching and HSV color-space adaptation, avoiding instance-level augmentation artifacts.
en.result: On four standard datasets, the method significantly improves mAP over Copy-Paste and achieves the best precision-stability trade-off under foggy conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and robust data augmentation solution for real-time UAV detection on edge devices.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining HSV adaptation with dynamic scene illumination estimation for smarter augmentation parameter tuning.
idea_spark.risk: In extreme weather or drastic illumination changes, HSV adaptation may introduce color distortion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the limited capacity of lightweight models to design data augmentation rather than model architecture changes inspires a new optimization direction.

papers.title: Lucky High Dynamic Range Smartphone Imaging
papers.summary: While the human eye can perceive an impressive twenty stops of dynamic range, smartphone camera sensors remain limited to about twelve stops despite decades of research. A variety of high dynamic range (HDR) image capture and processing techniques have been proposed, and, in practice, they can extend the dynamic range by 3-5 stops for handheld photography. This paper proposes an approach that robustly captures dynamic range using a handheld smartphone camera and lightweight networks suitable for running on mobile devices. Our method operates indirectly on linear raw pixels in bracketed exposures. Every pixel in the final HDR image is a convex combination of input pixels in the neighborhood, adjusted for exposure, and thus avoids hallucination artifacts typical of recent deep image synthesis networks. We validate our system on both synthetic imagery and unseen real bracketed images -- we confirm zero-shot generalization of the method to smartphone camera captures. Our iterative inference architecture is capable of processing an arbitrary number of bracketed input photos, and we show examples from capture stacks containing 3--9 images. Our training process relies only on synthetic captures yet generalizes to unseen real photos from several cameras. Moreover, we show that this training scheme improves other SOTA methods over their pretrained counterparts.

ai.tldr: 提出一种适用于手持智能手机的鲁棒高动态范围成像方法，使用轻量网络处理包围曝光图像，避免幻觉伪影，并实现零样本泛化。
ai.motivation: 智能手机传感器动态范围有限（约12档），而人眼可感知20档，现有HDR技术仅能提升3-5档，且存在伪影问题。
ai.method: 在包围曝光的线性原始像素上间接操作，每个最终HDR像素是邻域输入像素的凸组合（经曝光调整），使用轻量迭代推理架构处理任意数量的输入图像。
ai.result: 在合成图像和未见过的真实包围曝光图像上验证了零样本泛化能力，处理3-9张图像堆栈，训练仅依赖合成数据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用智能手机拍摄高动态范围照片，并了解一种避免伪影的轻量级算法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将凸组合思想用于视频HDR或低光照增强，利用时间邻域像素。
idea_spark.risk: 凸组合可能限制极端动态范围场景的细节恢复，需验证高对比度边缘表现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受传统HDR融合启发，结合轻量网络实现鲁棒性，避免深度合成网络的幻觉问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a robust HDR imaging method for handheld smartphones using lightweight networks on bracketed exposures, avoiding hallucination artifacts and achieving zero-shot generalization.
en.motivation: Smartphone sensors have limited dynamic range (~12 stops) vs. human eye (20 stops), and existing HDR techniques only extend by 3-5 stops with artifacts.
en.method: Operates indirectly on linear raw pixels of bracketed exposures; each final HDR pixel is a convex combination of neighborhood input pixels adjusted for exposure, using a lightweight iterative architecture that handles arbitrary number of input images.
en.result: Validated on synthetic and unseen real bracketed images with zero-shot generalization, processing stacks of 3-9 images, trained solely on synthetic data.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to capture HDR photos with smartphones and learn about a lightweight algorithm that avoids artifacts.

idea_spark.idea: Explore convex combination for video HDR or low-light enhancement using temporal neighborhood pixels.
idea_spark.risk: Convex combination may limit detail recovery in extreme dynamic range scenes; needs validation on high-contrast edges.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by traditional HDR fusion, combined with lightweight networks for robustness, avoiding hallucination of deep synthesis networks.

papers.title: Optimization of Constrained Quasiconformal Mapping for Origami Design
papers.summary: Origami structures, particularly Miura-ori patterns, offer unique capabilities for surface approximation and deployable designs. In this study, a constrained mapping optimization algorithm is designed for designing surface-aligned Miura-ori via a narrow band approximation of the input surface. The Miura-fold, embedded in the narrow band, is parameterized to a planar domain, and a mapping is computed on the parameter pattern by optimizing certain energy terms and constraints. Extensive experiments are conducted, showing the significance and flexibility of our methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种约束拟共形映射优化算法，用于设计表面对齐的Miura-ori折纸结构。
ai.motivation: 现有折纸设计方法难以精确贴合任意曲面，需要一种灵活且高效的映射优化方法。
ai.method: 通过输入曲面的窄带近似，将Miura折痕参数化到平面域，并优化能量项和约束条件来计算映射。
ai.result: 大量实验表明该方法在曲面逼近和可展开设计中的有效性和灵活性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用拟共形映射优化设计贴合曲面的折纸结构。

idea_spark.idea: 将窄带近似与参数化映射结合，为复杂曲面上的折纸设计提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 窄带近似可能限制对高度非规则曲面的适用性，优化收敛性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将几何映射优化用于柔性材料或超材料的设计。

en.tldr: A constrained quasiconformal mapping optimization algorithm is proposed for designing surface-aligned Miura-ori origami structures.
en.motivation: Existing origami design methods struggle to precisely conform to arbitrary surfaces, necessitating a flexible and efficient mapping optimization approach.
en.method: The Miura-fold is parameterized to a planar domain via a narrow band approximation of the input surface, and a mapping is computed by optimizing energy terms and constraints.
en.result: Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of the method for surface approximation and deployable designs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to design origami structures conforming to surfaces using constrained quasiconformal mapping optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Combining narrow band approximation with parametric mapping offers a new approach for origami design on complex surfaces.
idea_spark.risk: The narrow band approximation may limit applicability to highly irregular surfaces, and convergence of optimization needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the use of geometric mapping optimization for designing flexible materials or metamaterials.

papers.title: Forward-looking evolutionary game dynamics subject to exploration cost
papers.summary: We extend classical evolutionary game dynamics based on the momentary action choices of agents by accounting for two elements: forward-looking behavior and exploration cost. We focus on pairwise comparison protocols that cover major evolutionary game dynamics, such as replicator and logit models. In the proposed mathematical framework, agents update their actions by paying a cost so that a utility or its relative difference is maximized. We show that forward-looking behavior can be modeled as a coupling between the evolutionary game dynamic and static Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation: a mean field game. The exploration cost and its constraint are naturally related to these equations as a function of the optimal Lagrangian multiplier serving as a relaxation parameter, and it is incorporated into the game as a constraint. We show that under certain conditions, our evolutionary game dynamic admits a unique solution. Finally, we computationally investigate one- and two-dimensional problems.

ai.tldr: 将前瞻性行为和探索成本引入经典演化博弈动力学，建立与平均场博弈的耦合模型。
ai.motivation: 经典演化博弈仅考虑即时行动选择，忽略前瞻性和探索成本，本文旨在弥补这一不足。
ai.method: 通过成对比较协议，将前瞻性行为建模为演化博弈与静态Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程的耦合，即平均场博弈；探索成本作为约束，通过最优拉格朗日乘子松弛处理。
ai.result: 在特定条件下证明了演化博弈动力学的唯一解，并通过一维和二维算例验证。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了考虑前瞻性和成本约束的演化博弈建模框架，可用于分析智能体策略更新中的理性与成本权衡。

idea_spark.idea: 将探索成本视为可调参数，研究其对系统均衡和收敛速度的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设智能体完全理性且成本结构已知，可能偏离实际行为。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经济学中前瞻性决策和最优控制启发，将演化博弈从被动适应转向主动规划。

en.tldr: Extends classical evolutionary game dynamics by incorporating forward-looking behavior and exploration cost, coupling with mean field game theory.
en.motivation: Classical evolutionary game dynamics only consider immediate action choices, ignoring forward-looking behavior and exploration cost; this work aims to address that gap.
en.method: Using pairwise comparison protocols, forward-looking behavior is modeled as a coupling between evolutionary game dynamics and the static Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation (mean field game); exploration cost is treated as a constraint relaxed via optimal Lagrangian multiplier.
en.result: Proves uniqueness of solution under certain conditions, and validates with one- and two-dimensional computational examples.
en.help_to_user: Provides a modeling framework for evolutionary games that accounts for forward-looking behavior and cost constraints, useful for analyzing rationality-cost trade-offs in agent strategy updates.

idea_spark.idea: Treat exploration cost as a tunable parameter to study its impact on equilibrium and convergence speed.
idea_spark.risk: Assumes agents are fully rational and cost structure is known, which may deviate from real behavior.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by forward-looking decision-making and optimal control in economics, shifting evolutionary games from passive adaptation to active planning.

papers.title: On the Informativeness of Security Commit Messages: A Large-scale Replication Study
papers.summary: The informativeness of security-related commit messages is crucial for patch triage: when high, it enables the rapid distribution and deployment of security fixes. Prior research (Reis et al., 2023) reported, however, that commit messages are often too uninformative to support these activities. To assess the robustness of this negative result, we independently replicate the original study using only the information provided in the paper, without reusing any of the original artifacts (data, analysis pipeline, etc.). We retrieve \num{50673} security-related commits and analyze their informativeness using an independent re-implementation of the techniques introduced by Reis et al. For the same source (i.e., GitHub) and time period (from June 1999 to August 2022) as the original study, our replication confirms the original findings in a statistically significant way: security-related commit messages are, in general, not informative enough for security-focused purposes. We then extend the original study in several ways. Over a longer time period (from June 1999 to October 2025), we find that commit-message informativeness is worsening. Breaking results down by software ecosystem (Linux kernel, Ubuntu, Go, PyPI, etc.), we observe significant differences in informativeness. Finally, we examine emerging best practices for writing commit messages, such as the Conventional Commits Specification (CCS), and again find significant differences in an unexpected direction: CCS-compliant commits are less informative than non-compliant ones. Our findings highlight the need for cross-ecosystem analyses to understand platform- and community-specific commit-message practices, and to inform the development and adoption of universally applicable guidelines for writing informative security-related commit messages.

ai.tldr: 通过大规模复制研究，确认安全相关提交消息普遍信息不足，且趋势恶化；不同软件生态系统间差异显著；符合常规提交规范的提交消息信息量反而更低。
ai.motivation: 安全提交消息的信息量对补丁分类和快速部署至关重要，但先前研究指出其普遍不足。为验证该结论的稳健性，进行独立复制研究。
ai.method: 独立检索50673个安全相关提交，重新实现原始研究技术，分析信息量；并扩展时间跨度、按生态系统细分、评估常规提交规范的影响。
ai.result: 复制结果显著支持原始结论；信息量随时间恶化；Linux内核、Ubuntu、Go、PyPI等生态系统间差异显著；符合常规提交规范的提交消息信息量更低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全从业者了解提交消息信息量的现状与趋势，指导编写更有效的安全提交消息。

idea_spark.idea: 开发基于机器学习的提交消息信息量自动评分工具，辅助开发者改进消息质量。
idea_spark.risk: 自动评分可能忽略上下文特殊性，导致误判。
idea_spark.inspiration: 跨生态系统差异提示社区特定实践的重要性，可启发定制化指南研究。

en.tldr: A large-scale replication study confirms that security-related commit messages are generally uninformative, with worsening trends over time; significant differences exist across software ecosystems, and Conventional Commits Specification compliance is associated with lower informativeness.
en.motivation: To assess the robustness of prior findings that security commit messages are often too uninformative for patch triage and rapid deployment.
en.method: Independently retrieved 50,673 security-related commits, re-implemented original analysis techniques, extended the time period, broke down by ecosystem, and evaluated the impact of Conventional Commits Specification.
en.result: Replication confirmed original results with statistical significance; informativeness is worsening; significant differences across ecosystems; CCS-compliant commits are less informative.
en.help_to_user: Provides empirical evidence on the state and trends of security commit message informativeness, guiding practitioners to write better messages.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an automated tool to score commit message informativeness using machine learning, helping developers improve message quality.
idea_spark.risk: Automated scoring may miss context-specific nuances, leading to inaccurate assessments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Cross-ecosystem differences highlight the need for community-specific guidelines, inspiring tailored best-practice studies.

papers.title: Variational Principles for Shock Dynamics in Compressible Euler Flows
papers.summary: Hamilton's principle plays a central role in fluid mechanics as a fundamental tool for deriving governing equations, analyzing conservation laws, and designing structure-preserving numerical schemes. However, its classical formulation is restricted to smooth solutions and does not directly accommodate shock discontinuities. Addressing this limitation within a variational framework has long been a challenging issue. In this paper, we develop a variational framework that extends Hamilton's principle to shock solutions in compressible fluid dynamics. For the barotropic Euler equations, we introduce a modified action principle that incorporates additional contributions localized at discontinuities. This allows the Rankine--Hugoniot conditions for mass and momentum to emerge directly from unrestricted variations, without imposing continuity across shocks. The additional term admits a natural interpretation as a dissipation potential, linking the variational structure to energy loss at shocks. We then extend the approach to the full compressible Euler equations. Using a variational formulation of nonequilibrium thermodynamics together with suitable variational and phenomenological constraints, we recover the Rankine--Hugoniot relations for mass, momentum, and energy. This yields a unified variational description of shock dynamics in compressible fluids and highlights a fundamental distinction between barotropic and full compressible models in the treatment of energy and entropy at discontinuities.

ai.tldr: 将哈密顿原理推广到可压缩欧拉流中的激波解，通过引入间断处的附加项，直接从无限制变分导出兰金-雨贡纽条件，并统一描述了激波动力学。
ai.motivation: 经典哈密顿原理仅适用于光滑解，无法直接处理激波间断，长期缺乏统一的变分框架。
ai.method: 在正压欧拉方程中修改作用量，加入间断局部贡献；对完全欧拉方程，结合非平衡热力学变分公式与现象学约束。
ai.result: 成功从变分原理导出质量、动量和能量的兰金-雨贡纽条件，揭示了正压与完全模型在能量/熵处理上的根本区别。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计保结构数值格式和分析激波动力学提供了严格的变分基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将激波处的耗散势与熵产生率直接关联，可能用于构建更精确的激波捕捉数值方法。
idea_spark.risk: 变分推导依赖于特定的现象学约束，可能不适用于强非平衡或复杂物态方程情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受非平衡热力学变分原理启发，将间断视为热力学耗散结构，统一了守恒律与熵增。

idea_spark.risk: 变分推导依赖于特定的现象学约束，可能不适用于强非平衡或复杂物态方程情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受非平衡热力学变分原理启发，将间断视为热力学耗散结构，统一了守恒律与熵增。

en.tldr: Extends Hamilton's principle to shock solutions in compressible Euler flows by adding localized contributions at discontinuities, deriving Rankine-Hugoniot conditions from unrestricted variations, and unifying shock dynamics.
en.motivation: Classical Hamilton's principle is restricted to smooth solutions and cannot directly handle shock discontinuities, lacking a unified variational framework.
en.method: Modifies the action for barotropic Euler equations with discontinuity contributions; for full Euler equations, combines nonequilibrium thermodynamics variational formulation with phenomenological constraints.
en.result: Successfully derives Rankine-Hugoniot conditions for mass, momentum, and energy from variational principles, highlighting the fundamental difference between barotropic and full models in energy/entropy treatment.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous variational foundation for designing structure-preserving numerical schemes and analyzing shock dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Directly linking the dissipation potential at shocks to entropy production may enable more accurate shock-capturing numerical methods.
idea_spark.risk: The variational derivation relies on specific phenomenological constraints, which may not hold for strong nonequilibrium or complex equations of state.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by nonequilibrium thermodynamics variational principles, treating discontinuities as thermodynamic dissipative structures unifies conservation laws and entropy increase.

papers.title: Benefits of Low-Cost Bio-Inspiration in the Age of Overparametrization
papers.summary: While Central Pattern Generators (CPGs) and Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLP) are widely used paradigms in robot control, few systematic studies have been performed on the relative merits of large parameter spaces. In contexts where input and output spaces are small and performance is bounded, having more parameters to optimize may actively hinder the learning process instead of empowering it. To empirically measure this, we submit a given robot morphology, with limited proprioceptive capabilities, to controller optimization under two bio-inspired paradigms (CPGs and MLPs) with evolutionary- and reinforcement- trainer protocols. By varying parameter spaces across multiple reward functions, we observe that shallow MLPs and densely connected CPGs result in better performance when compared to deeper MLPs or Actor-Critic architectures. To account for the relationship between said performance and the number of parameters, we introduce a Parameter Impact metric which demonstrates that the additional parameters required by the reinforcement technique do not translate into better performance, thus favouring evolutionary strategies.

ai.tldr: 在参数空间较小的机器人控制任务中，过度参数化会阻碍学习，而低成本的生物启发式方法（如CPG和浅层MLP）比深层网络或强化学习架构表现更好。
ai.motivation: 系统比较CPG和MLP在机器人控制中的优劣，特别是参数规模对学习效果的影响。
ai.method: 对同一机器人形态，使用进化策略和强化学习两种训练协议，在多种奖励函数下改变参数空间，并引入参数影响指标衡量性能与参数数量的关系。
ai.result: 浅层MLP和密集连接的CPG优于深层MLP或Actor-Critic架构；强化学习增加的参数并未带来性能提升，进化策略更优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在资源受限的机器人控制场景中，选择简单、低成本的生物启发模型比过度参数化的深度模型更有效。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应参数剪枝策略，在训练过程中动态移除对性能贡献低的参数，结合进化策略优化。
idea_spark.risk: 过度简化模型可能丢失复杂行为表达能力，需在任务复杂度与参数效率间平衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 生物神经系统（如CPG）的稀疏连接和局部可塑性启发我们开发更高效的机器人控制器。

en.tldr: In robot control tasks with small input/output spaces, overparametrization hinders learning, and low-cost bio-inspired approaches (CPGs and shallow MLPs) outperform deeper networks or reinforcement learning architectures.
en.motivation: To systematically compare CPGs and MLPs in robot control, focusing on how parameter scale affects learning performance.
en.method: Using evolutionary and reinforcement training protocols on a fixed robot morphology with limited proprioception, varying parameter spaces across multiple reward functions, and introducing a Parameter Impact metric.
en.result: Shallow MLPs and densely connected CPGs outperform deeper MLPs or Actor-Critic architectures; additional parameters from reinforcement learning do not translate to better performance, favoring evolutionary strategies.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand that in resource-constrained robot control, simple low-cost bio-inspired models are more effective than overparametrized deep models.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive parameter pruning strategy that dynamically removes low-contribution parameters during training, combined with evolutionary optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Over-simplification may lose the ability to express complex behaviors; balance between task complexity and parameter efficiency is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The sparse connectivity and local plasticity of biological neural systems (e.g., CPGs) inspire more efficient robot controllers.

papers.title: Skyline-First Traversal as a Control Mechanism for Multi-Criteria Graph Search
papers.summary: In multi-criteria graph traversal, paths are compared via Pareto dominance, an ordering that identifies which paths are non-dominated, but says nothing about which path to expand next or when the search may stop. As a result, existing approaches rely on external mechanisms-heuristics, scalarization, or population-based exploration while Pareto dominance remains confined to passive roles such as pruning or ranking.   This paper shows that, under constrained cost models, finite cost grids, Markovian transitions, and a nonzero progress measure, Pareto geometry alone is sufficient to drive both scheduling and termination. We show that extracting exclusively from the first Pareto layer, the skyline, induces a deterministic descent in a discrete completion potential, ensuring monotone progress toward solution completion. In parallel, a vector lower-bound certificate provides a stopping condition that guarantees dominance coverage of all remaining traversals without requiring a predefined number of solutions.   Our analysis establishes deterministic potential descent, certified termination via dominance coverage, a uniform bound on layer width induced by cost-grid geometry, and greedy cost-space dispersion within the skyline. The resulting framework operates without scalarization, heuristic guidance, or probabilistic models, and repositions Pareto dominance from a passive filter to a deterministic driver of search.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种基于帕累托前沿（skyline）的确定性图搜索控制机制，无需启发式或标量化即可驱动调度和终止。
ai.motivation: 现有多准则图搜索依赖外部机制（如启发式、标量化）来指导扩展和终止，帕累托支配仅用于剪枝或排序，未能主动驱动搜索。
ai.method: 在有限成本网格、马尔可夫转移和非零进展度量的约束下，仅从第一帕累托层（skyline）提取信息，实现离散完成势的确定性下降；同时利用向量下界证书保证覆盖所有剩余遍历的支配性。
ai.result: 建立了确定性势下降、基于支配覆盖的终止认证、成本网格几何导致的层宽均匀界以及skyline内的贪婪成本空间分散。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需外部启发式或概率模型的图搜索控制方法，适用于多准则路径规划问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将skyline-first遍历与完成势结合，设计一种纯几何驱动的搜索算法，避免传统标量化或启发式的偏差。
idea_spark.risk: 对成本网格的几何性质要求较高，若实际问题的成本空间不满足有限网格或马尔可夫性，可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受帕累托前沿在优化中的被动角色启发，将其转化为主动搜索驱动力，类似地可探索其他被动机制（如约束传播）的主动化。

en.tldr: Proposes a deterministic graph search control mechanism based on the Pareto frontier (skyline), requiring no heuristics or scalarization to drive scheduling and termination.
en.motivation: Existing multi-criteria graph search relies on external mechanisms (e.g., heuristics, scalarization) to guide expansion and termination, while Pareto dominance is only used for pruning or ranking, not actively driving search.
en.method: Under constrained cost models (finite cost grids, Markovian transitions, nonzero progress measure), extracts information exclusively from the first Pareto layer (skyline) to induce deterministic descent in a discrete completion potential; a vector lower-bound certificate provides a stopping condition guaranteeing dominance coverage of all remaining traversals.
en.result: Establishes deterministic potential descent, certified termination via dominance coverage, uniform bound on layer width from cost-grid geometry, and greedy cost-space dispersion within the skyline.
en.help_to_user: Provides a search control method for multi-criteria graph traversal without external heuristics or probabilistic models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine skyline-first traversal with a completion potential to design a purely geometry-driven search algorithm, avoiding biases from traditional scalarization or heuristics.
idea_spark.risk: High reliance on geometric properties of the cost space; may fail if the problem's cost space does not satisfy finite grid or Markovian assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the passive role of Pareto frontiers in optimization, turning them into active search drivers; similarly, other passive mechanisms (e.g., constraint propagation) could be explored for active control.

papers.title: Seeing Further and Wider: Joint Spatio-Temporal Enlargement for Micro-Video Popularity Prediction
papers.summary: Micro-video popularity prediction (MVPP) aims to forecast the future popularity of videos on online media, which is essential for applications such as content recommendation and traffic allocation. In real-world scenarios, it is critical for MVPP approaches to understand both the temporal dynamics of a given video (temporal) and its historical relevance to other videos (spatial). However, existing approaches sufer from limitations in both dimensions: temporally, they rely on sparse short-range sampling that restricts content perception; spatially, they depend on flat retrieval memory with limited capacity and low efficiency, hindering scalable knowledge utilization. To overcome these limitations, we propose a unified framework that achieves joint spatio-temporal enlargement, enabling precise perception of extremely long video sequences while supporting a scalable memory bank that can infinitely expand to incorporate all relevant historical videos. Technically, we employ a Temporal Enlargement driven by a frame scoring module that extracts highlight cues from video frames through two complementary pathways: sparse sampling and dense perception. Their outputs are adaptively fused to enable robust long-sequence content understanding. For Spatial Enlargement, we construct a Topology-Aware Memory Bank that hierarchically clusters historically relevant content based on topological relationships. Instead of directly expanding memory capacity, we update the encoder features of the corresponding clusters when incorporating new videos, enabling unbounded historical association without unbounded storage growth. Extensive experiments on three widely used MVPP benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms 11 strong baselines across mainstream metrics, achieving robust improvements in both prediction accuracy and ranking consistency.

ai.tldr: 提出联合时空扩展框架，通过帧评分模块实现长序列感知，并构建拓扑感知记忆库实现无限历史关联，显著提升微视频流行度预测精度。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在时间维度依赖稀疏短程采样限制内容感知，空间维度依赖扁平检索记忆容量有限且效率低，无法有效利用历史视频知识。
ai.method: 时间扩展：帧评分模块通过稀疏采样和密集感知双路径提取高光线索并自适应融合；空间扩展：拓扑感知记忆库基于拓扑关系层次聚类历史内容，更新聚类编码器特征实现无限关联。
ai.result: 在三个基准数据集上，该方法在预测准确率和排序一致性上均优于11个强基线模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过联合时空扩展提升短视频流行度预测性能，以及框架设计的关键技术细节。

idea_spark.idea: 将拓扑感知记忆库与图神经网络结合，动态建模视频间复杂关系，进一步提升预测鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 层次聚类更新可能引入计算开销，需平衡记忆扩展效率与模型性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类记忆组织方式启发，利用拓扑关系实现高效历史关联，避免存储无限增长。

en.tldr: Proposes a joint spatio-temporal enlargement framework with a frame scoring module for long-sequence perception and a topology-aware memory bank for unbounded historical association, significantly improving micro-video popularity prediction.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from sparse short-range temporal sampling and flat retrieval memory with limited capacity and low efficiency, hindering effective utilization of historical video knowledge.
en.method: Temporal enlargement: a frame scoring module extracts highlight cues via sparse sampling and dense perception pathways with adaptive fusion. Spatial enlargement: a topology-aware memory bank hierarchically clusters historically relevant content and updates cluster encoder features for unbounded association.
en.result: Outperforms 11 strong baselines on three benchmarks in both prediction accuracy and ranking consistency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how joint spatio-temporal enlargement improves micro-video popularity prediction and the key technical details of the framework.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the topology-aware memory bank with graph neural networks to dynamically model complex video relationships for enhanced robustness.
idea_spark.risk: Hierarchical clustering updates may introduce computational overhead; balance memory expansion efficiency and model performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human memory organization, using topological relationships for efficient historical association without unbounded storage growth.

papers.title: Parallel-SFT: Improving Zero-Shot Cross-Programming-Language Transfer for Code RL
papers.summary: Modern language models demonstrate impressive coding capabilities in common programming languages (PLs), such as C++ and Python, but their performance in lower-resource PLs is often limited by training data availability. In principle, however, most programming skills are universal across PLs, so the capability acquired in one PL should transfer to others. In this work, we propose the task of zero-shot cross-programming-language transfer for code RL. We find that, for Llama-3.1, RL training for code generation in a source PL fails to improve, and sometimes even degrades, the performance on other target PLs. To address this, we hypothesize that effective RL transfer requires a generalizable SFT initialization before RL. We thus propose **Parallel-SFT**, an SFT strategy that incorporates "parallel programs" -- functionally equivalent code implemented in multiple PLs -- into the data mixture. We demonstrate that this improves transferability: when we subsequently perform RL on our Parallel-SFT model, we observe better generalization to unseen PLs. Analysis of the model internal representations reveals that Parallel-SFT leads to a more functionality-centric latent space, where equivalent programs across PLs are more tightly clustered, which we hypothesize to contribute to the improved transferability.

ai.tldr: 提出Parallel-SFT策略，通过在SFT阶段混合多语言并行程序，改善代码RL在未见编程语言上的零样本迁移性能。
ai.motivation: 代码RL在源语言上训练后，对目标语言性能提升有限甚至下降，需要可泛化的SFT初始化。
ai.method: 在SFT数据中加入功能等价的多语言并行程序（Parallel-SFT），然后进行RL训练。
ai.result: Parallel-SFT后的RL模型在未见语言上表现更好，且模型内部表示中跨语言等价程序聚类更紧密。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过数据混合策略提升代码RL的跨语言迁移能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在SFT阶段引入更多跨模态或跨任务的对齐数据，以增强RL的泛化性。
idea_spark.risk: 并行程序数据获取成本高，且可能引入语言特定噪声，影响模型稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从功能等价性出发，利用多语言并行数据对齐表示空间，启发其他跨域迁移方法。

en.tldr: Proposes Parallel-SFT, an SFT strategy that mixes parallel programs in multiple programming languages, to improve zero-shot cross-language transfer for code RL.
en.motivation: Code RL training on a source language fails to improve or even degrades performance on target languages, requiring a generalizable SFT initialization.
en.method: Incorporates functionally equivalent parallel programs across languages into the SFT data mixture, then performs RL.
en.result: RL on Parallel-SFT model achieves better generalization to unseen languages, with tighter clustering of cross-language equivalent programs in latent space.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how data mixing strategies can enhance cross-language transfer in code RL.

idea_spark.idea: Explore introducing cross-modal or cross-task alignment data during SFT to further improve RL generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Acquiring parallel program data is costly and may introduce language-specific noise, affecting model stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging functional equivalence via parallel data to align representation spaces inspires other cross-domain transfer methods.

papers.title: Finite-Length Empirical Comparison of Polar, PAC, and Invertible-Extractor Secrecy Codes over the Wiretap BSC
papers.summary: We compare three secrecy-coding schemes for the degraded wiretap binary symmetric channel (BSC) in the finite-blocklength regime: (i) polar wiretap coset codes, (ii) PAC codes used as wiretap coset codes, and (iii) the invertible-extractor (IE) framework of Bellare-Tessaro. Our comparison is empirical and uses a common semantic-secrecy metric (distinguishing advantage). For polar coset codes, we compute Eve's polarized bit-channel capacities (via the Tal-Vardy construction) to obtain explicit finite-length upper bounds on mutual-information leakage, yielding strong secrecy bounds. For PAC coset codes, we prove that Eve's synthesized bit-channels are equivalent to those of polar codes (up to a permutation), so the same leakage bounds apply; we then convert these strong-secrecy bounds into semantic-secrecy guarantees for symmetric wiretap channels. For the IE scheme, we use the closed-form semantic-secrecy bounds given in the reference work. Finally, we report finite-length results that jointly characterize (a) semantic-secrecy guarantees against Eve and (b) frame-error-rate performance at Bob, illustrating that PAC codes can significantly improve reliability without changing the secrecy bounds inherited from polar coding. Moreover, under the finite-length bounds considered in this work, polar/PAC secrecy codes provide tighter security guarantees than the invertible-extractor framework.

ai.tldr: 在有限码长下比较了三种窃听信道保密编码方案，发现PAC码在不改变保密界的前提下显著提升可靠性。
ai.motivation: 现有保密编码理论多基于渐近分析，实际有限码长性能尚不明确，需要实证比较。
ai.method: 采用区分优势作为语义安全度量，对极化码、PAC码和可逆提取器方案进行有限长性能计算与对比。
ai.result: PAC码在保持与极化码相同保密界的同时，显著改善Bob端的误帧率；极化/PAC码的安全保证优于可逆提取器方案。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解不同保密编码在有限码长下的实际安全-可靠性折中。

idea_spark.idea: 利用PAC码的速率兼容特性设计自适应保密编码。
idea_spark.risk: 实际实现中PAC码的复杂度可能高于极化码。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将极化码的保密分析工具应用于新型编码结构。

zh.tldr: 在有限码长下比较了三种窃听信道保密编码方案，发现PAC码在不改变保密界的前提下显著提升可靠性。
zh.motivation: 现有保密编码理论多基于渐近分析，实际有限码长性能尚不明确，需要实证比较。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将极化码的保密分析工具应用于新型编码结构。

en.tldr: Empirically compares three secrecy-coding schemes for the wiretap BSC in the finite-blocklength regime, showing PAC codes improve reliability without sacrificing secrecy bounds.
en.motivation: Existing secrecy coding theory is mostly asymptotic; finite-length performance needs empirical comparison.
en.method: Uses distinguishing advantage as semantic-secrecy metric; computes finite-length bounds for polar, PAC, and invertible-extractor schemes.
en.result: PAC codes achieve same secrecy bounds as polar codes but significantly better frame-error rate; polar/PAC codes provide tighter security guarantees than the invertible-extractor framework.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the practical security-reliability trade-offs of different secrecy codes at finite blocklengths.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit rate-compatible property of PAC codes for adaptive secrecy coding.
idea_spark.risk: Implementation complexity of PAC codes may be higher than polar codes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply polar-code secrecy analysis tools to novel code structures.

papers.title: Resolving space-sharing conflicts in road user interactions through uncertainty reduction: An active inference-based computational model
papers.summary: Understanding how road users resolve space-sharing conflicts is important both for traffic safety and the safe deployment of autonomous vehicles. While existing models have captured specific aspects of such interactions (e.g., explicit communication), a theoretically-grounded computational framework has been lacking. In this paper, we extend a previously developed active inference-based driver behavior model to simulate interactive behavior of two agents. Our model captures three complementary mechanisms for uncertainty reduction in interaction: (i) implicit communication via direct behavioral coupling, (ii) reliance on normative expectations (stop signs, priority rules, etc.), and (iii) explicit communication. In a simplified intersection scenario, we show that normative and explicit communication cues can increase the likelihood of a successful conflict resolution. However, this relies on agents acting as expected. In situations where another agent (intentionally or unintentionally) violates normative expectations or communicates misleading information, reliance on these cues may induce collisions. These findings illustrate how active inference can provide a novel framework for modeling road user interactions which is also applicable in other fields.

ai.tldr: 基于主动推理的计算模型，模拟道路使用者在空间共享冲突中通过减少不确定性（隐式沟通、规范期望、显式沟通）解决冲突，并揭示违规或误导信息可能导致碰撞。
ai.motivation: 现有模型仅捕捉交互的特定方面（如显式沟通），缺乏理论驱动的计算框架，而理解冲突解决对交通安全和自动驾驶部署至关重要。
ai.method: 扩展先前基于主动推理的驾驶员行为模型，模拟两个智能体的交互，整合三种不确定性减少机制：直接行为耦合的隐式沟通、规范期望（如停车标志、优先规则）和显式沟通。
ai.result: 规范期望和显式沟通线索可提高冲突解决成功率，但依赖对方按预期行动；当对方违规或提供误导信息时，这些线索可能导致碰撞。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解道路交互中不确定性减少的机制，为自动驾驶系统设计更安全的交互策略提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将模型扩展至多智能体（>2）或连续交互场景，并引入学习机制使智能体动态调整对规范期望的信任度。
idea_spark.risk: 模型简化了真实交互的复杂性（如连续动作、感知噪声），可能低估实际场景中的不确定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合贝叶斯推理与强化学习，让智能体在线学习其他代理的违规概率，从而自适应调整沟通策略。

en.tldr: An active inference-based computational model simulates how road users resolve space-sharing conflicts by reducing uncertainty through implicit communication, normative expectations, and explicit communication, revealing that violations or misleading cues can cause collisions.
en.motivation: Existing models capture only specific aspects of interactions (e.g., explicit communication) and lack a theoretically grounded computational framework, which is crucial for traffic safety and autonomous vehicle deployment.

idea_spark.risk: The model simplifies real-world complexity (e.g., continuous actions, perceptual noise), potentially underestimating uncertainty in actual scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine Bayesian inference with reinforcement learning to enable agents to online learn violation probabilities of others, thereby adaptively adjusting communication strategies.

papers.title: From Actions to Understanding: Conformal Interpretability of Temporal Concepts in LLM Agents
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents capable of reasoning, planning, and acting within interactive environments. Despite their growing capability to perform multi-step reasoning and decision-making tasks, internal mechanisms guiding their sequential behavior remain opaque. This paper presents a framework for interpreting the temporal evolution of concepts in LLM agents through a step-wise conformal lens. We introduce the conformal interpretability framework for temporal tasks, which combines step-wise reward modeling with conformal prediction to statistically label model's internal representation at each step as successful or failing. Linear probes are then trained on these representations to identify directions of temporal concepts - latent directions in the model's activation space that correspond to consistent notions of success, failure or reasoning drift. Experimental results on two simulated interactive environments, namely ScienceWorld and AlfWorld, demonstrate that these temporal concepts are linearly separable, revealing interpretable structures aligned with task success. We further show preliminary results on improving an LLM agent's performance by leveraging the proposed framework for steering the identified successful directions inside the model. The proposed approach, thus, offers a principled method for early failure detection as well as intervention in LLM-based agents, paving the path towards trustworthy autonomous language models in complex interactive settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于共形预测的框架，用于解释LLM智能体在交互环境中时间概念的演化，并通过线性探针识别成功/失败方向。
ai.motivation: LLM智能体在多步推理和决策中表现强大，但其内部机制不透明，缺乏对时间概念演化的可解释性。
ai.method: 结合逐步奖励建模与共形预测，对模型每步内部表示进行统计标记，再训练线性探针识别时间概念方向。
ai.result: 在ScienceWorld和AlfWorld环境中，时间概念线性可分，且通过引导成功方向可初步提升智能体性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM智能体决策过程，实现早期失败检测和干预。

idea_spark.idea: 利用共形预测的不确定性量化，结合探针方向进行在线模型校正。
idea_spark.risk: 线性探针可能无法捕捉复杂非线性概念，且共形预测的校准依赖环境分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将统计可靠性引入可解释性，为安全关键应用提供理论保障。

en.tldr: Proposes a conformal prediction-based framework to interpret temporal concept evolution in LLM agents, identifying success/failure directions via linear probes.
en.motivation: LLM agents excel at multi-step reasoning but their internal mechanisms remain opaque, lacking interpretability for temporal concept evolution.
en.method: Combines step-wise reward modeling with conformal prediction to statistically label internal representations, then trains linear probes to identify temporal concept directions.
en.result: Temporal concepts are linearly separable in ScienceWorld and AlfWorld, and steering successful directions preliminarily improves agent performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand LLM agent decision processes, enabling early failure detection and intervention.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage conformal prediction uncertainty quantification with probe directions for online model correction.
idea_spark.risk: Linear probes may miss complex nonlinear concepts, and conformal calibration depends on environment distribution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introduces statistical reliability into interpretability, providing theoretical guarantees for safety-critical applications.

papers.title: X-Cache: Cross-Chunk Block Caching for Few-Step Autoregressive World Models Inference
papers.summary: Real-time world simulation is becoming a key infrastructure for scalable evaluation and online reinforcement learning of autonomous driving systems. Recent driving world models built on autoregressive video diffusion achieve high-fidelity, controllable multi-camera generation, but their inference cost remains a bottleneck for interactive deployment. However, existing diffusion caching methods are designed for offline video generation with multiple denoising steps, and do not transfer to this scenario. Few-step distilled models have no inter-step redundancy left for these methods to reuse, and sequence-level parallelization techniques require future conditioning that closed-loop interactive generation does not provide. We present X-Cache, a training-free acceleration method that caches along a different axis: across consecutive generation chunks rather than across denoising steps. X-Cache maintains per-block residual caches that persist across chunks, and applies a dual-metric gating mechanism over a structure- and action-aware block-input fingerprint to independently decide whether each block should recompute or reuse its cached residual. To prevent approximation errors from permanently contaminating the autoregressive KV cache, X-Cache identifies KV update chunks (the forward passes that write clean keys and values into the persistent cache) and unconditionally forces full computation on these chunks, cutting off error propagation. We implement X-Cache on X-world, a production multi-camera action-conditioned driving world model built on multi-block causal DiT with few-step denoising and rolling KV cache. X-Cache achieves 71% block skip rate with 2.6x wall-clock speedup while maintaining minimum degradation.

ai.tldr: 提出X-Cache，一种无需训练的加速方法，通过跨生成块缓存残差，实现71%的块跳过率和2.6倍加速，用于少步自回归世界模型推理。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散缓存方法不适用于少步蒸馏模型，且序列级并行化需要未来条件，不适用于闭环交互生成。
ai.method: 在连续生成块之间缓存每块残差，使用双度量门控机制基于结构和动作感知的块输入指纹决定是否重用缓存，并识别KV更新块强制全计算以阻止误差传播。
ai.result: 在X-world模型上实现71%块跳过率、2.6倍墙钟加速，且性能退化最小。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户加速自动驾驶世界模型的实时推理，降低交互部署成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合动作感知指纹和双度量门控，实现细粒度块级缓存决策。
idea_spark.risk: 缓存残差可能累积误差，需依赖KV更新块强制计算来截断。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从跨去噪步缓存转向跨生成块缓存，利用块间冗余而非步间冗余。

en.tldr: Proposes X-Cache, a training-free acceleration method that caches residuals across consecutive generation chunks, achieving 71% block skip rate and 2.6x wall-clock speedup for few-step autoregressive world model inference.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion caching methods do not transfer to few-step distilled models, and sequence-level parallelization requires future conditioning unavailable in closed-loop interactive generation.
en.method: Caches per-block residuals across consecutive chunks, uses a dual-metric gating mechanism over a structure- and action-aware block-input fingerprint to decide recomputation or reuse, and identifies KV update chunks for unconditional full computation to prevent error propagation.
en.result: Achieves 71% block skip rate and 2.6x wall-clock speedup on the X-world model with minimal degradation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users accelerate real-time inference of autonomous driving world models, reducing deployment cost for interactive applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combines action-aware fingerprint and dual-metric gating for fine-grained block-level caching decisions.
idea_spark.risk: Cached residuals may accumulate errors, requiring KV update chunks for unconditional full computation to truncate propagation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Shifts from cross-denoising-step caching to cross-generation-chunk caching, exploiting inter-chunk redundancy instead of inter-step redundancy.

papers.title: Inference Headroom Ratio: A Diagnostic and Control Framework for Inference Stability Under Constraint
papers.summary: We present a simulation-based evaluation of the Inference Headroom Ratio (IHR), a dimensionless diagnostic quantity for characterizing inference stability in constrained decision systems. IHR formalizes the relationship between a system's effective inferential capacity C and the combined uncertainty and constraint load U + K imposed by its operating environment, and is intended to capture proximity to an inference stability boundary rather than output-level performance. Across three controlled experiments, we show that IHR functions as: (1) a quantifiable risk indicator whose relationship to collapse probability follows a well-fitted logistic curve with estimated critical threshold IHR* approx. 1.19, (2) a sensitive indicator of proximity to the inference stability boundary under environmental noise, and (3) a viable control variable whose active regulation reduces system collapse rate from 79.4% to 58.7% and IHR variance by 70.4% across 300 Monte Carlo runs. These results position IHR as a prospective, system-level complement to standard performance, drift, and uncertainty metrics, enabling estimation of remaining inferential margin before overt failure in AI systems operating under distributional shift and constraint.

ai.tldr: 提出推理裕度比（IHR）作为诊断和控制推理稳定性的无量纲指标，实验表明其可量化崩溃风险并作为控制变量降低系统崩溃率。
ai.motivation: 现有性能、漂移和不确定性指标无法有效表征系统在约束下的推理稳定性边界，需要一种前瞻性系统级诊断工具。
ai.method: 通过三个受控实验，使用蒙特卡洛模拟评估IHR与崩溃概率的逻辑关系、对环境噪声的敏感性以及作为控制变量的有效性。
ai.result: IHR与崩溃概率拟合逻辑曲线，临界阈值约1.19；主动调节IHR使崩溃率从79.4%降至58.7%，方差降低70.4%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和工程师在AI系统部署前评估推理稳定性余量，预防分布偏移下的故障。

idea_spark.idea: 将IHR与在线学习结合，实现动态调整推理容量以适应环境变化。
idea_spark.risk: IHR的临界阈值可能因系统架构不同而需要重新校准，通用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从工程中的安全裕度概念启发，将推理稳定性量化为可操作指标。

zh.tldr: 提出推理裕度比（IHR）作为诊断和控制推理稳定性的无量纲指标，实验表明其可量化崩溃风险并作为控制变量降低系统崩溃率。

idea_spark.risk: IHR的临界阈值可能因系统架构不同而需要重新校准，通用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从工程中的安全裕度概念启发，将推理稳定性量化为可操作指标。

en.tldr: Proposes Inference Headroom Ratio (IHR) as a dimensionless diagnostic for inference stability under constraint, showing it quantifies collapse risk and serves as a control variable to reduce system collapse rate.
en.motivation: Standard performance, drift, and uncertainty metrics fail to characterize inference stability boundaries under constraints, necessitating a prospective system-level diagnostic tool.
en.method: Three controlled experiments using Monte Carlo simulations evaluate IHR's logistic relationship with collapse probability, sensitivity to environmental noise, and effectiveness as a control variable.
en.result: IHR fits a logistic curve with critical threshold ~1.19; active regulation reduces collapse rate from 79.4% to 58.7% and variance by 70.4%.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers and engineers assess inference stability margins before deployment, preventing failures under distributional shift.

idea_spark.idea: Combine IHR with online learning to dynamically adjust inferential capacity in response to environmental changes.
idea_spark.risk: Critical threshold may require recalibration for different system architectures, limiting generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by safety margins in engineering, quantifying inference stability as an actionable metric.

papers.title: Improved lower bounds for eigenvalues of the Laplacian on bounded Euclidean domains
papers.summary: In this paper, we establish Brezin-Li-Yau type lower bounds for averaged sums of eigenvalues of the Dirichlet Laplacian and poly-Laplacian on bounded domains in Euclidean spaces. By deriving expansions of two binary polynomials which may be of independent interest, we improve several existing lower bounds of this kind in the literature. Furthermore, our lower bounds are optimal in the sense that our expansions capture all positive terms, whereas previous works only provided certain lower bounds for these two binary polynomials, effectively capturing only a subset of the positive terms identified in our expansions.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了有界欧氏区域上Dirichlet Laplacian和poly-Laplacian特征值平均和的Brezin-Li-Yau型下界，通过两个二元多项式的展开改进了现有结果，且下界是最优的。
ai.motivation: 现有下界仅捕获部分正项，本文旨在通过完全展开二元多项式来获得更优且最优的下界。
ai.method: 推导两个二元多项式的展开式，并利用这些展开式建立特征值平均和的下界。
ai.result: 得到了改进的Brezin-Li-Yau型下界，这些下界捕获了所有正项，优于先前仅捕获部分正项的结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过多项式展开改进特征值下界，以及这些下界的最优性。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似的多项式展开技术应用于其他椭圆算子的特征值下界问题。
idea_spark.risk: 展开的复杂性可能随算子或区域维度增加而急剧上升，导致计算不可行。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过完全捕获正项来获得最优下界的思路，可启发其他谱不等式问题的改进。

zh.result: 得到了改进的Brezin-Li-Yau型下界，这些下界捕获了所有正项，优于先前仅捕获部分正项的结果。

idea_spark.inspiration: 通过完全捕获正项来获得最优下界的思路，可启发其他谱不等式问题的改进。

en.tldr: This paper establishes improved Brezin-Li-Yau type lower bounds for averaged sums of eigenvalues of the Dirichlet Laplacian and poly-Laplacian on bounded Euclidean domains, achieving optimality by capturing all positive terms through expansions of two binary polynomials.
en.motivation: Existing lower bounds capture only a subset of positive terms; the goal is to obtain better and optimal lower bounds by fully expanding the binary polynomials.
en.method: Derive expansions of two binary polynomials and use them to establish lower bounds for averaged eigenvalue sums.
en.result: Improved Brezin-Li-Yau type lower bounds that capture all positive terms, outperforming previous results that captured only a subset.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how polynomial expansions can improve eigenvalue lower bounds and the optimality of these bounds.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying similar polynomial expansion techniques to eigenvalue lower bounds for other elliptic operators.
idea_spark.risk: The complexity of expansions may increase sharply with operator or domain dimension, making computation infeasible.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of achieving optimal bounds by fully capturing positive terms can inspire improvements in other spectral inequalities.

papers.title: Debiasing optimal transport: classical and entropic
papers.summary: We study the notion of debiasability for cost functions arising in optimal transport. We call a symmetric cost function $c:\mathscr{X}\times\mathscr{X}\to\mathbb{R}\cup\{+\infty\}$ debiasable if it satisfies $c(x,y)\ge \tfrac{1}{2}c(x,x)+\tfrac{1}{2}c(y,y)$ for all $x,y\in\mathscr{X}$. Building on an equivalent characterization by an inf-representation $c(x,y)=\inf_{z\in\mathscr{Z}}ψ(x,z)+ψ(y,z)$ for some set $\mathscr{Z}$ and some function $ψ: \mathscr{X}\times \mathscr{Z} \to \mathbb{R} \cup \{+\infty\}$, interpreted as a generalization of the midpoint identity for squared geodesic distances, we investigate the debiasability of costs defined on spaces of probability measures. Our primary focus is the entropic regularization of optimal transport across different regimes of the regularization parameter $\varepsilon \in [0,+\infty]$, encompassing classical optimal transport ($\varepsilon=0$), entropic optimal transport ($\varepsilon>0$), and the Maximum Mean Discrepancy ($\varepsilon=+\infty$). For $\varepsilon \in (0,+\infty]$, we investigate sufficient conditions, such as negative definiteness of the ground cost or continuity and positive definiteness of the induced kernel, handled then via a convex-nonconcave minimax argument. All our results extend naturally to unbalanced optimal transport settings and we generalize in this way the findings of \cite{feydy2019interpolating} and \cite{sejourne2019sinkhorn}. As a byproduct, we derive novel decomposition formulas for entropic optimal transport, which may be of independent interest.

ai.tldr: 研究最优传输中代价函数的可去偏性，提出对称代价函数可去偏的充要条件，并分析经典、熵正则化及最大均值差异三种情形下的去偏性质。
ai.motivation: 在最优传输中，许多代价函数存在系统性偏差，影响距离度量的公平性和可解释性，需要建立统一的去偏理论框架。
ai.method: 通过代价函数的inf-表示刻画可去偏性，利用负定性和正定性条件，结合凸-非凹极小极大论证，推导熵正则化下的充分条件。
ai.result: 给出了可去偏代价函数的等价表征，证明了熵正则化参数在不同区间下的去偏条件，并推广到非平衡最优传输，得到新的分解公式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解最优传输中代价函数偏差的来源，指导选择或构造无偏的传输代价，提升距离度量的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将去偏条件应用于图上的最优传输，设计无偏的图距离度量，用于图分类或节点表示学习。
idea_spark.risk: 理论条件可能过于严格，实际数据中难以完全满足，需验证近似去偏的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受熵正则化下分解公式启发，可探索其他正则化方式（如L1正则）对代价偏差的影响。

en.tldr: Studies the debiasability of cost functions in optimal transport, proposes necessary and sufficient conditions for symmetric costs, and analyzes debiasing properties under classical, entropic, and MMD regimes.
en.motivation: Many cost functions in optimal transport exhibit systematic bias, affecting fairness and interpretability of distance measures, motivating a unified debiasing framework.
en.method: Characterizes debiasability via inf-representation of cost functions, uses negative definiteness and positive definiteness conditions with convex-nonconcave minimax arguments to derive sufficient conditions under entropic regularization.
en.result: Provides equivalent characterization of debiasable costs, proves debiasing conditions across regularization parameter regimes, extends to unbalanced optimal transport, and yields novel decomposition formulas.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand sources of bias in optimal transport costs and guides selection or construction of unbiased costs for more reliable distance measures.

idea_spark.idea: Apply debiasing conditions to optimal transport on graphs to design unbiased graph distances for graph classification or node representation learning.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical conditions may be too strict for real data; robustness of approximate debiasing needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by decomposition formulas under entropic regularization, explore other regularizations (e.g., L1) on cost bias.

papers.title: Entropy lower bounds and sum-product phenomena
papers.summary: Various lower bounds are established for the entropy of sums, products and their combinations. First, we derive a prime-field analogue of a version of the entropy power inequality established by Tao over torsion-free groups. Next, we prove an entropy sum-product statement: For independent and identically distributed random variables $X,X'$, the maximum of ${\bf H}(X+X')$ and ${\bf H}(XX')$ is bounded below by a linear combination of the entropy and the min-entropy (Rényi entropy of order~$\infty$) of $X$. This result, obtained by bounding entropies of the form ${\bf H}\bigl( X(Y+Z)\bigr)$ from above and below, is valid over arbitrary fields $F$. Over $F={\bf R}$, a slightly stronger inequality is derived. Finally, a weak version of a purely Shannon-entropic sum-product result is developed: If the entropic additive doubling of a random variable $X$ over an arbitrary field is $O(1)$, then its multiplicative doubling is at least proportional to ${\bf H}(X)$.

ai.tldr: 建立了和、积及其组合的熵下界，包括素数域上的熵幂不等式、熵和积的下界以及弱香农熵和积结果。
ai.motivation: 探索和与积的熵下界，特别是素数域上的熵幂不等式和熵和积现象。
ai.method: 通过上下界约束形如 H(X(Y+Z)) 的熵，并利用最小熵和香农熵。
ai.result: 对任意域，和与积的熵的最大值被 X 的熵和最小熵的线性组合下界；在实数域上得到稍强的不等式；若加性加倍为 O(1)，则乘性加倍至少正比于 H(X)。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了熵和积现象的理论下界，有助于理解随机变量和与积的熵行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用最小熵和香农熵的线性组合来统一刻画和与积的熵下界。
idea_spark.risk: 下界可能不够紧，需要更精细的熵不等式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受 Tao 在无挠群上的熵幂不等式启发，推广到素数域和任意域。

en.tldr: Establishes lower bounds for the entropy of sums, products, and their combinations, including an entropy power inequality over prime fields, an entropy sum-product statement, and a weak Shannon-entropic sum-product result.
en.motivation: To explore lower bounds for the entropy of sums and products, particularly the entropy power inequality over prime fields and the entropy sum-product phenomenon.
en.method: By bounding entropies of the form H(X(Y+Z)) from above and below, and using min-entropy and Shannon entropy.
en.result: Over arbitrary fields, the maximum of H(X+X') and H(XX') is bounded below by a linear combination of the entropy and min-entropy of X; a slightly stronger inequality holds over R; if the additive doubling is O(1), then the multiplicative doubling is at least proportional to H(X).
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical lower bounds for entropy sum-product phenomena, aiding understanding of entropy behavior of sums and products of random variables.

idea_spark.idea: Use a linear combination of Shannon entropy and min-entropy to uniformly characterize entropy lower bounds for sums and products.
idea_spark.risk: The bounds may not be tight, requiring more refined entropy inequalities.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Tao's entropy power inequality over torsion-free groups, extended to prime fields and arbitrary fields.

papers.title: Utterance-Level Methods for Identifying Reliable ASR-Output for Child Speech
papers.summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) is increasingly used in applications involving child speech, such as language learning and literacy acquisition. However, the effectiveness of such applications is limited by high ASR error rates. The negative effects can be mitigated by identifying in advance which ASR-outputs are reliable. This work aims to develop two novel approaches for selecting reliable ASR-output at the utterance level, one for selecting reliable read speech and one for dialogue speech material. Evaluations were done on an English and a Dutch dataset, each with a baseline and finetuned model. The results show that utterance-level selection methods for identifying reliably transcribed speech recordings have high precision for the best strategy (P > 97.4) for both read speech and dialogue material, for both languages. Using the current optimal strategy allows 21.0% to 55.9% of dialogue/read speech datasets to be automatically selected with low (UER of < 2.6) error rates.

ai.tldr: 提出两种基于语句级的方法，用于识别儿童语音中可靠的ASR输出，在英语和荷兰语数据集上实现了高精度（P>97.4），并允许自动选择21.0%至55.9%的数据，错误率低于2.6%。
ai.motivation: 儿童语音ASR错误率高，影响语言学习等应用的效果，需要提前识别哪些ASR输出是可靠的。
ai.method: 开发了两种语句级选择方法，一种针对朗读语音，一种针对对话语音，在英语和荷兰语数据集上使用基线模型和微调模型进行评估。
ai.result: 最佳策略的精确度超过97.4%，自动选择的数据比例在21.0%至55.9%之间，且错误率低于2.6%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动筛选出ASR输出中可靠的语句，减少后续处理中的错误传播。

idea_spark.idea: 结合语句级置信度与声学特征，设计轻量级分类器实时判断ASR输出可靠性。
idea_spark.risk: 不同语言或口音下方法泛化性可能下降，需要重新训练或调整阈值。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将可靠性筛选与下游任务（如语音交互、自动评分）联合优化，可能进一步提升整体性能。

en.tldr: Proposes two utterance-level methods to identify reliable ASR output for child speech, achieving high precision (P>97.4) on English and Dutch datasets, and automatically selecting 21.0% to 55.9% of data with low error rates (<2.6%).
en.motivation: High ASR error rates in child speech limit applications like language learning; pre-identifying reliable outputs can mitigate negative effects.
en.method: Develops two utterance-level selection methods—one for read speech and one for dialogue speech—evaluated on English and Dutch datasets with baseline and finetuned models.
en.result: Best strategy achieves precision >97.4%, automatically selecting 21.0%–55.9% of data with error rates below 2.6%.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically filter reliable ASR outputs, reducing error propagation in downstream tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine utterance-level confidence with acoustic features to build a lightweight classifier for real-time ASR reliability judgment.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization may degrade across different languages or accents, requiring retraining or threshold adjustment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Jointly optimize reliability screening with downstream tasks (e.g., speech interaction, automatic scoring) to further improve overall performance.

papers.title: DeepParse: Hybrid Log Parsing with LLM-Synthesized Regex Masks
papers.summary: Modern distributed systems produce massive, heterogeneous logs essential for reliability, security, and anomaly detection. Converting these free-form messages into structured templates (log parsing) is challenging due to evolving formats and limited labeled data. Machine-learning-based parsers like Drain are fast but accuracy often degrades on complex variables, while Large Language Models (LLMs) offer better generalization but incur prohibitive inference costs. This paper presents DeepParse, a hybrid framework that automatically mines reusable variable patterns from small log samples using an LLM, then applies them deterministically through the Drain algorithm. By separating the reasoning phase from execution, DeepParse enables accurate, scalable, and cost-efficient log structuring without relying on brittle handcrafted rules or per-line neural inference. Across 16 benchmark datasets, DeepParse achieves higher accuracy in variable extraction (97.6% average Parsing Accuracy) and better consistency than both heuristic and LLM-only baselines. Integrating DeepParse into an anomaly detection pipeline reduced false alarms by over 30% and reduced inference latency by 36% compared to heuristic baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出DeepParse混合框架，利用LLM从少量日志样本中自动挖掘可复用的变量模式，并通过Drain算法确定性执行，实现高效准确的日志结构化。
ai.motivation: 现有日志解析方法中，基于机器学习的解析器（如Drain）在复杂变量上精度下降，而LLM泛化能力强但推理成本高，需要一种兼顾准确性和效率的混合方案。
ai.method: DeepParse使用LLM从少量日志样本中合成正则表达式掩码，提取变量模式，然后通过Drain算法确定性应用这些模式，将推理与执行分离。
ai.result: 在16个基准数据集上，变量提取平均解析准确率达97.6%，优于启发式和纯LLM基线；集成到异常检测管道后，误报率降低30%以上，推理延迟减少36%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效解析异构日志，提升系统可靠性和异常检测性能，降低人工规则维护成本。

idea_spark.idea: 探索使用LLM自动生成正则表达式掩码，结合传统算法实现高效执行，平衡泛化能力与计算成本。
idea_spark.risk: LLM生成的掩码可能过拟合小样本，导致在新日志格式上泛化不足；依赖LLM的初始挖掘阶段仍存在一定成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 分离推理与执行的思想启发：在资源受限场景下，可先用强大模型离线生成规则，再用轻量算法在线执行，适用于边缘计算等环境。

idea_spark.risk: LLM生成的掩码可能过拟合小样本，导致在新日志格式上泛化不足；依赖LLM的初始挖掘阶段仍存在一定成本。
